programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Detroit 2002
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game, from 2002, was played in Detroit, MI.

programme.title: Play It Forward - New Teammates
programme.desc: Coach Lou joins Hammer, Bulldog, and the team to learn about the history and legacy of the Harlem Globetrotters from their humble beginnings in Chicago. Tryouts for new Globetrotter Team Members are underway and the Globetrotters remember some of their favorite places from around the world. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Greenville 2017
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played at the Bon Secours Wellness Arena in Greenville, SC.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Hoops, Hits & Hype With The Globetrotters
programme.desc: The Harlem Globetrotters hit Harlem with Snoop Dogg, teaming up with Steph & Klay for epic trick shots! Plus, a wild HORSE game with MLS Philly Union & NFL’s Marquette King brings the heat across sports. Hoops, hip-hop, and highlight-reel madness — you don’t wanna miss this!

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Breaking Boundaries And World Records
programme.desc: The women of the Harlem Globetrotters. Plus, jaw-dropping trick shots, slick handles, and unstoppable energy from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Honorable Adventures
programme.desc: The team highlights their greatest showmen. The Harlem Globetrotters perform for servicemen and their families during a visit to Moody Air Force Base. Plus, Hammer surprises viral sensation Zeke "The Trick Shot Kid." Cheese, Wham, Hammer, and Hotshot learn about some amazing animals at a theme park in Georgia.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Globetrotters History Ep. 1
programme.desc: Celebrating the legacy of the Harlem Globetrotters with iconic profiles and unforgettable moments as we journey through decades of dazzling skills, humor, and global impact.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Assisting the Home Team
programme.desc: Torch surprises her high school girls' basketball team with new equipment; the team visits an organization in Chicago where they meet asylum seekers transitioning into U.S. life; Hammer surprises viral sensation Zeke "The Trick Shot Kid" in Georgia.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Beat Of Their Own Drum
programme.desc: Harlem Globetrotters come together to make some new world records and to take back some old ones. Then Wham, Thunder, and Hammer head to New Orleans to meet kids that have fallen in line to learn the drumline. And we break down the science behind Cheese's famous Granny shot. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - New York City 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in Madison Square Garden in New York City.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Love and Basketball
programme.desc: Hotshot, Torch, and Cheese break bread with a LA based group that provides birthday parties to kids experiencing homelessness. Then the Globetrotters partake in a cooking competition with world-renowned chef, Marcus Samuelson. Moose takes the court in Venice Beach to show us the science behind his behind the back shot. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Globetrotting with STEAM
programme.desc: Wham visits his hometown of Stone Mountain, GA, to reconnect with family, friends, and his favorite childhood teacher before inviting her and her class on a field trip to a local animal sanctuary. Hammer, Hotshot, Torch, and Coach Lou visit a youth football league in South LA to learn how coaches are inspiring the community. Plus, Hotshot and Cheese hit the court in LA to challenge some locals to a pickup game.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - World Records Ep. 1
programme.desc: A collection of world records broken by the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Minnesota 1997
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was from 1997 and played in Minneapolis, MN.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Charity Starts at Home
programme.desc: The Globetrotters visit Bulldog's hometown of Corpus Christi to challenge Little Brothers and Little Sisters to an unforgettable game of basketball and the team trade in their sneaks for cleats.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Salt Lake City 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in the Delta Center in Salt Lake City, UT.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Sunshine Day
programme.desc: TNT alongside Jet and his daughter realize just how precious the simple things are on the shores of Sebago Lake. TNT and Torch reminisce on their early days of blazing the trail for a new generation of female Globetrotters. And TNT doesn't look twice as she sinks an amazing shot in New York's famous Rucker Park. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - Mr. Basketball’s Journey: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: This documentary-style content chronicles the rich history and legacy of the Harlem Globetrotters, from their founding in 1926 to their rise as world-class athletes and entertainers. It highlights their groundbreaking 1948 victory over the Minneapolis Lakers, which helped legitimize black athletes in professional basketball. The story focuses on Mannie Jackson, a former player turned executive, who saved the team from extinction in the 1990s and revitalized their global brand. The Globetrotters’ influence on basketball, their unique blend of comedy and athleticism, and their philanthropic efforts around the world are also showcased, cementing their place as an iconic basketball and entertainment institution.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Trick Shots & Tea Parties
programme.desc: Wham, Cheese and Hammer learn about the construction industry; Torch, Hammer, and Hot Shot head to Broward, Florida, to meet The Embrace Girls Foundation; a nonprofit encouraging at-risk girls and uplifting tea parties.; Thunder throwback to his trick shot gauntlet at an abandoned warehouse.; Torch, Hammer, Wham, and Hot Shot take an unforgettable journey to Australia. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - The People of the Globe: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: At the LA Sports Arena, the Globetrotters showcase their newest generation of talent while honoring 75 years of tradition.

programme.title: Play It Forward - On The Waterfront
programme.desc: Bulldog joins Jet and his daughter to discover the secrets of marine conservation at Hampton Beach. Then, TNT alongside Jet and his daughter realize just how precious the simple things are on the shores of Sebago Lake. And Thunder proves his vertical lift is as impressive as ever. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Cooking with STEAM
programme.desc: Hammer, Hotshot, Torch, and Coach Lou visit a youth football league in South LA to learn how the coaches are inspiring the community. TNT, Cheese, and Hotshot visit an organization that teaches kids the values of Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math. Torch travels to Malaysia with Scooter to connect with some special locals. Plus, Jet brings Cheese, Hotshot, and Hops to an LA Shelter to cook for their residents.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Slammin' Street Ball
programme.desc: The Globetrotters learn the benefits of verse with "Street Poets." The team tells their history of being goodwill ambassadors. Plus, they surprise coach and mentor Chris "Handles" Franklin by honoring him at his community event in Harrisburg, PA.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Dunks Ep. 3
programme.desc: The best dunks from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Gifted Givers
programme.desc: TNT, Cheese, and Hotshot visit an organization that teaches kids the values of Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math. Hammer tours his adopted hometown of Tampa where he connects with Coach Handles and mentors young athletes. Cheese, Wham, Hammer, and Hotshot learn about some amazing animals at a theme park in Georgia. Plus Coach Lou helps Thunder brush up on his Spanish before heading on tour to Mexico.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Celebrities Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Globetrotters spend the day with YouTuber Faze Rug.

programme.title: 100 Years Of The Harlem Globetrotters - Harlem Globetrotters vs. the World - The Amazing Race All-Stars!
programme.desc: Get ready for a slam dunk of an adventure as Harlem Globetrotters Flight Time and Big Easy take on The Amazing Race All-Stars! From assembling toy cars in China and rappelling down roaring waterfalls in Malaysia to sewing shirts in Sri Lanka and navigating the ancient steps of Rome, these athletes face it all with a smile. Watch as they battle smoking taxis, navigate chaotic tuk-tuk lines, and even compete in a remote-controlled chariot race, proving that teamwork and a positive attitude are their greatest weapons. Will their undeniable rhythm and endless hustle be enough to keep them ahead of the pack?

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Harlem Hoops Challenge!
programme.desc: Step onto the court with the Harlem Globetrotters for wild basketball challenges, from rapid-fire jump shots to Tic Tac Toe with a twist! Let the Harlem Hoops madness begin!

programme.title: My Rookie Season - My Rookie Season Ep. 3
programme.desc: The annual Harlem Globetrotters Training Camp welcomes new rookies while fans get a look behind the curtain to see what it takes to make the team and what it truly means to be a Harlem Globetrotter.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - My Globetrotter Journey Begins
programme.desc: From the nerves of the first game to the thrill of the first no-look bucket, experience the grind, the glory, and the global stage of becoming a Harlem Globetrotter.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Good Eats
programme.desc: Cheese, Bulldog, Hot Shot, and Jet meet with local D.C. youth to support their mission for clean water and self-reliance. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer learn about cooking nutritious meals through a healthy competition. Thunder and the Globetrotters perform for a special crowd in Chile and meet with the Chilean Minister of Sports and a deserving group of local children. TNT supports Torch from the sidelines of one of the fastest growing sports for women, flag football.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - Red, White & Blue: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: This content showcases the legendary Harlem Globetrotters, highlighting their 70-year history of thrilling audiences worldwide with their unique blend of basketball skill, athleticism, and entertainment. It features iconic moments, fan interactions, and tributes to the team’s legacy and key figures who helped shape the global basketball phenomenon.

And Kevin DeBruin illuminates the science behind Torch’s signature trick shot. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.desc: The team dazzles in Santo Domingo.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: The team visits a Charlotte organization that teaches kids literacy with the help of soccer. Wham visits his hometown of Stone Mountain, GA to reconnect with family, friends, and his favorite childhood teacher. Coach Lou teaches Thunder some Spanish before a tour stop in Mexico and later assists Coach Handles in helping the players cultivate their skills at the annual Showman's camp in Atlanta.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Jet walks with dads and strollers in park. Thunder and Hammer visit adaptive athlete gym. Team honors a Trotter and Coach. Thunder demos trick shot science. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: My Rookie Season - My Rookie Season Ep. 1
programme.desc: The annual Harlem Globetrotters Training Camp welcomes new rookies and fans get a look behind the curtain to see what it takes to make the team and what it truly means to be a Harlem Globetrotter.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Friends Make Family
programme.desc: Hotshot, Wham and Cheese head to New Orleans to visit a program that mentors kids through the gift of music. TNT and Ace join Torch as she visits her alma mater to mentor the girl’s basketball team.. A young fan is granted the opportunity to ask a Globetrotter whatever she wishes. And we break down the science behind an extraordinary “Hotshot” performed at Venice Beach. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Washington D.C.
programme.desc: The team travels to the Nation's Capital where Bulldog, Jet, and Hotshot learn about the value of financial literacy while discovering the game of golf. Also, Cheese, Bulldog, Hot Shot, and Jet meet with local D.C. youth to support their mission for clean water and self-reliance. The team plays a classic playground game with some champion little leaguers. And Spelling Bee champion and basketball star, Zaila Avant Garde, meets with Coach Lou for a lesson in the Globetrotters' innovative trick shots.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Hometown Roots
programme.desc: Wham invites his elementary school teacher and her class on a field trip to a wildlife sanctuary in Georgia. Hammer invites Zeus to his adopted hometown of Tampa to enlighten high schoolers on the values of entrepreneurship. Hotshot and Cheese travel to Jet's hometown to support him while he's being honored. And TNT spends quality time with family in her adopted hometown of Charlotte, NC.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Trick Shots Ep. 3
programme.desc: Amazing trick shots from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Drum & Pedals
programme.desc: Coach Lou brings Thunder and Torch to Philadelphia where they meet a young man who is dedicated to fixing and providing bikes to the underserved. Then Wham, Thunder, and Hammer head to New Orleans to meet kids that have fallen in line to learn the drumline. A young fan is granted the opportunity to ask a Globetrotter whatever she wishes. And the science behind Jet's Granny Shot taken at Harlem's world-famous Rucker Park. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Finding your Groove
programme.desc: Torch, Ace and TNT mentor a special group of girls in Atlanta. Coach Lou brings Thunder and Torch to Philadelphia where they meet a young man who is dedicated to fixing and providing bikes to the underserved. TNT and Ace dance their way into the hearts of a group of young girls in Harlem. And we break down the mechanics of a spectacular trick shot taken by Ace in Tennessee. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Willing and Able
programme.desc: Hotshot takes Wham to an aquarium in Kentucky that preserves aquatic wildlife. Hotshot, Cheese, and Jet learn about an organization that builds playgrounds for kids of all abilities. Hammer tours his adopted hometown of Tampa, and he connects with Coach Handles to mentor young athletes. Plus, Thunder reunites with a very special fan.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Celebrities Ep. 2
programme.desc: A collection of celebrity interactions with the Harlem Globetrotters including tennis star Nick Kyrgios, astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson, singer Justin Bieber and quarterback Carson Wentz.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Bring It Home
programme.desc: The Globetrotters recount the history of their beloved "Magic Circle." Torch surprises her high school girls' basketball team with new equipment. Plus, Thunder pays a visit to his hometown of Chesapeake, VA.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Celebrities Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Harlem Globetrotters have fun with celebrity athletes, actors and influencers including the Dallas Mavericks of the NBA, former MLB player David Ross MLS player Alejandro Bedoya and ESPN commentator David Pollack.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Beats and Buses
programme.desc: Wham, Bulldog, and Hotshot fulfill a major need for a south central Los Angeles after-school program. Aspiring teen-girl music producers teach Jet, Bulldog, Wham, and Cheese how to make beats. Hotshot takes a touching look at the city that raised him in Harlem, New York. Hammer, Wham, and Bulldog have classic Guinness World Record moments. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Trotters of the Caribbean
programme.desc: The Globetrotters visit a school in the Dominican Republic teaching kids the virtues of harvesting their own crops, recount the history of their beloved "magic circle".

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - The Stars Of The Game
programme.desc: In this emotional special, the Harlem Globetrotters pay tribute to the "Stars of the Game," celebrating the franchise's most legendary figures including Meadowlark Lemon, Curly Neal, and Geese Ausbie. The episode features a historic ceremony at the University of Houston, where head coach "Sweet Lou" Dunbar sees his jersey #41 retired, passing the torch to his son, Sweet Lou II. Meanwhile, current star Big Easy Lofton returns to his hometown of New Orleans, visiting the neighborhood and people who shaped him before Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Trick Shots Ep. 4
programme.desc: Amazing trick shots from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Mobile 2025
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in Mobile, AL in 2025.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Ambassadors of Goodwill
programme.desc: Cheese and TNT empower inner-city youth who are fighting back against violence. Hammer, Cheese, and TNT trade in the wood-grain for the ice rink in Chicago. Globetrotter Max 'Hops' Pearce unveils his unique artwork. Bulldog, Wham, and TNT join a group of wounded veterans for an extraordinary encounter with whale sharks in Atlanta.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Celebrities Ep. 4
programme.desc: A collection of celebrity interactions with the Harlem Globetrotters including sports columnist Matthew Berry, NBA stars Jason Kidd and Dirk Nowitzki, and rapper Snoop Dogg.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Art in the Jet
programme.desc: The Globetrotters join a special program that is revitalizing inner city basketball courts. Cheese gets a galactic lesson on what it takes to prepare food for zero gravity. Jet comes in for a landing in his hometown of Elizabeth, New Jersey, where he gives back at a youth basketball camp. And Wham breaks the world record for most between-the-leg dribbles in one minute. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Jumping Back Into Action
programme.desc: Hotshot and X-Over teach basketball to kids with dwarfism at the DAAA Games. The team helps foster care children transitioning into new homes. Wham surprises his cousin with a skydiving experience with a veteran-supporting organization.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Urban Farming
programme.desc: A young man's life is changed forever when he overcomes bullying with the encouragement from the team. Wham and Hammer venture off the court and on to the farm to learn valuable skills in food cultivation and healthy living. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer get a history lesson from Coach Lou when he puts a twist on a classic playground game of, Knockout.

Watch as Simone Biles learns to dunk while teaching the team gymnastics, and Golden State Warrior Klay Thompson tests his range from the Globetrotters' legendary 4-point line. The episode also features a showdown with MLS star Tommy Thompson, a football skit with Le’Veon Bell and the Pittsburgh Steelers, and rhythmic gymnastics challenges with Team USA’s Camilla Feeley.

And the science behind Jet’s Granny Shot taken at Harlem’s world-famous Rucker Park. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - World-Record Dunk at Disney: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: This video features the Harlem Globetrotters showcasing their legendary basketball skills and entertaining performances. The footage highlights record-breaking moments, fan interactions, and the history of the team, emphasizing their global impact and influence on the sport. From exciting game highlights and interviews with players like Shawn Williams to behind-the-scenes glimpses of their tours and community engagement programs, the video celebrates the Harlem Globetrotters' legacy as the greatest entertainers and ambassadors of basketball. It also touches on their milestone 20,000th game, their brand growth under owner Mannie Jackson, and their commitment to youth through summer basketball camps.

And the Globetrotters head to the great outdoors for a fishing excursion. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Precision Perfect Unreal Trick Shots
programme.desc: From rooftop buckets to no-look swishes, witness a masterclass in creativity, control, and jaw-dropping precision. No CGI. No second takes. Just raw talent and unbelievable trick shots that push the limits of what's possible.

Watch as they battle smoking taxis, navigate chaotic tuk-tuk lines, and even compete in a remote-controlled chariot race, proving that teamwork and a positive attitude are their greatest weapons. programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - The Stars Of The Game
programme.desc: In this emotional special, the Harlem Globetrotters pay tribute to the "Stars of the Game," celebrating the franchise's most legendary figures including Meadowlark Lemon, Curly Neal, and Geese Ausbie. The episode features a historic ceremony at the University of Houston, where head coach "Sweet Lou" Dunbar sees his jersey #41 retired, passing the torch to his son, Sweet Lou II. Meanwhile, current star Big Easy Lofton returns to his hometown of New Orleans, visiting the neighborhood and people who shaped him before Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Behind The Scenes Ep. 1

programme.title: Play It Forward - Welcome Home, Soldier
programme.desc: Coach Lou brings the team to Hill AirForce Base to help add some Globetrotter magic to the Welcome Home Celebration for returning troops. Bulldog, Jet and his daughter discover the secrets of marine conservation at Hampton Beach. And the science behind Torch’s signature trick shot. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Ambassadors of Goodwill
programme.desc: Cheese and TNT empower inner-city youth who are fighting back against violence. Hammer, Cheese, and TNT trade in the wood-grain for the ice rink in Chicago. Globetrotter Max 'Hops' Pearce unveils his unique artwork. Bulldog, Wham, and TNT join a group of wounded veterans for an extraordinary encounter with whale sharks in Atlanta.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Milwaukee 2023
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee, WI.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - The People of the Globe: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: At the LA Sports Arena, the Globetrotters showcase their newest generation of talent while honoring 75 years of tradition.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Harlem Hoops Challenge!
programme.desc: Step onto the court with the Harlem Globetrotters for wild basketball challenges, from rapid-fire jump shots to Tic Tac Toe with a twist! Let the Harlem Hoops madness begin!

programme.title: Play It Forward - Blast Off!
programme.desc: Jet, Wham, and Hotshot teach some South Central LA youth about the benefits of sports and exercise. Cheese and TNT visit NASA's Kennedy Space Center to learn how teamwork gets a rocket to the moon and back. And Bulldog shares a tribute to his most important mentor and inspiration: his older brother. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Trick Shots Ep. 4
programme.desc: Amazing trick shots from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - World Records Ep. 2
programme.desc: A collection of world records broken by the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Play It Forward - New Teammates
programme.desc: Coach Lou joins Hammer, Bulldog, and the team to learn about the history and legacy of the Harlem Globetrotters from their humble beginnings in Chicago. Tryouts for new Globetrotter Team Members are underway and the Globetrotters remember some of their favorite places from around the world. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Globetrotting with STEAM
programme.desc: Wham visits his hometown of Stone Mountain, GA, to reconnect with family, friends, and his favorite childhood teacher before inviting her and her class on a field trip to a local animal sanctuary. Hammer, Hotshot, Torch, and Coach Lou visit a youth football league in South LA to learn how coaches are inspiring the community. Plus, Hotshot and Cheese hit the court in LA to challenge some locals to a pickup game.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Sunshine Day
programme.desc: TNT alongside Jet and his daughter realize just how precious the simple things are on the shores of Sebago Lake. TNT and Torch reminisce on their early days of blazing the trail for a new generation of female Globetrotters. And TNT doesn't look twice as she sinks an amazing shot in New York's famous Rucker Park. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Cooking with STEAM
programme.desc: Hammer, Hotshot, Torch, and Coach Lou visit a youth football league in South LA to learn how the coaches are inspiring the community. TNT, Cheese, and Hotshot visit an organization that teaches kids the values of Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math. Torch travels to Malaysia with Scooter to connect with some special locals. Plus, Jet brings Cheese, Hotshot, and Hops to an LA Shelter to cook for their residents.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Aussie! Aussie! Aussie! Oi! Oi! Oi!
programme.desc: Globetrotters, Wham and TNT, pay homage to the legendary Coach Lou; Torch, Hammer, Wham, and Hot Shot take an unforgettable journey to Australia. Wham and Hammer venture off the court and on to the farm to learn valuable skills in food cultivation and healthy living.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Slammin' Street Ball
programme.desc: The Globetrotters learn the benefits of verse with "Street Poets." The team tells their history of being goodwill ambassadors. Plus, they surprise coach and mentor Chris "Handles" Franklin by honoring him at his community event in Harrisburg, PA.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Blazing Ahead
programme.desc: TNT and Torch reminisce on their early days of blazing the trail for a new generation of female Globetrotters; the team visits an Atlanta organization that cultivates Paralympian athletes and a New Orleans program that mentors kids through music.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Jumping Back Into Action
programme.desc: Hotshot and X-Over teach basketball to kids with dwarfism at the DAAA Games. The team helps foster care children transitioning into new homes. Wham surprises his cousin with a skydiving experience with a veteran-supporting organization.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Catching Waves
programme.desc: Hotshot, Hammer and Cheese hit the beach with some amazing foster kids and their chosen family. Hotshot takes Cheese along with him as they provide eager documentary students with an insider's perspective of the hidden stories of Harlem. And Kevin DeBruin illuminates the science behind Torch’s signature trick shot. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Red Hot Basketball
programme.desc: The team pays homage to their loyal fans as they go inside the Fifth Quarter; Thunder invites Jet and Bulldog to Red Hot Chili Pepper Flea's Conservatory of Music to discover how he keeps the study of music alive for the kids of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Guinness Greatness: Harlem Globetrotters in the Record Books
programme.desc: Get ready for jaw-dropping, record breaking trick shots as the world famous Harlem Globetrotters set out to break numerous Guinness World Records.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Celebrities Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Harlem Globetrotters have fun with celebrity athletes, actors and influencers including the Dallas Mavericks of the NBA, former MLB player David Ross MLS player Alejandro Bedoya and ESPN commentator David Pollack.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Gifted Givers
programme.desc: TNT, Cheese, and Hotshot visit an organization that teaches kids the values of Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math. Hammer tours his adopted hometown of Tampa where he connects with Coach Handles and mentors young athletes. Cheese, Wham, Hammer, and Hotshot learn about some amazing animals at a theme park in Georgia. Plus Coach Lou helps Thunder brush up on his Spanish before heading on tour to Mexico.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Breaking Boundaries And World Records
programme.desc: The women of the Harlem Globetrotters. Plus, jaw-dropping trick shots, slick handles, and unstoppable energy from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - Red, White & Blue: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: This content showcases the legendary Harlem Globetrotters, highlighting their 70-year history of thrilling audiences worldwide with their unique blend of basketball skill, athleticism, and entertainment. It features iconic moments, fan interactions, and tributes to the team’s legacy and key figures who helped shape the global basketball phenomenon.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Urban Farming

Wham and Hammer venture off the court and on to the farm to learn valuable skills in food cultivation and healthy living. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer get a history lesson from Coach Lou when he puts a twist on a classic playground game of, Knockout.

programme.desc: The best dunks from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.desc: A collection of celebrity interactions with the Harlem Globetrotters including tennis star Nick Kyrgios, astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson, singer Justin Bieber and quarterback Carson Wentz.

programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in the Delta Center in Salt Lake City, UT.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Trotters of the Caribbean
programme.desc: The Globetrotters visit a school in the Dominican Republic teaching kids the virtues of harvesting their own crops, recount the history of their beloved "magic circle".

programme.desc: Torch surprises her high school girls' basketball team with new equipment; the team visits an organization in Chicago where they meet asylum seekers transitioning into U.S. life; Hammer surprises viral sensation Zeke "The Trick Shot Kid" in Georgia.

Thunder and Hot Rod visit a school in the Dominican Republic that teaches kids the virtues of harvesting their own crops.

programme.title: Quick Cuts - Mr. Basketball’s Journey: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: This documentary-style content chronicles the rich history and legacy of the Harlem Globetrotters, from their founding in 1926 to their rise as world-class athletes and entertainers. It highlights their groundbreaking 1948 victory over the Minneapolis Lakers, which helped legitimize black athletes in professional basketball. The story focuses on Mannie Jackson, a former player turned executive, who saved the team from extinction in the 1990s and revitalized their global brand. The Globetrotters’ influence on basketball, their unique blend of comedy and athleticism, and their philanthropic efforts around the world are also showcased, cementing their place as an iconic basketball and entertainment institution.

programme.title: Play It Forward - H-A-R-L-E-M Spells Harlem
programme.desc: Coach Lou, Wham, Hammer, TNT and Torch head to the outdoors for a fishing excursion.; Wham, Cheese and Hammer learn about the construction industry; Cheese and Zaila Avant-Garde, the 2021 Scripps Spelling Bee Champion and basketball sensation, receive a lesson in food prep for space.; TNT supports Torch from the sidelines of one of the fastest growing sports for women, flag football.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Beat Of Their Own Drum
programme.desc: Harlem Globetrotters come together to make some new world records and to take back some old ones. Then Wham, Thunder, and Hammer head to New Orleans to meet kids that have fallen in line to learn the drumline. And we break down the science behind Cheese's famous Granny shot. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - American Dream East Rutherford 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played at the American Dream in East Rutherford, NJ.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Trick Shots Ep. 2
programme.desc: Amazing trick shots from the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - World Records Ep. 2
programme.desc: A collection of world records broken by the Harlem Globetrotters.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Art in the Jet
programme.desc: The Globetrotters join a special program that is revitalizing inner city basketball courts. Cheese gets a galactic lesson on what it takes to prepare food for zero gravity. Jet comes in for a landing in his hometown of Elizabeth, New Jersey, where he gives back at a youth basketball camp. And Wham breaks the world record for most between-the-leg dribbles in one minute. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Need for Speed
programme.desc: The Globetrotters twist into formation as they learn the historic tradition of Cuban Ballet in Miami. The team then meets the first professional female pit mechanic of color at a racing school before being invited to see her in action at a race in Indianapolis.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Honorable Adventures
programme.desc: The team highlights their greatest showmen. The Harlem Globetrotters perform for servicemen and their families during a visit to Moody Air Force Base. Plus, Hammer surprises viral sensation Zeke "The Trick Shot Kid." Cheese, Wham, Hammer, and Hotshot learn about some amazing animals at a theme park in Georgia.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Bismarck 2017
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played at the Bismarck Event Center in Bismarck, ND.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Celebrities Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Globetrotters spend the day with YouTuber Faze Rug.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: Jet and Coach Lou tell the history of the Globetrotters' storied rivals, the Washington Generals; the Globetrotters come together to make some new world records and to take back some old ones; plus a look at the mechanics of a trick shot by Ace.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Celebrities Ep. 5
programme.desc: A collection of celebrity interactions with the Harlem Globetrotters including magician John Rotellini, NFL great Franco Harris and gymnast Simone Biles.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Worthy of Praise
programme.desc: Coach Lou celebrates one of the best Globetrotters of all time: Geese Ausbie; the team breaks bread with a Los Angeles-based group providing birthday parties to kids experiencing homelessness; Thunder breaks down the science behind a trick shot.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Indiana 1992
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was from 1992 and played in Indianapolis, IN.

programme.title: 100 Years Of The Harlem Globetrotters - The Sweet Lou Dunbar Story
programme.desc: Celebrate the incredible story of Sweet Lou Dunbar, a Harlem Globetrotters legend whose talent, charisma, and creativity helped define generations of show basketball. From his rise as a gifted player to his lasting impact as a showman, coach, and mentor, this special episode honors the man whose joy, leadership, and legacy continue to inspire players and fans around the world.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Art of the Game
programme.desc: TNT spends time with family in her adopted hometown of Charlotte, NC; Hot Shot takes Wham to an aquarium in Kentucky that preserves aquatic wildlife. Coaches Lou and Handles help players cultivate their skills at the annual Showman’s camp in Atlanta.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Deep in the Heart
programme.desc: Jet walks with dads and strollers in park. Thunder and Hammer visit adaptive athlete gym. Team honors a Trotter and Coach. Thunder demos trick shot science. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Global Heart Warming
programme.desc: Jet brings Cheese, Hotshot, and Hops to a Los Angeles shelter to cook for their residents. Torch revisits her past and shows love to the family that raised her. Plus, Thunder reunites with a very special fan.

programme.title: Best of the Harlem Globetrotters - Harlem Hoops Challenge!
programme.desc: Step onto the court with the Harlem Globetrotters for wild basketball challenges, from rapid-fire jump shots to Tic Tac Toe with a twist! Let the Harlem Hoops madness begin!

programme.title: Quick Cuts - World-Record Dunk at Disney: 75 Years of Globetrotter Magic
programme.desc: This video features the Harlem Globetrotters showcasing their legendary basketball skills and entertaining performances. The footage highlights record-breaking moments, fan interactions, and the history of the team, emphasizing their global impact and influence on the sport. From exciting game highlights and interviews with players like Shawn Williams to behind-the-scenes glimpses of their tours and community engagement programs, the video celebrates the Harlem Globetrotters' legacy as the greatest entertainers and ambassadors of basketball. It also touches on their milestone 20,000th game, their brand growth under owner Mannie Jackson, and their commitment to youth through summer basketball camps.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Dancing is good for the Soul
programme.desc: TNT and Thunder visit Speedy to learn about his youth basketball league and train some special athletes. TNT and Ace dance their way into the hearts of a group of young girls in Harlem. Thunder and Bulldog line dance their way into the hearts of an amazing community in Nashville. And Speedy hits the famous courts of Harlem's Rucker Park to break down a one-of-a-kind trick shot. Kenny Smith hosts.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Sunshine Day
programme.desc: TNT alongside Jet and his daughter realize just how precious the simple things are on the shores of Sebago Lake. TNT and Torch reminisce on their early days of blazing the trail for a new generation of female Globetrotters. And TNT doesn't look twice as she sinks an amazing shot in New York's famous Rucker Park. Kenny Smith Hosts.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Raleigh 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in PNC Arena in Raleigh, NC.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - New York City 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in Madison Square Garden in New York City.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Salt Lake City 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in the Delta Center in Salt Lake City, UT.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - San Francisco 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in the Chase Center in San Francisco, CA.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Dallas 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in the American Airlines Center in Dallas, TX.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: The team visits a Charlotte organization that teaches kids literacy with the help of soccer. Wham visits his hometown of Stone Mountain, GA to reconnect with family, friends, and his favorite childhood teacher. Coach Lou teaches Thunder some Spanish before a tour stop in Mexico and later assists Coach Handles in helping the players cultivate their skills at the annual Showman's camp in Atlanta.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Global Heart Warming
programme.desc: Jet brings Cheese, Hotshot, and Hops to a Los Angeles shelter to cook for their residents. Torch revisits her past and shows love to the family that raised her. Plus, Thunder reunites with a very special fan.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Art of the Game
programme.desc: TNT spends time with family in her adopted hometown of Charlotte, NC; Hot Shot takes Wham to an aquarium in Kentucky that preserves aquatic wildlife. Coaches Lou and Handles help players cultivate their skills at the annual Showman’s camp in Atlanta.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Ballerinas, Dancers, And... Globetrotters?
programme.desc: The Globetrotters head to Jet's hometown to support him where he's being honored, enlighten high schoolers on the values of entrepreneurship, crash a kids' dance class to learn about Cuban ballet and visit Iceland's Blue Lagoon.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Art in the Jet
programme.desc: The Globetrotters join a special program that is revitalizing inner city basketball courts. Cheese gets a galactic lesson on what it takes to prepare food for zero gravity. Jet comes in for a landing in his hometown of Elizabeth, New Jersey, where he gives back at a youth basketball camp. And Wham breaks the world record for most between-the-leg dribbles in one minute. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - New Teammates
programme.desc: Coach Lou joins Hammer, Bulldog, and the team to learn about the history and legacy of the Harlem Globetrotters from their humble beginnings in Chicago. Tryouts for new Globetrotter Team Members are underway and the Globetrotters remember some of their favorite places from around the world. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Welcome Home
programme.desc: The Globetrotters help a deserving family win a brand new home. Cheese and TNT empower inner-city youth who are fighting back against violence. The Globetrotters pay tribute to their legendary teammate Meadowlark Lemon. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Community Compassion
programme.desc: Torch and Cheese learn about the importance of mentorship for teens in the tech industry. Wham, Bulldog, and Hotshot fulfill a major need for a south central Los Angeles after-school program. Bulldog, Jet, and Hotshot learn about the value of financial literacy while discovering the game of golf. Cheese heads home to the Bronx to revisit his roots.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Classic Precision
programme.desc: Coach Lou and the players help create green space in Southside Chicago.; Torch and Cheese learn about the importance of mentorship for teens in the tech industry.; Wham and Bulldog uplift a group looking to make a fresh start.; Thunder throwbacks to his trick shot gauntlet at an abandoned warehouse.; Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Minneapolis 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in the Target Center in Minneapolis, MN.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Fayetteville 2024
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in the Bud Walton Arena at the University of Arkansas in Fayetteville, AR.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Gone Skydiving
programme.desc: Hammer takes his slam dunk to new heights with a sky-high trick shot. Wham and TNT pay homage to the legendary Globetrotter Coach "Sweet Lou" Dunbar. Coach Lou, Jet, Bulldog, and Hot Shot meet some champion little leaguers in Washington D.C. where they play a twist on a classic game. And the Globetrotters head to the great outdoors for a fishing excursion. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Washington D.C.
programme.desc: The team travels to the Nation's Capital where Bulldog, Jet, and Hotshot learn about the value of financial literacy while discovering the game of golf. Also, Cheese, Bulldog, Hot Shot, and Jet meet with local D.C. youth to support their mission for clean water and self-reliance. The team plays a classic playground game with some champion little leaguers. And Spelling Bee champion and basketball star, Zaila Avant Garde, meets with Coach Lou for a lesson in the Globetrotters' innovative trick shots.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Green Bay 2023
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in The Resch Center in Ashwaubenon, WI.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Hope Floats
programme.desc: Torch and Bulldog learn the benefits of Equine therapy at "Shining Hope Farms." Hammer, Torch, Bulldog and Ace travel to Chicago to learn about two organizations that teach diversity in the sport of sailing. Hotshot and Cheese hit the court in LA to challenge some locals to a pickup game.

programme.title: Harlem Globetrotters World Tour - Milwaukee 2023
programme.desc: All the dunks, alley-oops, looooong shots, magic, history and laughs from the world-famous Harlem Globetrotters. This game was played in Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee, WI.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Hometown Roots
programme.desc: Wham invites his elementary school teacher and her class on a field trip to a wildlife sanctuary in Georgia. Hammer invites Zeus to his adopted hometown of Tampa to enlighten high schoolers on the values of entrepreneurship. Hotshot and Cheese travel to Jet's hometown to support him while he's being honored. And TNT spends quality time with family in her adopted hometown of Charlotte, NC.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Need for Speed
programme.desc: The Globetrotters twist into formation as they learn the historic tradition of Cuban Ballet in Miami. The team then meets the first professional female pit mechanic of color at a racing school before being invited to see her in action at a race in Indianapolis.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Honorable Adventures
programme.desc: The team highlights their greatest showmen. The Harlem Globetrotters perform for servicemen and their families during a visit to Moody Air Force Base. Plus, Hammer surprises viral sensation Zeke "The Trick Shot Kid." Cheese, Wham, Hammer, and Hotshot learn about some amazing animals at a theme park in Georgia.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Cooking with STEAM
programme.desc: Hammer, Hotshot, Torch, and Coach Lou visit a youth football league in South LA to learn how the coaches are inspiring the community. TNT, Cheese, and Hotshot visit an organization that teaches kids the values of Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math. Torch travels to Malaysia with Scooter to connect with some special locals. Plus, Jet brings Cheese, Hotshot, and Hops to an LA Shelter to cook for their residents.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Handles with Care
programme.desc: Thunder and crew head to Iceland where they experience the famous Blue Lagoon. Torch revisits her past and shows love to the family that raised her. The team visits a center in Los Angeles started by the family of a renowned TV actor that caters to the needs of children on the spectrum.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Race For Inclusion
programme.desc: The Globetrotters learn about an organization that builds playgrounds for kids of all abilities; how a NASCAR racing school is driving for diversity in the sport; meeting one of the NASCAR pit mechanics.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Old School
programme.desc: The team dazzles in Santo Domingo.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Gifted Givers
programme.desc: TNT, Cheese, and Hotshot visit an organization that teaches kids the values of Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math. Hammer tours his adopted hometown of Tampa where he connects with Coach Handles and mentors young athletes. Cheese, Wham, Hammer, and Hotshot learn about some amazing animals at a theme park in Georgia. Plus Coach Lou helps Thunder brush up on his Spanish before heading on tour to Mexico.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Trick Shots & Tea Parties
programme.desc: Wham, Cheese and Hammer learn about the construction industry; Torch, Hammer, and Hot Shot head to Broward, Florida, to meet The Embrace Girls Foundation; a nonprofit encouraging at-risk girls and uplifting tea parties.; Thunder throwback to his trick shot gauntlet at an abandoned warehouse.; Torch, Hammer, Wham, and Hot Shot take an unforgettable journey to Australia. Hosted by Craig Robinson.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Urban Farming
programme.desc: A young man's life is changed forever when he overcomes bullying with the encouragement from the team. Wham and Hammer venture off the court and on to the farm to learn valuable skills in food cultivation and healthy living. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer get a history lesson from Coach Lou when he puts a twist on a classic playground game of, Knockout.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Knocked Out
programme.desc: Spelling Bee champion and basketball star, Zaila Avant Garde, meets with Coach Lou and receives a lesson in the Globetrotters' innovative trick shots. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer learn about cooking nutritious meals through a healthy competition. Hammer and Torch explore their entrepreneurial passions as they are encouraged by an Atlanta gelato company. TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer get a history lesson from Coach Lou when he puts a twist on a classic playground game of, Knockout.

programme.title: Play It Forward - From Bullied to Brave
programme.desc: Globetrotters TNT, Torch, Wham, and Hammer shed light on the "Art in the Paint" initiative, which helps create artful basketball courts in communities that need them the most. Cheese, Bulldog, Hot Shot, and Jet meet with local D.C. youth to support their mission for clean water and self-reliance.; A young man's life is changed forever when he overcomes bullying with the encouragement from the team. And Hammer takes his slam dunk to new heights with his skydive trick shot.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Slammin' Street Ball
programme.desc: The Globetrotters learn the benefits of verse with "Street Poets." The team tells their history of being goodwill ambassadors. Plus, they surprise coach and mentor Chris "Handles" Franklin by honoring him at his community event in Harrisburg, PA.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Charity Starts at Home
programme.desc: The Globetrotters visit Bulldog's hometown of Corpus Christi to challenge Little Brothers and Little Sisters to an unforgettable game of basketball and the team trade in their sneaks for cleats.

programme.title: Play It Forward - Scoring Points for the Community
programme.desc: Cheese and Wham learn about kids on the spectrum at The Ed Asner Family Center; the team surprises coach and mentor Chris "Handles" Franklin by honoring him at his community.

programme.title: Play It Forward - The Ambassadors of Goodwill
programme.desc: Cheese and TNT empower inner-city youth who are fighting back against violence. Hammer, Cheese, and TNT trade in the wood-grain for the ice rink in Chicago. Globetrotter Max 'Hops' Pearce unveils his unique artwork. Bulldog, Wham, and TNT join a group of wounded veterans for an extraordinary encounter with whale sharks in Atlanta.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - COLLISION 8
programme.desc: Headlined by a high-stakes trilogy clash between Antonio Plazibat and longtime rival Nordine Mahieddine. Knockout artist Errol Zimmerman takes on former Australian strongman Alex Simon. Also, two explosive four-man, one-night tournaments in the welterweight and light heavyweight divisions—guaranteeing nonstop drama, finishes, and rising contenders.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 108: Last FW Standing Finals
programme.desc: What began with twenty-four of the world’s top featherweights is now down to the final four as they battle in a one-night tournament to crown the Last Featherweight Standing.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - COLLISION 8
programme.desc: Headlined by a high-stakes trilogy clash between Antonio Plazibat and longtime rival Nordine Mahieddine. Knockout artist Errol Zimmerman takes on former Australian strongman Alex Simon. Also, two explosive four-man, one-night tournaments in the welterweight and light heavyweight divisions—guaranteeing nonstop drama, finishes, and rising contenders.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 108: Last FW Standing Finals
programme.desc: What began with twenty-four of the world’s top featherweights is now down to the final four as they battle in a one-night tournament to crown the Last Featherweight Standing.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - COLLISION 8
programme.desc: Headlined by a high-stakes trilogy clash between Antonio Plazibat and longtime rival Nordine Mahieddine. Knockout artist Errol Zimmerman takes on former Australian strongman Alex Simon. Also, two explosive four-man, one-night tournaments in the welterweight and light heavyweight divisions—guaranteeing nonstop drama, finishes, and rising contenders.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 105: Last Heavyweight Standing Finals
programme.desc: In the quarter finals, Belgian Moroccan Anis Bouzid (48-4, 37 KO) takes on kickboxing legend Errol Zimmerman (112-20-1, 45 KO), Serbian sensation Milos Cvjeticanin (17-5, 10 KO) meets number one French heavyweight Sofian Laidouni (42-5-1, 20 KO), monstrous Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (29-4-1, 16 KO) clashes with ‘The Soldier’ Nidal Bchiri (20-5-1, 5 KO), and ‘The Black Ghost’ Mory Kromah (35-3-1, 21 KO) collides with outspoken rival Michael ‘Timebomb’ Boapeah (23-5-1, 29 KO). Only one fighter can come out on top and walk away as the new ‘King of Kickboxing’. Elsewhere, the always exciting Bahram Rajabzadeh (72-6, 64 KO) goes up against ‘The Gladiator’ Cristian Ristea (44-27, 13 KO), Hamicha (42-2, 31 KO) puts his undefeated GLORY record on the line against late replacement Brice Kombou (20-6, 5 KO), and featherweights Andre Santos (23-2, 10 KO) and Deniz Demirkapu (15-5, 10 KO) will kick-off the main card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 108: Last FW Standing Finals
programme.desc: What began with twenty-four of the world’s top featherweights is now down to the final four as they battle in a one-night tournament to crown the Last Featherweight Standing.

Elsewhere, the always exciting Bahram Rajabzadeh (72-6, 64 KO) goes up against ‘The Gladiator’ Cristian Ristea (44-27, 13 KO), Hamicha (42-2, 31 KO) puts his undefeated GLORY record on the line against late replacement Brice Kombou (20-6, 5 KO), and featherweights Andre Santos (23-2, 10 KO) and Deniz Demirkapu (15-5, 10 KO) will kick-off the main card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 106: Last FW Standing Quarter Finals
programme.desc: GLORY featherweight world champion Petch (175-40-3, 27 KO) will rematch KO artist Abraham Vidales (18-4, 14 KO) and Portuguese sensation Miguel Trindade (64-8, 26 KO) will look to avenge his 2023 loss to the always entertaining Berjan Peposhi (32-6, 16 KO). Former GLORY title contender & leading Japanese fighter Kento Haraguchi (28-6-1, 18 KO) will go up against talented newcomer Hiroki Kasahara (39-8, 17 KO) while popular South Korean veteran Sung-hyun Lee (71-13-2, 17 KO) takes on top young prospect Yura Kono (17-1, 9 KO). In addition, the seven-fight card will be headlined by Shiro Matsumoto (55-17-4, 19 KO) defending his RISE bantamweight title against Koki Osaki (38-6-1, 21 KO). In the co-main event, budding superstar Ryujin Nasukawa (17-2, 8 KO) and heavy-hitter Kaito Hasegawa (17-2, 13 KO) battle for the vacant RISE super flyweight championship.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 107 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY welterweight world champion Chico Kwasi (45-6-2, 23 KO) will step up in weight to challenge GLORY middleweight world champion Donovan Wisse (23-1, 10 KO) in the main event of GLORY 107. In the co-main event, giants Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (30-5-1, 17 KO) and Nico ‘Big Sexy’ Horta (26-11, 4 KO) will square off in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 108: Last FW Standing Finals

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - COLLISION 9
programme.desc: GLORY heavyweight world champion Mory Kromah (37-3-1, 21 KO) defends his title against Serbian sensation Milos Cvjeticanin (19-5, 10 KO), Croatian superstar Antonio Plazibat (23-5, 16 KO) faces Belgian Moroccan Anis Bouzid (49-5, 37 KO) and the GLORY light heavyweight grand prix plays out in full, deciding the next GLORY light heavyweight world champion.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 103 Rotterdam LHS
programme.desc: GLORY 103: Last Heavyweight Standing main event features Levi Rigters (19-3, 9 KO) colliding with Jamal Ben Saddik (38-10, 29 KO) to see who moves on in the tournament. Among the other names taking part in Phase Two are Nabil Khachab (29-6-1, 4 KO), Iancu Ionut (31-11, 13 KO), Rade Opacic (21-7, 16 KO), Milos Cvjeticanin (13-4, 9 KO), Sofian Laidouni (39-5-1, 20 KO), and many more. In addition, Chico Kwasi (44-5-2, 23 KO) will defend his GLORY welterweight world title against Mehdi Ait El Hadj (35-4-2, 8 KO), Mory Kromah (34-3-1, 20 KO) returns and takes on Cristian Ristea (44-26, 13 KO) in a heavyweight match-up outside the tournament, and Tayfun Ozcan (88-11-3, 28 KO) clashes with rival Don Sno (6-2, 3 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing - GLORY 104 Rotterdam
programme.desc: Former Light Heavyweight Champion Tarik Khbabez (52-12-1, 22 KO) and Bahram Rajabzabeh (72-5, 63 KO) collide in a huge showdown for the vacant Light Heavyweight title. The penultimate round of the Last Heavyweight Standing tournament resumes with eight heavyweights competing in two separate four-man one-night tournaments. Notable participants include Levi Rigters (20-3, 10 KO), Nabil Khachab (30-6-1, 4 KO), Rade Opacic (22-7, 17 KO) and Milos Cvjeticanin (14-4, 9 KO).

programme.title: Generation Speed: Road to MotoGP
programme.desc: The final round of the MotoAmerica season arrives at New Jersey Motorsports Park with the championship already decided—but the story is far from over. After clinching the title at COTA, Alessandro Di Mario enters the weekend with a new mindset, shifting his focus toward the next step on the road to MotoGP. With the pressure off the championship favorite, the door opens for fresh faces to seize their moment and chase a first-ever podium on one of the season’s biggest stages.

programme.title: MotoAmerica: Supersport
programme.desc: Sunday's Supersport race at Road Atlanta features a new lap record and tight championship intrigue at the front, as the top two riders from race one go head-to-head again. Herrin looks to reverse his Saturday fortunes while Kayla Yaakov, the trailblazing polesitter from race one, aims to convert pace into a stronger result.

programme.title: MotoAmerica: QuadLock Superbike
programme.desc: Sunday's Superbike finale at Road Atlanta sees the championship picture take shape, as a close two-way battle at the front goes down to the wire over 17 laps. Beaubier continues his charge from deep in the field, and the podium finishes set the early tone for what promises to be a competitive season.

programme.title: Fighting Spirit Wrestling
programme.desc: FSW is our own production with a similar structure to Fighting Spirit MMA. We carefully select the best matches from top Japanese and Mexican promotions. Fighting Spirit Wrestling is the perfect blend of flashiness, wrestling, and entertainment. The Mexican Lucha Libre and the Japanese Puroresu styles display plenty of high-flying maneuvers, breath-taking moves, and unbelievable acrobatic sequences that will surely get any audience up on their feet!
