With just days until the race - Dale is secretly struggling to get the bike he beat Matt with last year up and working. Matt struggles just to locate a 100-year old bike. Matt's prayers are answered thanks to an old Catholic Priest he located who has possession of a bike. The priest might let Matt have the bike to race - but there are conditions. The toughest one: Don't tell Dale you have it. Can Matt afford to buy the bike and get it running in time for the race without Dale seeing it? Will Dale even get his broken bike started? And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Biker Lore
programme.desc: Built in the mid-60’s by eccentric engineer “Wild Bill” Gelbke, the Road Dog was, and still is, the largest motorcycle ever built. It utilized aircraft tubing, Corvette disc brakes, and a Chevy truck differential to keep it stable. The one-off creation disappeared when Gelbke did in 1978. Outflanked once when the bike was spotted and sold to a private collector in 1995, Dale has vowed to locate the machine and make Wheels Through Time its final resting place.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Vegas Payday
programme.desc: Big Time Motorcycle Auction

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Second Time's a Charm
programme.desc: The RM Auction Company has worked with Dale before as a buyer, seller, historian, and caretaker at the prestigious Lee Hartung auction. But this event is no last minute rush to define one man’s treasures. This is a well calculated, time consuming, multi-media, and multi motorcycle and prized art deal.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Wounded Warrior Project
programme.desc: Home Depot Senior Vice President, Gordon Erickson, is a huge fan of Wheels Through Time. He is also a huge supporter of the Wounded Warrior program. For years the hardware giant has been donating goods and services to help returning servicemen with their fix-it-up projects. Now they would like to go one step further and build a WWII military bike to raise awareness and funds. Only problem is where to get one? Enter Dale and an exhaustive, time sensitive, cross country search for a rare military machine.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Orphan Bikes
programme.desc: Promoters of the prestigious Amelia Island Concours have called on Dale to develop a show and field bikes for an “Orphan Bike” show. They have defined orphan bike as extremely rare, that aren't a Harley nor Indian machines.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Time is Not On Their Side
programme.desc: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of What’s in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase “Ride a Winner” are high on this father and son’s list of “must haves”. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timer’s cars, bikes, and automobiles.

programme.title: Rutter's Detailin Garage - Detailing a Motorcoach
programme.desc: Nick Rutter provides valuable tips and techniques for how to detail various aspects of a motorcoach, including wheels and tires, granite care, proper leather care, as well as glass cleaning.

programme.title: Rutter's Detailin Garage - How To Wash Car
programme.desc: Nick Rutter showcases the products and process to properly wash your vehicle, from start to finish, starting with the wheels and tires and finishing with cleaning door jambs.

programme.title: Truck U - Construction Work Truck
programme.desc: You’ve Seen Matt and Bruno’s skills in the garage; now check out their skills on the job site. We’ll take one worker’s truck and make the repairs by quitting time.

programme.title: Truck U - Time for Toys
programme.desc: Time to get the toys out of the garage. The weather has changed, and we want to make sure our RV, boat, and UTV are ready to roll.

programme.title: Truck U - Blazer TLC
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno go to work on a 1986 Blazer that needs some TLC.

programme.title: Truck U - Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Any shop can misdiagnose a problem. All that means is more trips back to the shop for you. Today Bruno and Matt take a look at some of the most commonly misdiagnosed problems and help you fix them for good.

programme.title: Truck U - Tundra Look-Alike
programme.desc: Matt and Bruno bring in a pair of Toyota Tundra’s. The only problem, what truck gets what parts? Let the competition begin.

programme.title: Truck U - Ford EcoBoost
programme.desc: Its our first look at the Ford EcoBoost V6 engine, and we don’t leave anything stock. We’ll keep the more efficient engine and add some power today on Truck U.

programme.title: Truck U - Federated Work Truck
programme.desc: Why build a regular work truck, when you can build the Ultimate Work Truck. Our challenge today is to take a stock 2013 Silverado and outfit it from head to toe, and when we’re done, we’re giving it away.

programme.title: Truck U - TruckUbicon
programme.desc: We start with a 2012 stock Jeep JK and build it up to get ready to go off-road only at the massive Jeep Beach Event at Daytona International speedway.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - SMOKEY
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Smokey Yunick, the most innovative mechanic in NASCAR history, sold his famous truck that hauled equipment & cars across the country. Ray is on a mission to uncover this storied truck that helped launch the beginning of NASCAR’s cross-country popularity.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - VANDERBILT
programme.desc: Ray travels to Long Island, New York with the hopes of learning more about America’s first major auto racing competition. The race, which began at the turn of the 20th century, helped develop the first major American racing stars and drove American manufacturing to competitive standard with the highly progressive Europeans.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - RAYS ROOTS
programme.desc: Fred Dmuchowski is a New Jersey racing icon. He was a regular workingman who raced on weekends for fun and became a legend in his iconic 303 racer. Ray works to rebuild the 303 in homage to Fred who inspired him to pursue his career in motorsports.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - THE CORVETTE
programme.desc: For Rick Hendrick, the Corvette inspired his first car purchase, which ultimately led to the creation of his car dealership empire and motorsports teams. Mr. H, as he goes by, gives us a rare look inside of his personal Corvette collection and takes us to General Motors World Headquarters to talk with GM Vice President of Global Design, Ed Welburn, about how this iconic car came about. Country superstar Brad Paisley makes a cameo appearance to talk about his prized ‘Vette and the influence of cars on his music.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - ELVIS VAULT
programme.desc: The last car Elvis drove the evening he passed was his beloved Stutz Blackhawk. Ray discovers that the car has been preserved and heads to Graceland to check out this iconic piece of American music history. Ray and the team reveal the impeccable preservation of the car at Charlotte Motor Speedway with Rick Hendrick (“Mr. H”) and, arguably Elvis Presley’s biggest fan, Dale Earnhardt Jr. While at Graceland, Ray and the team also get an exclusive look at the paneled station wagon Elvis used to get in and out of Graceland in disguise. It’s an intimate look at the King’s incredible automobiles and their secrets that only Elvis knew.

programme.title: AmeriCarna - BAND OF BROTHERS
programme.desc: This episode takes an inside look at the famous racing L88 Corvette. From its history, to its successes and heartbreaks, to the stories of the men that drove it. Now, it’s a car world’s version of the Flinstones meet the Jetsons, as the Owens Corning Corvette, which clinched 22 straight race victories, challenges the new Corvette C7-R at Sebring International Raceway. The original Owens Corning team reunites for the challenge and our crew goes behind the scenes for the Corvette test drive of a lifetime.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Kenny Rogers' Family Values
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane is back at the beach on Jekyll Island with a focus on cars and families. Fathers & sons, with their barn-find Pilot House trucks and Plymouth Satellites, call cars the glue that keeps them bonded together with C&O being the best place to show them off.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - SEMA: Inside Fuller's Head
programme.desc: On this edition of Caffeine & Octane, we’ll go inside the head of Master Builder Bryan Fuller at the SEMA car show, the largest annual trade show in the country; SEMA always brings out the best in the automotive industry. From a jaw dropping Javelin to a multimillion-dollar Pagani, Brian will prove to you, what happens in Vegas, doesn’t always stay in Vegas! Ryan Hardwick guest hosts and ventures deep into the C&O lots to find his favorite ride of the day.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Motor Masters
programme.desc: Take apart and assemble a motor in less than 30 minutes? Sure, NASCAR pit crews can make the claim, but can a rag tag group of kids with names like Jelly Donut, Butter Bean, and Wonder Woman claim the pit fame? Host Rickey Gadson heads to the Sims Academy to settle a bet. This ultra fast half-hour edition of Caffeine & Octane also includes a builder’s take on an Ultra Four Unlimited Off-Road Racer; Ryan Hardwick joins the gang at Caffeine and Octane.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Viva Cuba!
programme.desc: Demetrio Montalvo likes American music, American food, and especially American cars. Only one problem - Demetrio lives in Cuba. A Visa, bestowed to him from some American friends in high places, lets him travel to the States to search for tough to find automotive parts and attend his favorite car show. Showing up to Caffeine & Octane in a cool caddy is the easy part. Picking parts to take back home presents a unique set of challenges for the Cuban car builder; Formula Drift racer Federico Sceriffo brings the first ever Formula Drift Ferrari to C&O.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Magnus Walker's Secret Porsche Collection
programme.desc: Porsche collector, customizer, and Urban Outlaw, Magnus Walker is a world-wide rock star to fans of the German car company. So, when Caffeine & Octane producers invited him to travel cross country to tell the story of a hidden Porsche collection tangled in a North Georgia Vineyard, they were surprised when he signed on. No sour grapes here, what Walker found at the Wolf Mountain Winery will impress even those with the most refined palette for Porsches.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Chipper Jones' International Car Show
programme.desc: A Hall of Famer?s search for an Exotic Car that fits; a blind man?s ?touchy feely? approach to seeing great cars.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Fuller's "2029" Majestic Build
programme.desc: Back to the future with a Majestic build from Fuller Moto that showcases 3-D printed parts, an electric motor, and hub-centric steering.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - The Fastest Man on Two Wheels
programme.desc: Horsepower and million-dollar sticker shock, from two and four wheels, dominate this edition of C & O.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP
programme.desc: A need for speed in a Sleepy Georgia town has engineers pushing the boundaries to exceed 3000 horsepower.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Turn of the Century Cars
programme.desc: Turn of the century cars?with wooden wheels?at 85mph?oh my!

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Hot Wheel's & an Urban Outlaw
programme.desc: Urban Outlaw and designer Magnus Walker weighs in on his beloved Porsche and the legend of Hot Wheels.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
programme.desc: Tracing the origins and solving the mystery of a controversial all-aluminum bodied 512 BBI Boxer Ferrari.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Twin City Turbos
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane goes Turbo in the Twin Cities; Ferrari Drifter Federico Sceriffo finds a home in Atlanta.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - 470MPH with Custom King George Poteet
programme.desc: Jaguar F-Type Project 7 crosses the Pond.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - Art & Oddities at Old Car City, USA
programme.desc: Mustang Mayhem at the big show.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane - The Unsung Hero in the Movie Ford v. Ferrari
programme.desc: Red carpet receptions for a Koenigsegg Regera.

programme.title: What's In the Barn? - Hidden Hillclimbers
programme.desc: A cross-country race to lay claim to some of the world’s most sought after works specials.

programme.desc: Follow Roger Holder and his twin-turbo 68 Nova as he competes in Pro275 at Lights Out 12.

programme.desc: Short Track Super Series charges into Hagerstown Speedway for Big Block Modified dirt action.

programme.title: Legends of Racing
programme.desc: AJ Foyt’s story from Texas tracks to global racing greatness.

programme.title: NASCAR Modified Tour
programme.desc: The NASCAR Modified Tour hits the pavement at New Smyrna Speedway for open-wheel action.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: We present the most affordable hybrid cars. The pioneers are the Japanese, who have a huge selection of these car models on offer.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: We take a little journey back in time and trace the development of the modern car and show the ten oldest car companies.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: We present ten cars that have achieved cult status and are still adored by numerous fan clubs.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: Sometimes you really have to question the taste of car designers. We take a look at ten of the ugliest cars.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: They say beauty is in the eye of the beholder. We promise to remain objective when we present the most beautiful cars.

programme.title: Top10 Show
programme.desc: Car manufacturers regularly create special works of art that are limited, exclusive and therefore expensive. In this episode we show the rarest car models.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Jaguar company founder Sir William Lyons built his first automobile in 1931. Only a few years later, the Jaguar SS 100 appeared, a sports car that was superior to all others. Since then, every Jaguar has fascinated with its power, dynamics and elegance.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: From the very beginning, Jaguar's sports and racing cars have been tailor-made for top speeds. Whether Le Mans, Daytona or the Monte Carlo Rally, Jaguar dominated and shaped international motorsport for many years.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The history of Volkswagen begins in 1936 with the Beetle. The iconic small car becomes a propaganda object, a million-seller and a film star. But Volkswagen was almost too late in building a modern successor, and the company went into crisis. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: At the beginning of the 1970s, Volkswagen is in crisis. The company has no answer to the oil crisis and no successor to the Beetle. It was only with the new generation Passat and Golf cars that Volkswagen returned to the fast lane. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Whether with their rocket vehicles or their Ascona or Calibra car models, racing has been closely associated with the Opel brand for over 100 years. Just two years after the start of car production, the first Opel won a race in 1901.

programme.title: Historic Formula V
programme.desc: In the late fifties in America, the first Formula V racers were produced. The goal: Affordable motor sport for everyone. The small, open wheel cars were seen on the race tracks until the end of the 70s. Then the series was stopped. About 20 years ago a couple of Formula V owners came together and established the "Historic Formula V Europe" as an association.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 1 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 2 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 3 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 4 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Lake Faaker is both a popular holiday spot in Austria and also a place with a special tradition. In early September, the region is the destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate their big annual event, the European Bike Week. (Part 5 of 5)

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: We took a look at three very different Harley-Davidson models. The versatile Switchback Dyna, the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, and the bad-boy motorcycle Softail Slim.

programme.title: KTM 990 Adventure
programme.desc: It's very big and mostly comes in orange: the KTM 990 Adventure. Over rough terrain it's often driven standing up. Today, the 990 is considered the off-road specialist among travel Enduros.

programme.title: Facel Vega Facellia
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, the Facel Vega Facellia was designed to compete with Porsche and Alfa Romeo and open a new market segment for the fledgling French luxury car company.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: We test drove the Rallye Defender and examined how a Jeep Wrangler with only few modifications can double in price. Also: how does the Fiat Panda 4x4 fare in Iceland? Also: Land Rover's Bowler Defender and Volvo's 6-wheeler, the Laplander.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: We spent a day in snowy Austria with rally professional Niki Schelle in a Suzuki SX4 S-Cross. Also: why is the Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution perfect for drifting? And: Mercedes and Chrysler present their all-wheel concept cars.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: We show how to have a lot of fun on gravel roads in a Subaru WRX STI. Also: in the 1990s, Ford had a successful go at rally competitions with the Ford Escort RS Cosworth. And: the Volkswagen Polo WRC shows its 4x4 skills.

programme.title: Arabella Classics
programme.desc: Rare Automobiles and stunning views! The Arabella Classics, one of the most exclusive Classic Car Rallies in Europe.

programme.title: Porsche Ruf RT35
programme.desc: Ruf RT35 may look like a Porsche, but it really isn't. Since 1981, the Ruf company in Pfaffhausen, Germany, has been recognized as an independent manufacturer. But the basis for its vehicles comes exclusively from Porsche. A Ruf is even faster and more exclusive than a comparable Porsche.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Bentley New Flying Spur and the Rolls Royce Wraith are both an extremely exclusive breed of cars. These luxurious power packs make for an almost transcendental driving experience and deliver the perfect combination of elegance and performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: There are names that sound like music in car enthusiasts' ears: the Mc Laren MP4 12C, the Porsche 911 Turbo S and the Mercedes SLS AMG GT are super sports cars that are second to none. We put the pedal to the metal in these exciting and powerful driving machines.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: 1,000 kilometers on the famous Nurburgring. It's the final race of the 2013 season. The Blancpain Endurance Series is a racing event for grand tourers like the Ferrari 458 Italia, the McLaren MP4-12 C or the Nissan GT-R Nismo GT3. We took a look at all the action, the drivers, their cars and the competition.

programme.title: Mercedes 300 SL Lightweight
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built! We accompanied the Mercedes 300 SL 'lightweight' on its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The Nürburgring is the place where you can really let your hair down on a spectacular and difficult race track and learn how to get fit for motor sports. This is the reason why motoring enthusiasts go there throughout the year.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: We prepared some very entertaining clips from the Nürburgring for you. Expect to see the pedal on the metal and rubber burning.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: When the weather cleared up a bit at the Nürburgring, we were finally back at the track. As soon as the snow and ice were gone the horsepower junkies returned to the ring to once again let their engines roar.

programme.title: Artega GT
programme.desc: From 2006 to 2012 the German company Artega produced their GT sports car model. Thanks to the know-how of a former Porsche and BMW manager the Artega GT was able to be manufactured in a small series.

programme.title: Ferrari California T
programme.desc: The Ferrari California T has a lot of Italian passion and elegant lines to offer. Super sports car cabriolets are popular all over the world. It is no wonder that more and more manufacturers are 'opening up'.

programme.title: Chevrolet Caprice 9C1 police car
programme.desc: This 1994 Chevrolet Caprice 9C1 is a former police car from the Los Angeles Police Department. Its curvaceous body was often mocked as looking like a whale, but this Chevy Caprice possesses the qualities of a shark.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Camping vans become increasingly popular - even more popular than SUVs. Volkswagen want to get their share with the Grand California. We test the Grand California during a wildlife trip on the island of Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: After the debut of the Citroën DS, there has been no other premium car from France, even though the country is known for savoir vivre and luxury. The DS7 Crossback now presents itself as a premium SUV. We tested the car in three different categories.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: AMG dares to take on the Mercedes-Benz A-Class and creates a true racing machine with the A 45 S. Also: the Q3 Sportback, Audi's coupé SUV, in the test. And: can the Kia XCeed convince in comparison to the competition?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: How does the DS7 perform after six months in service? Also: can the DS7 Crossback convince a die-hard classic car fan? And: which Volvo S60 can do more? The T4 with petrol engine or the T8 Hybrid?

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Opel freshens up the Insignia, giving it a new engine and new headlights. In addition, Volkswagen presents the T6.1 before the launch of the T7. And: can the Nissan Juke convince with its new design?

programme.title: Glemseck 101
programme.desc: Once a year, the European custom bike scene meets in Leonberg near Stuttgart. Fans of Café racers, classic motorcycles and nostalgia meet at the Glemseck 101, the biggest event for bike enthusiasts and bikers in Europe.

programme.title: Mercedes E-Coupe
programme.desc: Two doors have been stolen from the Mercedes E-class. Nevertheless, the E coupe has become more expensive. How is this justified?

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The G-Power M5 Hurricane RS Touring is one of the fastest station wagons in the world. Also: the Artega GT. And: the Austin FX4.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The company Mechatronik is dedicated to the restoration and refinement of Mercedes-Benz classics. Also: the Nissan 370 Z takes on Porsche Cayman & Co. And: the Chevrolet Camaro and the Mercedes-AMG ML 63.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The MF5 GT, the powerhouse from Wiesmann. What's more: if you're looking for exclusivity and find even the performance of a Mercedes-AMG too low, you've come to the right place. The Brabus company is one of the most famous tuners in the world.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The International Motor Show in Geneva is the first important vehicle fair of the year. Of course, the top class refiners must not be missing. Also: the Mercedes-AMG SL 63. The sixth generation of the SL is more powerful than ever before.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The tuning forge MTM is known for its extremely dynamic, optimally tuned vehicles. What's more: the Nissan Juke-R is a projectile with the dimensions of a cigar box and 485 hp of power.

programme.title: Mercedes-AMG GT S Performmaster
programme.desc: Not far from Stuttgart is the home of the tuner Performmaster who specialize in the performance optimization of Mercedes-AMG models. They turned the already more-than-potent GT S sports car into a beast.

programme.title: Lancia Stratos HF
programme.desc: The Lancia Stratos with Ferrari power, the rally icon of the 1970s.

programme.title: Ken Block - Gymkhana Grid
programme.desc: Spectacular drifts are to be expected when Ken Block visits the Gymkhana Grid.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: We test drove the Rallye Defender and examined how a Jeep Wrangler with only few modifications can double in price. Also: how does the Fiat Panda 4x4 fare in Iceland? Also: Land Rover's Bowler Defender and Volvo's 6-wheeler, the Laplander.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: We spent a day in snowy Austria with rally professional Niki Schelle in a Suzuki SX4 S-Cross. Also: why is the Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution perfect for drifting? And: Mercedes and Chrysler present their all-wheel concept cars.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: We show how to have a lot of fun on gravel roads in a Subaru WRX STI. Also: in the 1990s, Ford had a successful go at rally competitions with the Ford Escort RS Cosworth. And: the Volkswagen Polo WRC shows its 4x4 skills.

programme.title: Arabella Classics
programme.desc: Rare Automobiles and stunning views! The Arabella Classics, one of the most exclusive Classic Car Rallies in Europe.

programme.title: Porsche Ruf RT35
programme.desc: Ruf RT35 may look like a Porsche, but it really isn't. Since 1981, the Ruf company in Pfaffhausen, Germany, has been recognized as an independent manufacturer. But the basis for its vehicles comes exclusively from Porsche. A Ruf is even faster and more exclusive than a comparable Porsche.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Bentley New Flying Spur and the Rolls Royce Wraith are both an extremely exclusive breed of cars. These luxurious power packs make for an almost transcendental driving experience and deliver the perfect combination of elegance and performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: There are names that sound like music in car enthusiasts' ears: the Mc Laren MP4 12C, the Porsche 911 Turbo S and the Mercedes SLS AMG GT are super sports cars that are second to none. We put the pedal to the metal in these exciting and powerful driving machines.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: 1,000 kilometers on the famous Nurburgring. It's the final race of the 2013 season. The Blancpain Endurance Series is a racing event for grand tourers like the Ferrari 458 Italia, the McLaren MP4-12 C or the Nissan GT-R Nismo GT3. We took a look at all the action, the drivers, their cars and the competition.

programme.title: Mercedes 300 SL Lightweight
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built! We accompanied the Mercedes 300 SL 'lightweight' on its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Bentley Bentayga
programme.desc: With the Bentley Bentayga, the traditional British brand is entering the fastest growing market segment. This world's first luxury SUV is a conglomerate of superlatives on wheels.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The Nürburgring is the place where you can really let your hair down on a spectacular and difficult race track and learn how to get fit for motor sports. This is the reason why motoring enthusiasts go there throughout the year.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: We prepared some very entertaining clips from the Nürburgring for you. Expect to see the pedal on the metal and rubber burning.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: When the weather cleared up a bit at the Nürburgring, we were finally back at the track. As soon as the snow and ice were gone the horsepower junkies returned to the ring to once again let their engines roar.

programme.title: Artega GT
programme.desc: From 2006 to 2012 the German company Artega produced their GT sports car model. Thanks to the know-how of a former Porsche and BMW manager the Artega GT was able to be manufactured in a small series.

programme.title: Ferrari California T
programme.desc: The Ferrari California T has a lot of Italian passion and elegant lines to offer. Super sports car cabriolets are popular all over the world. It is no wonder that more and more manufacturers are 'opening up'.

programme.title: Chevrolet Caprice 9C1 police car
programme.desc: This 1994 Chevrolet Caprice 9C1 is a former police car from the Los Angeles Police Department. Its curvaceous body was often mocked as looking like a whale, but this Chevy Caprice possesses the qualities of a shark.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The Indy 500 is one of the most spectacular racing events in the world. More than 400.000 spectators watch this mixture of show and motorsports competition at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway each year. We take a look back at the 1994 Indy 500.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Since its premiere in 1970 the Deutsche Rallye Meisterschaft has been one of the most popular motorsports series. In the 1983 competition Opel's Manta, Kadett and Ascona sports models celebrated exceptional successes.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: In 1985 Audi made their impressive mark in motorsports with the Quattro. With its 4x4 drive this model impressed the audience and shocked the competition alike and ushered in a new era in rally sports.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: After more than 20 years of abstinence Mercedes-Benz return to the Grand Prix circuit in 1954. With a lot of ambition, the company's advanced engineering and some of the best drivers in the world the Mercedes team aimed for the championship.

programme.title: Historic Formula V
programme.desc: In the late fifties in America, the first Formula V racers were produced. The goal: Affordable motor sport for everyone. The small, open wheel cars were seen on the race tracks until the end of the 70s. Then the series was stopped. About 20 years ago a couple of Formula V owners came together and established the "Historic Formula V Europe" as an association.

programme.title: Ken Block at the Monza Rallye Show
programme.desc: In Monza, Ken Block is set to compete against Allstars from motorsport at the Monza Rally Show.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: The search for the fastest, best looking and best sounding car continues. Once more car lovers from the Middle East bring their tuned vehicles to the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach and have it judged by Saif Hattawi. The winner receives a special treat for two people from the luxurious Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette try to win the competition.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: Put Your Car on TV gives every car owner the chance to bring their tuned machines to the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah beach. There, Saif Hattawi will assess each car based on speed, style and sound. The person with the most amazing car wins a one night stay at the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach for two people. A BMW X6M, a massive Ford F250 and a special Nissan Patrol try to win this prize.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: The Walk' at JBR, the most prestigious location in Dubai, sets the background for the fastest customized cars in the Middle East. Put Your Car on TV invites car owners to present their cars and have it judged. The owner of the fastest, most beautiful and best sounding car wins a special treat from Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. Among the competitors are a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: Once more, Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi are on the hunst for the most amazing cars in the world and ask car owners to bring their customized vehicles to Dubai, where it will be awarded points based on speed, style and sound. The car with the points wins a stay at the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach for two people. Among the presented cars are a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: On Put Your Car on TV people from the Middle East present their tuned vehicles. They are rewarded with points based on its styling, the highest (possible) speed ever driven und naturally also its sound. Whoever receives the most points, wins a luxurious treat from the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. This time, a Lexus GSF, a Ford Mustang and a McLaren MP4-12C are put on the spotlight.

programme.title: Mercedes-AMG GT S Performmaster
programme.desc: Not far from Stuttgart is the home of the tuner Performmaster who specialize in the performance optimization of Mercedes-AMG models. They turned the already more-than-potent GT S sports car into a beast.

programme.title: Beradino
programme.desc: A „bella macchina“, a beautiful car - but not designed by masters like Bertone or Pininfarina. Johannes Paulussen from Neuss in Germany built the Beradino by hand.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Winning the iconic Dakar Rally for a record 13 times, Frenchman Stéphane Peterhansel had a rather unusual career as he switched from motorbikes to cars and was enormously successful with both vehicles.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Alois Ruf is the founder of a small, but well-known car manufacturing company in Bavaria that specialises in building their own vision of street legal super sports cars on the foundation of Porsche bodys.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: From the 1950s to 1970s Hans Herrmann came to fame as a successful Formula 1 and sportscar driver for manufacturers like Porsche, Mercedes-Benz and Maserati who also won also the 24 Hours of Le Mans several times.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: People called her the "Queen of the Nordschleife" when she used to drive her Porsche or BMW racing cars at the Nürburgring's famous Nordschleife. Sabine Schmitz was a successful racing driver before she took a career turn by working as a TV presenter.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The new BMW One M Coupe from former race car driver Ralf Kelleners: the KS1 RS. Also: Toyota present their TS 030 hybrid at the 24-hours race of Le Mans. And: Subaru's XV crossover stands out from the company's model range.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The 'little' Mercedes-Benz S250 with a four-cylinder engine needs so little fuel that one could call this car a piggybank. Also: the power packages Nissan 370 Z and Wiesmann GT MF5. And: the ADAC Eco Test.

programme.title: Streetwise
programme.desc: The new Porsche Boxter, a real open-top sports car. Also: Volkswagen presents the new Passat Alltrack, a real allrounder. And: Fiat's successful Panda model in its third generation version.

programme.title: Mercedes Sprinter, 2018
programme.desc: The Mercedes Sprinter belongs to the class of commercial vehicles. The light transporter is the dream for every tradesman. The third generation Sprinter is sleeker, more modern and more variable than ever.

programme.title: Arden AJ23
programme.desc: A Jaguar that is able to terrify the world alone with its roar. This Jaguar F-Type R tuned by Arden is a real bad boy. Already in the series production configuration, the F-Type R Coupe is a dream car that can really bite but this Jaguar which has been upgraded from Arden, now calls itself "AJ23“ and is more powerful, louder and more aggressive than any of his brothers.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The sound of the McLaren 720S Spider is that of an uncompromising driving machine. Also: the F-Pace SVR makes a rather sophisticated impression. And: is the Porsche Cayenne coupe's higher price justifiable compared to the regular model?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How much power is there in the Limited Edition of the Seat Cupra Ateca? Also: are the Porsche 718 Boxster and the Cayman in the GTS version an alternative to the expensive 911? And: the exclusive preview of Audi's RS6 powerful station wagon.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Does the Skoda Enyaq Coupe RS iV live up to the famous "Rally Sport" abbreviation in its model designation as an e-car? And how does Mercedes-AMG manage without the brand's usual V8 sound in the EQE 53?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Two car brands turn their drive concepts upside down: for the first time since the 1980s, Maserati builds a mid-engine sports car. And Corvette's C8 with mid-engine instead of classic front-wheel drive redefines the American Dream.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We focus on premium-quality electric cars. The Mercedes EQS 450+ faces our test in the Swiss Alps. Plus: Is the Porsche Taycan Cross Turismo Turbo S the ultimate mobility all-purpose weapon? And: The Audi E-Tron GT from the same platform as the Taycan.

programme.title: Alpina B6
programme.desc: An Alpina is optically never intrusive. Understatement is the motto. One should not recognize at first glance, what potential is hidden under the bodywork. Huge spoilers are not used and neither are striking power domes. Any modifications serve the technical improvement, for example, optimized cooling and aerodynamics.

programme.title: Ford GT40
programme.desc: With their V8 cars, Ford showed that they were able to build race winners. The Ford GT40 was a prime example for that, especially in Le Mans.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Juliet gets behind the wheel of the eagerly awaited Lexus RZ. Lepas kicks off their local product onslaught with the L4 and Zee gets acquainted with Omoda’s new mid-range C7.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We assess a Nissan Qashqai to decide if repairs are worth it, revisit a high-mileage Fortuner for long-term ownership, and compare reliable 7-seater options.

programme.title: IGNITION Goes to SEMA
programme.desc: Get ready for more SEMA madness coming your way! From a modified bakkie to a Corvette sporting some DNA from both Pagani and Koenigsegg.

programme.title: Petrolheads
programme.desc: We check out some rides at project X at the meet and greet in Soshanguve. We chat to two of the youngest competitors at the Sasol Solar challenge. And we profile a gorgeous Audi A3.

programme.title: Bugatti Chiron
programme.desc: The successor to the Bugatti Veyron - the Chiron - is a mid-engined two-seated sports car developed and manufactured in Molsheim, France, by Bugatti Automobiles S.A.S. The car was based on the Bugatti Vision Gran Turismo concept car and is named after the Monegasque driver Louis Chiron.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: German convertibles like the the Porsche 911 Cabriolet or the Mercedes-AMG Roadster enjoy a worldwide reputation. They stand for perfection and reliability and are considered the embodiment of status and an expression of lifestyle and joy of life.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: British convertibles like the Jaguar F-Type, the Aston Martin V8 Vantage or the Bentley Continental are elegant and sportier than many other cars. They enjoy cult status all over the world. After all, fast open-top two-seaters were invented in the UK.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Design with stunning lines and proportions, unique engines and matchless Italian flair, sports convertibles like the Ferrari 488 Spyder, the Lamborghini Aventador Roadster or the Maserati Gran Cabrio deliver â€žgrande emozioneâ€œ.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: International luxury cabriolets by Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, Porsche and Maserati are the most exclusive cars in the world and offer more style, status and luxury than any other car.

programme.title: Dreamcars
programme.desc: Open-top two-seater sports cars, super sports cabriolets by Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Bentley and McLaren, are built for velocities exceeding 300 km/h and unparalleled driving pleasure.

programme.title: BMW 503
programme.desc: The noble four-seater 503 convertible was one of BMWs most exclusive models in the 1950s. Many international sports and movie stars and other wealthy customers were fond of this sporty luxury vehicle.

programme.title: Alfa Romeo 6C 2500SS
programme.desc: Founded in 1910, the iconic Italian car manufacturer Alfa Romeo experienced a very eventful history. Their 6C 2500 SS model is right in the middle of the company's more than 100-year history. It combined new technology with an early post-war appearance.

programme.title: Ignition GT
programme.desc: Juliet gets behind the wheel of the eagerly awaited Lexus RZ. Lepas kicks off their local product onslaught with the L4 and Zee gets acquainted with Omoda’s new mid-range C7.

programme.title: Buyer's Guide
programme.desc: We assess a Nissan Qashqai to decide if repairs are worth it, revisit a high-mileage Fortuner for long-term ownership, and compare reliable 7-seater options.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
programme.desc: We are live in sunny San Diego for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This high-stakes collegiate team match features the University of San Diego (USD) battling Grand Canyon University (GCU) in a best-of-seven series.The action includes intense Men's Doubles , Women's Singles , and Mixed Doubles as these teams compete for regional dominance. Watch top talent, including GCU's lefty powerhouse Adam Jones, who boasts a strong 5.6 singles rating , and his partner Xavier Cook Nakakuki. On the USD side, the episode highlights the partnership of Marcus Hopkins and Ryan, an impressive grad student player with high doubles ratings. USD’s Bella also shows grit in the women's singles match. This broadcast captures the best of college pickleball in an amazing format.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal
programme.desc: Simone Jardim & Jaime Oncins take on Eva Welsher & Kyle Yates in a Mixed Pro split age Gold medal match

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
programme.desc: Live from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome, Italy, witness back-to-back high-stakes matchups. First, in Women's Doubles Open, Team England’s Thaddea Lock and Katie Morris face off against Team France’s Elodie Busson and Adeline Nguyen. In a "nip and tuck" group decider, both teams trade aggressive volleys and "shake and bake" attacks before England finds a tactical edge to break the deadlock.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Semifinal
programme.desc: Arielle Butler and Mari Humberg take on Simone Jardim and Allison Harris in this Women's Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.

programme.title: All Florida Pro League - AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
programme.desc: Commentators provide an inside look at Game 2 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida. The Fort Myers Flamingos get off to a dominant start, but the Jacksonville Ballers refuse to give up, staging a dramatic late-game comeback that tightens the score and mounts the pressure. This episode features key players like Stevie, Sophia Dorsey, and Maddalena, with highlights of their strategic plays and powerful shots. Tune in to see if the Flamingos can hold on to their lead and close out the game against the surging Ballers.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Backdraw Quarterfinals
programme.desc: Pei-chuan Kao and Mari Humberg face off in the US Open Pickleball Championship's Women's Pro Singles backdraw quarterfinals.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Wuerffel & Yates vs Ellin & Burrows
programme.desc: Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel teams up with pickleball pro Kyle Yates to take on filmmaker Doug Ellin and pro Wes Burrows in this exciting Picklebowl 2022 semifinal. Set on the scenic courts of Sea Island, Georgia, this match blends high-level pickleball with star power and charitable competition. Expect fierce play, fun commentary, and standout moments from both sides.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Singles - Gold Medal Match
programme.desc: Jorja Johnson and Megan Fudge go head to head in this Gold Medal Match for the Women's Pro Singles at the US Open Pickleball Championships 2024

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Women's Pro Singles
programme.desc: Simone Jardim and Megan Fudge compete in this Women's Pro Singles match at the US Open Championships 2023.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
programme.desc: Anna Leigh Waters and Leigh Waters take on Allison Harris and Simone Jardim in this Women's Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA) - NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Valley vs. Utah Tech
programme.desc: The grand finale of the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional Championship, the second of six regionals for the season. The rivalry matchup features the top teams from Utah Valley University and Utah Tech.This broadcast highlights the intense Men's Doubles game, where Utah Tech's star player Liam Duffin—hailed as one of the top collegiate players nationwide—teams up with Clayton Boydston to face Utah Valley's duo of Bryce Larson and Charles Case.The stakes are high: teams are competing for $5,000 in scholarship money and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri, where $30,000 is on the line. Ultimately, Utah Tech's first team prevails, taking home the national bid and the Utah Regional title.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
programme.desc: In this alternate cut of the Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal at the 2024 US Open, Suzanne Leblang & Milan Rane face off against Martina Frantova & Christine Karges in a battle of shot placement, net pressure, and quick resets. Filmed in Naples, Florida, this matchup delivers a new perspective on one of the tournament’s most tactical and fast-paced doubles clashes.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
programme.desc: Watch the Gold Medal match of the Women’s Pro Split Age division at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, where Parris Todd and Beth Bellamy team up to face Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg. Featuring cross-generational strategy, fast hands, and smart positioning, this match highlights the unique synergy of Split Age play. Recorded live from Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Split Pro - Backdraw Semifinal
programme.desc: Dayne Gingrich and Kyle Yates take on Marcello Jardim and Ronan Camron in this Men's Split Pro Doubles

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 14, 2023 - AZ PBL
programme.desc: On March 14, 2023 - the Surprise Stingers and the Tempe Tornadoes go head-to-head - live at The Orchard!

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball - October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL
programme.desc: October 30, 2023 - Welcome to week 6 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Tempe Tornadoes.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal – Johnson vs Lane
programme.desc: At the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, J.W. Johnson faces off against Brandon Lane in a hard-fought Men's Pro Singles Backdraw Semifinal. With powerful rallies, strategic drops, and relentless pressure, this match highlights Johnson's athleticism and Lane’s grit as they fight for a spot in the finals. Recorded live on Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 5
programme.desc: Pickleball pros face off! Anna Bright & Ameen Hafez vs Dylan Frazier & Ritchie Tuazon.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal
programme.desc: Hunter Johnson and Parris Todd take on Megan Fudge and Andrei Daescu in this Mixed Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.

programme.title: All Florida Pro League - AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 4 - GNV Chomp vs. Sarasota Manatees
programme.desc: This episode features courtside commentary on a ladies doubles match between the Sarasota Manatees and the GNV Chomp, followed by a men's doubles match between the same two teams. The ladies match showcases the absolute dominance of the top-seeded GNV Chomp, with players like Heather Nobler and Kelsey Laurent proving why they're a force to be reckoned with. The Sarasota Manatees, with new player Andy Godwin, fight to improve their league standing. The episode then transitions to a close men's doubles match featuring players Tobias Moreno and BK for the Chomp and Jamir and Jared Brooks for the Manatees.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Rajasthan - Day 8 Tie 1
programme.desc: The atmosphere at Mumbai's Jio World Garden is electric as the host team, Mumbai Pickle Power, rides the momentum of their first season victory into a high-stakes clash against the Rajasthan Titans. With Rajasthan still hunting for their elusive first win of the season, the pressure is at a breaking point for both squads as they fight to climb the "Band of Honor" leaderboard. Witness tactical masterclasses as veteran Lorena Dupnik faces off against Jada Bui in a strategic battle of precision, and feel the intensity of the men's singles where superstars like Brandon Lane and Jack Foster showcase explosive athleticism. From game-changing "Pickle Plays" to high-stakes challenges and the presence of celebrity guests like Rishabh Pant, every rally in this tie is a desperate fight for survival on the road to the semifinals.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
programme.desc: The stakes reach a boiling point at Mumbai's Jio World Garden as the league-leading Chennai Super Champs face off against the defending champions, the Bengaluru Jawans, in a critical top-of-the-table clash. Witness a masterclass in professional grit as "dominating" stars like Katrina Stewart and tactical veterans like Dusty Boyer battle for supremacy on the road to the semi-finals. From high-velocity "scary" 15-minute singles sprints to intense mixed doubles rallies, every point contributes to the prestigious Band of Honor leaderboard. Experience the strategic drama of game-changing "Pickle Plays" and high-stakes challenges in a tie where one momentum shift could decide who walks away with the top spot in the league.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

They face the team of Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote, a pickleball pro and trainer. This match showcases high-level gameplay between four skilled pros.

programme.title: Pickleball England - English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
programme.desc: The 2023 English Open Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final brings serious heat as Ryler DeHeart and Megan Fudge square off against Nick Petterson and Susannah Barr. This final showcases elite shot-making, smart stacking strategies, and seamless teamwork from both sides of the net.With momentum shifting and nerves running high, every rally counts. From laser-focused drives to perfectly timed poaches, this match is a clinic in competitive mixed doubles and a thrilling conclusion to the Open division.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open 2024 – Men’s Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
programme.desc: Marcello Jardim and Marco Osorio go head-to-head in the Gold Medal Match of the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships. With power, precision, and nonstop intensity, this Men’s Pro Singles final showcases top-tier talent and a dramatic battle for the championship title.

programme.title: Pickleball England - English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Don't miss this high-energy competition from the epicenter of pickleball!

programme.title: NPL - NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
programme.desc: The stakes are sky-high in this 2024 National Pickleball League Women’s Doubles Championship as the Coachella Valley Scorpions' dynamic duo, Molly Carter and Kelly Ojeda, take on the formidable Denver Iconics pairing of Stacy Zelenski and Lily Kordic Mueller. Filmed at a championship stop on the NPL tour, this intense match features fierce net battles, pinpoint placement, and relentless energy on both sides of the court. Watch as Carter & Ojeda push the pace and mount a relentless offensive, while Zelenski & Kordic Mueller counter with sharp angles and strategic resets. A hard-fought final that captures the spirit, skill, and teamwork of professional women’s pickleball.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

programme.title: NPL - NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
programme.desc: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
programme.desc: In the exciting championship match of Picklebowl 2023, pro pickleball player Kyle Yates teams up with Picklebowl host and former NFL quarterback Danny Wuerffel to challenge the fierce duo of Anna Bright, a top female pro and former collegiate tennis star, and Ameen Hafez. This charity event brings together athletes and celebrities representing their alma maters in a competitive battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Dave Fleming and special guest Marcellus Wiley highlights the skill, strategy, and drama on court. Watch intense rallies, strategic plays, and hear insider insights as these top players compete for the title. Don’t miss the dynamic energy and social spirit of pickleball in this must-see final.

programme.title: All Florida Pro League - AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 5 - Sarasota Manatees vs. Lakeland Palms
programme.desc: This episode of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, features a redemption match between the Sarasota Manatees and the Lakeland Palms. Both teams are coming off a loss and are looking for a win in this intense doubles matchup. The Manatees jump out to an early lead, but the Palms, with strong play from players like Ava and Ashley Griffith, manage to crawl back into the game and make it a nail-biting finish. programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025 - US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Agassi/Waters vs. Petrouleas/Dussault
programme.desc: The match features the second-seeded team of Anna Leigh Waters, the world's number one ranked women's player and a Triple Crown winner, and Andre Agassi, an eight-time Grand Slam tennis champion making his pro pickleball debut. They face the young team of Stevie Petruleas (13 years old) and Tristan Dassault (16 years old), who are playing in only their third tournament together and are looking to make their mark against the seasoned pros. The match highlights key plays, including Agassi's powerful two-handed backhand and Waters' quickness at the kitchen line, and showcases the dynamic between these experienced and rising stars in the sport.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the Senior Women's Doubles Final under the floodlights . Team England, represented by Kirsty Gray and Anna Linton, faces off against Team Spain's Monica Ramirez and Araceli Senciales .After a strong start where England establishes an early lead, the match tightens as Spain finds their rhythm in the second game . Witness the strategic battle as Gray utilizes precision lobs to disrupt the Spanish defense , while Linton delivers powerful drives to secure critical points . In a high-stakes contest for the gold medal, England targets their opponents' positioning to close out the championship .

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Pune - Day 6 Tie 2
programme.desc: Witness a battle for survival at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai as two powerhouse teams, the Rajasthan Titans and Pune United, fight to secure their first tie victory of the season. The energy is palpable as Pune United's Katie Morris looks for redemption after a tough opening night, while the Titans rely on the aggressive play of Lorena Dupnik and the "superb power" of volleyball-pro-turned-pickleballer Isabella Nelson. From the intense "grind" of 15-minute singles matches to the high-speed tactical exchanges of men’s and women’s doubles, every point is a step toward climbing the league ladder. Don't miss the strategic masterclasses, including high-stakes challenges and game-changing "Pickle Plays," that keep the Mumbai crowd on the edge of their seats.

programme.desc: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
programme.desc: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. The atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden is electric, featuring a "lip-smacking" women's singles battle between European stars Katie Morris and Dominika Turkovic. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldberg’s top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Women's Senior Pro Doubles - Bronze Medal Match

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
programme.desc: Watch a masterclass in senior pro pickleball as Peter Prodanov and Scott Moore take on Scott Crandall and Jose Derisi. With explosive hands, strategic play, and experience driving every point, this US Open quarterfinal is a showcase of skill, grit, and high-level doubles tactics.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Mumbai vs Bengaluru - Day 5 Tie 1
programme.desc: Experience the electric atmosphere of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Mumbai Pickle Power face off against the Bengaluru Jawans in a high-stakes Tie 9. With Mumbai hunting for their first outright victory and Bengaluru desperate to bounce back from a recent loss, the pressure at the Jio World Garden is at an all-time high. Watch as elite players like the "unstoppable" Katrina Stewart dominate the court in singles, while Brandon Lane and Glaura Carvajal Lane attempt to turn the tide for Mumbai in a masterclass of tactical doubles. This tie features the league’s most innovative strategies, from high-risk Pickle Plays to the pursuit of the prestigious Band of Honor, ensuring every rally is a battle for survival on the road to the semi-finals.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
programme.desc: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Hyderabad - Day 9 Semifinal 1
programme.desc: It's Semi-Final Time on Day 9 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL)! programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
programme.desc: In this thrilling gold medal match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Dylan Frazier and Altaf Merchant take on defending champions Andrei Daescu and Dave Weinbach in the Men’s Split Pro Doubles division. The action heats up fast as Frazier and Merchant dominate early, only to be met with a fierce comeback from Daescu and Weinbach in game two. Momentum swings, net-cord drama, and tactical shifts lead to an electrifying third game where every point counts.From Frazier’s lightning-fast hands to Daescu’s towering net play, this match showcases elite shot-making, sharp strategy, and high emotion on Championship Court. With the crowd on edge and the gold medal on the line, it’s a true masterclass in professional pickleball.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
programme.desc: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Quarterfinal
programme.desc: Lee Whitwell and Andrei Daescu take on Patrick Cote and Susannah Barr in this Mixed Pro Split Age Quarterfinal.

programme.title: Pickleball England - English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
programme.desc: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL) - WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
programme.desc: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. The atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden is electric, featuring a "lip-smacking" women's singles battle between European stars Katie Morris and Dominika Turkovic. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldberg’s top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship - Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 456 - Dynamite Fighting Show 27 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 27 part 1 from Transylvania, Romania. Starting off with a superfight in the lightweight division, Bogdan Floristean faces Ionut Popa and in the middleweight division, Dominik Horvath takes on Andrei "The Bonecrusher" Varga. Also stepping into the cage are Brazilian Rodrigo Mineiro and Romanian Florin Lambagiu.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 458 - Dynamite Fighting Show 27 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 27 part 2 from Transylvania, Romania. In this episode Fernando Martin from Spain and Romania's Andrei Leustean face off in a super middleweight division bout. Next up the co-main event in the heavyweight division, Hungary's Sandor Kertesz takes on Romania's Bogan Stoica. In the main event USA's Omar Moreno steps into the ring with hometown favorite Andrei Ostravanu for a rematch in a supermiddleweight fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 457 - Shamrock FC 368
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 368 from St. Louis. Up first in a female bout, Jett Bouckaert and Scarlet Mayfield take to the cage. Next watch as Arthur Jackson faces Emmanuel Primer and Billy Duncan takes on Jaylon Jones in the welterweight division. In the co-main event, Max Choriev looking to head to the UFC faces Anders Murray in what's expected to be a battle of attrition and Sam Paneitz, coming off haitus, takes on Dusty Little.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 459 - Real Fight Promotion 100
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Real Fight Promotion 100 from Ukraine. In this special centenial event RFP brings its viewers an exciting night of fights. First up Stanislav Bogush and Nazar Pryshliak faceoff in the flyweight division followed by Timofiy Mytkalyk versus Ruslan Danyliuk. Also Vyacheslav Vaseichuk and Andriy Dzioba square off. In the Grand Prix finals, the two remaing fighters Roman Bandrivchak and Stanislov Bogush vye for the championship.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 454 - Up Next Fighting 14 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 14 part 1 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California. In the flyweight division Daniel Labastida faces Zain Palacio, Pargev Khachatrian steps into the cage with Israel Salazar and Matthew Ingram takes on Arshag Dadourian. In the main event, with the UNF welterweight title on the line Anthony Desimon looks to take the belt from Christopher London.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 460 - Up Next Fighting 14 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Up Next Fighting 14 part 2 from the Commerce Hotel and Casino in Southern California with a night of great action. In the Rising Stars Flyweight division, Tommy Maurice and Jarred Turner face off plus Ian Miller and Adam Halton head to the ring in a bantam weight bout of boxing versus muay thai specialists. Up next, Drake Flores and Jose Hernandez face off in what's expected to be a dynamic clash. In the main event it's champion versus champion as Interim Lightweight champion Izac Enriquez takes on the returning champ Jairee Baker.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 481 - Dream Boxing 14 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 14 part 1 from Riga, Latvia. First up Miks Berzins takes on Aleksandrs Sidorans for a heavyweight bout. The next matchup is betweeen Mika Bigvava from Georgia and Bohdan Sobol from Latvia with 18 wins and only one loss. In the ffinal match, Aleksis Volkovics, making his pro-debut, and Igor Trosins, both Latvian, take to the ring.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 443 - Clan Wars 52 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Clan Wars 52 part 1 from Belfast, Ireland. In this episode Conor McDermott faces Callum Carville in the light heavyweight division and in a female bout, Caitlyn Dunne takes on Gemma Coghill. Also in a featherweight match Cesar Correia steps into the cage with Omar Al Haj while Tristan Barnett and Nicolae Schiopu battle it out in the welterweight division. The main event is a featherweight title fight between Michael Cartmill and Nathan Chambers.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 455 - Clan Wars 52 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Clan Wars 52 part 2 from Belfast, Ireland. In this episode Nick Rebreanu faces Valerio Balestri in the welterweight division while Jean Kamalli and Billy Sutherland take to the cage. Kyle Paton and Jamie McCaugherty vie for the vacant superlightweight title and in the main event in the heavyweight division Simon Sackey faces Mahdi Zooashna.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 417 - Bare Knuckle Boxing 39 part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Bare Knuckle Boxing 39 part 2 from London.First up in female bout Sweden's Mathilda Wilson faces Romania's Maria Nitescu for a rematch in a Title clash. Next up Carl Hobley and Dan Podmore step into the ring with a World Cruiserweight Title on the line. In the main event Scott McHugh and Aaron McCallum vye for the World Bantamweight Title belt.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 471 - Shamrock FC 370 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 370 part 1 from Ameristar Casino in Missouri. In the first match, Gabe Sestan steps into the cage with Adam Cook followed by Reggie Morris versus Jackson Blankenship. Also on the card Ian Houston takes on Garrenn Lucas in the catchweight division plus Shaine Moffitt versus Kody McGehee in a lightweight bout. In the co-main event, Austin Miller, a kickboxer crosses over to MMA taking on Michael Banks.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 481 - Dream Boxing 14 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dream Boxing 14 part 1 from Riga, Latvia. First up Miks Berzins takes on Aleksandrs Sidorans for a heavyweight bout. The next matchup is betweeen Mika Bigvava from Georgia and Bohdan Sobol from Latvia with 18 wins and only one loss. In the ffinal match, Aleksis Volkovics, making his pro-debut, and Igor Trosins, both Latvian, take to the ring.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 418 - Country Box 29
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Jimmy Adams Promotions, Country Box "Where Music Meets Boxing" from Nashville at the famous Troubadour venue. In this episode of Country Box 29, Raquan Ashby faces Ryan Diaz and Oliver Mcall is back at age 59, with 39 KO's the former WBC heavyweight champion (knocking out Lennox Lewis) takes on Gary Cobia. In the main event, the more experienced Vaughn Alexander tests the undefeated Maidel Sando. Plus singer Krista Dudley plays an original song.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 420 - Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Dynamite Fighting Show 25 part 1 from Oradea, Romania. Starting in the heavyweight division, Remus Bortea is matched up against Vasile Corcodel whose three wins are all by KO. In a Superfight middleweight division bout, Darius Argyo takes on Andrei "The Bonecrusher" Varga in what's expected to be a fast paced bout. Also in this episode is Brazil versus Romania with two very experienced fighters, Rodrigo Mineiro takes on Claudio "The Prince" Badoi in an open weight division fight.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 471 - Shamrock FC 370 part 1
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 370 part 1 from Ameristar Casino in Missouri. In the first match, Gabe Sestan steps into the cage with Adam Cook followed by Reggie Morris versus Jackson Blankenship. Also on the card Ian Houston takes on Garrenn Lucas in the catchweight division plus Shaine Moffitt versus Kody McGehee in a lightweight bout. In the co-main event, Austin Miller, a kickboxer crosses over to MMA taking on Michael Banks.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 371 - KOK Best Of Part 2
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents the Best of King of Kings part 2. In a boxing match Naglis Tamasevicius faces Juris Zundovskis. In a clash of the titans, heavyweight Martin Pacas is matched up against Turkey's Kadir Yildirim "The Terminator." Farshad Derekeh of the Netherlands and Latvian Reinis Porozovs take to the ring in a boxing bout and Beka Gabisonia faces Farruh Gafurov in the Mega Series.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 423 - Shamrock FC 360
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock FC 360 from St. Louis. In tonight's episode, Vince Eazelle and John Long, making his pro debut, step into the cage for a kickboxing match and Billy Duncan faces Jamison Hartweger in a Welterweight division bout. In the co-main event UFC veterans Darian Weeks and Donovan Beard faceoff in the cage and in the main event Jake Collier, UFC veteran, and Christian Edwards, Bellator veteran, are set to meet the challenge in the Light Heavyweight division.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 424 - KOK 122 Riga
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents KOK 122 from Riga, Latvia. In the first matchup Piotr Cybulski and Aleksandrs Zeleznakovs head to the ring for what's expected to be an intense kickboxing bout. Also in this episode Savvas Kagkelidis and Ilija Ivanov faceoff and in a Light Heavyweight bout Jan Pelak and Kristaps Zile step into the ring for a bout under boxing rules. In another Light Heavyweight matchup Deniss Jermakovs takes on Kristaps Zutis in a rapper versus fighter in an MMA contest. In the main event Rodrigo Mineiro and Zaurs Dzavadovs battle for the Interim Welterweight Championship belt.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance - UFA 414 - Shamrock FC 358
programme.desc: United Fight Alliance presents Shamrock Fighting Championship 358 fromKansas City. Starting off, in the Bantamweight division, Corey Leonard challenges hometown favorite Anthony Dooley. Meanwhile Justin Andrews and Logan Blow head to the cage and Tyler Collings takes on Diego Huerta in the light heavyweight division. Also watch as Mason Pillow and Tyler Smith square off in a Catchweight contest and Glendal Whitney faces Carl Jefferson. In the co-main event, undefeated Tyson Hicks takes on veteran Jamese Taylor. In the main event Eric Grant faces Cjay Hunter in a highly anticipated rematch of striker versus grappler.
