programme.title: Geared Up S1 - "Cabriolet"
programme.desc: A ruined and rested family heirloom 1962 Mercedes Benz 220 SE Cabriolet gets a restoration modification with a new Mercedes engine and a new interior with heated seats.

programme.title: The Ride Life with Sung Kang S1 - "United Kingdom"
programme.desc: Sung heads to the UK, home to some of the world's most iconic car brands like Land Rover, Rolls Royce, and Jaguar. It's a land rich in history, but as Sung explores the car culture's grass roots, he finds the people who make it so memorable.

programme.title: The Ride Life with Sung Kang S1 - "Poland"
programme.desc: Sung's dive into the world's car cultures takes him to Poland, a country that emerged from a repressive communist era. Sung finds that new freedoms have led to an explosion of optimist and energy, and one of the most exciting experiences of his life.

programme.title: The Ride Life with Sung Kang S1 - "Korea"
programme.desc: Despite a troubled past of poverty and invasions, Korea has emerged as a car building power-house. Through its unheralded and talented-loaded car scene, Sung reconnects with the land of his birth and finds peace with his estranged mother.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "Blood, Sweat and Gears"
programme.desc: Handsome Jay Callaway's racing career is on the line in one of the toughest technical East Coast race of the series.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "The Outsider"
programme.desc: Wayland Campbell and Levi Shirley go head to head leading to the championship but there is an outsider Randy Slawson, 2 time champion to never under-estimate.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "The Showdown"
programme.desc: Leaders Wayland Campbell and Levi Shirley push each other to their limits while other top drivers show just how fast 4x4 off road racing has become.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "Argentina"
programme.desc: Two talented Canadian brothers and pro MTB riders decide to go on a freeride trip together and choose to explore the remote desert of Argentina.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "South Africa"
programme.desc: We follow the fastest and most stylish female MTB pro rider in the world during a trip to South Africa where she will ride the best trails around Cape Town.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "Morocco"
programme.desc: A German MTB legend decides to build a van and travel all the way down to Morocco to explore and ride the great Atlas mountains.

programme.title: Power & S1 - "Wheels - Corry Weller"
programme.desc: Corry Weller from Phoenix Arizona is probably one of the toughest moms from the United States and one of the best in off road racing.

programme.title: Power & S1 - "Wheels - Emma Bristow"
programme.desc: Emma Bristow from the U.K is a 25 year old international motorcycle trials rider and current Women’s World Champion.

programme.title: Inside Moto S1 - "Dynasties: Like father like son"
programme.desc: We witness Randy Mamola and Wayne Gardner’s reunion, along side their successors: their sons Dakota y Remy.

programme.title: Inside Moto S1 - "The thin line to success"
programme.desc: We'll walk the fine line to success: from Alberto Puig's life changing accident, to the astonishing sponsorship deal of the Laglisse Champions’ Squad.

programme.title: Inside Moto S1 - "So Near, So Far"
programme.desc: We reveal how Maverick & Alvaro face the loneliness of being Champions: Maverick lets go of family support while for Alvaro Bautista, family is the key.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt S2 - "When it Rains, it Pours"
programme.desc: In Beirut, the Masters of Dirt crew prepare to put on yet another epic show in the Middle East. But even in the hottest countries - when it rains, it pours! See why this tour stop goes down as one of the most challenging in recent M.O.D history!

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt S2 - "Wibmer’s Wonderland"
programme.desc: What starts as a business trip to Innsbruck for Georgie and Bienve, turns into a reunion with MTB icon - Fabio Wibmer. Discover how the YouTube superstar lives, how Georgie overcomes his fears, and witness some of the most epic riding of the season.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt S2 - "Desert Sessions"
programme.desc: On the way to their live show in Chile, the crew’s entire plan falls apart while Georgie and some of the team are stranded in the Middle East. But in true M.O.D style, the guys maintain a positive attitude that leads to an insane trip.

programme.title: Supercar Showdown S2 - "Lap Consistency"
programme.desc: Although all ten contestants narrowly escaped elimination last week, two contestants were put on notice and for them the reality of elimination starts to sink in.

programme.title: Supercar Showdown S2 - "Braking Challenge"
programme.desc: It’s week three and the contestants are preparing for a new round of challenges.

programme.title: Supercar Showdown S2 - "Driver Changes"
programme.desc: It’s week four and the contestants are preparing for a new round of challenges...and for our eight remaining rookies the elimination room looms.

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles S1 - "Petter Solberg"
programme.desc: 2-time WRX champion Petter Solberg gives a master class in drift driving. Defending his first Gymkhana Grid win, Petter is force to up his game.

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles S1 - "Nicolett Szanto"
programme.desc: Hungarian Gymkhana Champion Nikolett Szanto is one of the sport’s few professional drivers. Balancing racing career with her day job is just one of the many.

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles S1 - "Dmitrij Sribnyj"
programme.desc: Dmitrij Sribnyj reveals his story for the first time from his evacuation during the 1986 Chernobyl nuclear disaster to becoming a 4-time Gymkhana Grid champion.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S13 - "There Will Be ‘Cudas"
programme.desc: It's an episode of E-Bodies, including disassembly, documentation and suspicion that one of the newly arrived 'Cudas may have forged numbers.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S13 - "Full Metal Phoenix"
programme.desc: A pragmatic Mark Worman observes the metal restoration of the 1971 Phoenix 'Cuda. It's a painstaking task to undo the damage caused by the brutal fire in which it died.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S13 - "The Big Cheesesteak"
programme.desc: Tony "Cheesesteak" D'Agostino, the true Mopar guru, seeks updates on his wife's Plum Crazy Challenger and enlists his buddy Will to help get them.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "Argentina"
programme.desc: Two talented Canadian brothers and pro MTB riders decide to go on a freeride trip together and choose to explore the remote desert of Argentina.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "South Africa"
programme.desc: We follow the fastest and most stylish female MTB pro rider in the world during a trip to South Africa where she will ride the best trails around Cape Town.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "Morocco"
programme.desc: A German MTB legend decides to build a van and travel all the way down to Morocco to explore and ride the great Atlas mountains.

programme.title: Power & S1 - "Wheels - Corry Weller"
programme.desc: Corry Weller from Phoenix Arizona is probably one of the toughest moms from the United States and one of the best in off road racing.

programme.title: Power & S1 - "Wheels - Emma Bristow"
programme.desc: Emma Bristow from the U.K is a 25 year old international motorcycle trials rider and current Women’s World Champion.

programme.title: Inside Moto S1 - "Dynasties: Like father like son"
programme.desc: We witness Randy Mamola and Wayne Gardner’s reunion, along side their successors: their sons Dakota y Remy.

programme.title: Inside Moto S1 - "The thin line to success"
programme.desc: We'll walk the fine line to success: from Alberto Puig's life changing accident, to the astonishing sponsorship deal of the Laglisse Champions’ Squad.

programme.title: Inside Moto S1 - "So Near, So Far"
programme.desc: We reveal how Maverick & Alvaro face the loneliness of being Champions: Maverick lets go of family support while for Alvaro Bautista, family is the key.

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider S2 - "Dirt Vs Road"
programme.desc: The Ultimate Rider will need to master both dirt and road surfaces to claim top spot. And, surprise eliminations could end their dream at any time. Could someone go home after just one day?

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider S2 - "Queen of the Dirt"
programme.desc: We finally get to see the rookies hit the dirt track for the first time, and the game changes. Who will take top points and announce themselves as the one to beat, and who will crumble under the pressure?

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider S2 - "Gymkhana"
programme.desc: The rookies take on a Start Skills session with the legend himself, Daryl Beattie, and they are back on the road in a gymkhana. Who will tame the tricky course and take the points?

programme.title: Our Auto Expert S1 - "Episode Ten"
programme.desc: Nik praises the 2021 Audi e-tron Sportback. Mike talks about the return of the coupe SUV with the Infiniti QX55. Nik tests the Lamborghini Huracan EVO and explores the 2021 hybrid Wrangler 4XE.

programme.title: Our Auto Expert S1 - "Episode Eleven"
programme.desc: Nik explores the Mazda CX30 Turbo and Toyota 4Runner. He highlights the 2022 VW IDA and off-roads in the Hyundai Santa Cruz. Hopes are high for the Lexus LF-Z Concept Electric.

programme.title: Our Auto Expert S1 - "Episode Twelve"
programme.desc: Nik praises the 2021 Lincoln Aviator GT Hybrid. Mike showcases the 2021 Audi Q5. Nik explains Jeep's luxury transformation of the Wagoneer. He tests the hands-free drive of the 2022 Chevy Bolt SUV.

programme.title: Geared Up S1 - "The 3.5"
programme.desc: A rare 1971 Mercedes Benz 280 SE 3.5 Coupe gets restored to its original specifications.

programme.title: Geared Up S1 - "Pinky"
programme.desc: A pink, air-cooled, 1973 Porsche 911 RS is upgraded with a custom built engine, new paint, and new wheels and tires.

programme.title: Geared Up S1 - "Benzilla"
programme.desc: A slow and outdated 1959 Mercedes Benz 180 D is modified with a bargain budget to include new wheels and an American V8 muscle motor.

programme.title: Born To S1 - "Kiara Fontanesi"
programme.desc: Kiara Fontanesi has an impressive trophy cabinet. She is the 5 times winner of the Women Motocross World Championship, winning 4 of those years in succession.

programme.title: The Ride Life with Sung Kang S1 - "Japan"
programme.desc: Japanese car culture holds a special place in Sung's heart. He's back exploring the home of drifting to see the coolest mods, and quirkiest characters. Sung finds that a quest for brilliance and excellence makes this the best place to get inspired.

programme.title: The Ride Life with Sung Kang S1 - "Chicago"
programme.desc: Sung braves the ice-cold winter and reputation as one of the US's crime capitals to uncover the best of Chicago's car culture. He finds there's much more to the windy city than the Blues Mobile. Car nuts are giving the big city a small town heart.

programme.title: The Ride Life with Sung Kang S1 - "Los Angeles"
programme.desc: Sung returns to his home town LA, the car culture capital of the world. This is where Sung feels the most pressure to be on his game. But in the car scene, Sung meets old friends, discovers new inspirations, and finds a way to face life's challenges.

programme.title: Endurance - 24 Hours at Spa S1 - "Andy Soucek - Bentley Continental"
programme.desc: In this profile, we get to know Andy Soucek competing in the Bentley Continental at the 2018 Total 24 Hours of Spa race held at the Spa-Francorchamps circuit.

programme.title: Endurance - 24 Hours at Spa S1 - "Ahmad Al Harthy - Aston Martin Vantage"
programme.desc: In this profile, we get to know Ahmad Al Harthy competing in the Aston Martin Vantage at the 2018 Total 24 Hours of Spa race at the Spa-Francorchamps circuit.

programme.title: Endurance - 24 Hours at Spa S1 - "Albert Costa - Lexus RC F"
programme.desc: In this profile, we get to know Alberto Costa competing in the Lexus RC F at the 2018 Total 24 Hours of Spa race held at the Spa-Francorchamps circuit.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "Spain"
programme.desc: We meet with a Spanish MTB pro rider who decided to create his own company in order to build the most exclusive and unique carbon bikes.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "Bali"
programme.desc: We travel to Bali - Indonesia to meet an MTB pro rider who decided to start a new life dividing his time between surfing and riding active volcanos.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "New Zealand"
programme.desc: We meet one of the most famous MTB photographers in New Zealand and follow him during the biggest MTB competition in Rotorua.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Los Angeles"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie goes to Hollywood arriving in a million dollar V12 Ferrari. In the ‘City of Angels’ Alex is brought into contact with the Brotherhood of Racing, a community of drivers looking to create safe racing conditions for amateurs.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Houston"
programme.desc: Given special access to a 2 million dollar exclusive McClaren Senna, Supercar Blondie digs under the surface to uncover gang feuds in the SLAB (Slow, Low and Bangin’) community and meets up with legendary hip hop artists Slim Thug and Paul Wall.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Las Vegas"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie arrives in Las Vegas in a million dollar Lamborghini SVJ roadster. Taken under the wing of Patrick, founder of the Junkyard Pirates, Alex is brought into the rat rod world - home to American mavericks and outsiders.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "To Hell and Back"
programme.desc: Last year's champion, Erik Miller defends his title. While 2nd place finisher, Jason Scherer, will be one of the many top challengers aiming to beat him.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "Finding the Line"
programme.desc: We follow Shannon Campbell, the first 3-time champion of the King of the Hammers. But his kids, also young drivers, push their dad to the brink of his limits.

programme.desc: Being a successful V8 Supercar driver means more than just driving, you need to be the whole package...This week the contestants will learn why communication is an important skill to master.

programme.desc: Our rookies are transported to an unknown location – leaving our nervous contestants wondering “what’s next?”

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt S2 - "Reckless Road Trip"
programme.desc: After a year full of intense shows, it’s time to let off some steam. Georgie and his crew go on a euro road trip to party with M.O.D family members in the UK as well as motocross legend Edgar Torrenteras in his hometown of Barcelona.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt S2 - "Audi Nines"
programme.desc: The Masters of Dirt crew invades Audi Nines, one of the world's most prestigious mountain bike events to showcase some never-before-seen tricks and recruit a new rider to join the team.

programme.title: Inside the Masters of Dirt S2 - "New Beginnings"
programme.desc: To kick off this season of Inside Masters of Dirt, you’ll get to know the legendary M.O.D riders, their stories, and the iconic Vienna shows that forged their legacy as the world’s wildest athletes.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S13 - "Perks of Being a Challenger"
programme.desc: The Ghouls give their care and attention to a Dodge Challenger, and welcome it to the next phase of its restoration.

programme.title: IWSA Formula Wing World Championships - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: The Formula Wing World Championships 2025 are among the most prestigious competitions in the rapidly growing sport of wingfoiling. Athletes from around the globe will gather to race across the water at top speeds, showcasing both technical mastery and tactical skill.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship - Season Review - Women's Skate & Luge + Open Street Luge: 27min-HL
programme.desc: The 2025 World Downhill Skateboarding Championships season review recaps the global series held across locations including USA, UK, and Turkey. The season blends high-adrenaline competition with grassroots engagement, promoting downhill skateboarding worldwide

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup Cape Verde 2025 - 26min-HL
programme.desc: The opening battles of the 2025 Kite-Surf season are set to kick-off in the waves of Cape Verde’s Sal island when the world champions will be open the defense of their crowns. The GKA Kite-Surf World Cup Cape Verde will likely be fought out in the swells of Ponta Preta.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: Experience 24 minutes of adrenaline-fueled feats as Nicholi Rogatkin (USA) and Casey Brown (CAN) take viewers through the final highlight edit of the 2023 Swatch Nines Mountain Bike event at Germany's Green Hill Bikepark, held from the 14th to the 19th of August.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesport and the mystic deserts of Morocco, where Athletes are not only fighting nature, but also one of the hardest racetracks on the planet. The dunes… The navigation…. The suffering… The legend…. The desert! The Skoda Titan Desert Morocco.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: 4Islands MTB Croatia will welcome over 370 mountain bikers from all over the world for a five-day race on four Croatian islands. This year the order of the islands will be slightly different, starting with Krk, Cres, Lošinj and ending on Rab.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: Welcome from WES Round 1 and 2 in Trentino, Alto Garda, for the UCI E-MTB XC World Cup Season Opener. First time ever in the astonishing Dolomites mountain area in northern Italy, well-known for its tradition in e-biking, MTB and cyclo-tourism.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.desc: Two renowned highlining athletes, Reinhard Kleindl (AUT) and Lukas Irmler (GER), realized one of the longest highlines in Africa and the southern hemisphere at the world-famous Victoria Falls!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.desc: We take you into the sky and accompany a paragliding virtuoso to the Mont Blanc massif, the Atacama Desert in Chile and the Greek island of Santorini. Follow French paraglider pilot Jean-Baptiste Chandelier.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.desc: Swiss extreme sportsman Dani Arnold went on a challenging expedition to the deepest lake on earth - Lake Baikal. The Siberian winter provided accordingly difficult and fascinating conditions.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: X-project 2.0 is a worldwide unique project where different winter sports unite in front of the backdrop of a Swiss dreamscape in the mountains of Engadin valley (Canton of Grisons).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.desc: More than 600 trail runners from all over the world are taking part in this innovative format of the adidas INFINITE TRAILS World Championships 2019: Relays of three people cover a total of more than 126 kilometers and 7,300 meters in altitude.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.desc: The Downhill Skateboarding World Championships on the Isle of Man bring the world's fastest riders to one of the most challenging courses. In the “Stand Up Men” category, you can expect pure speed, fiercely contested races, and breathtaking descents.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: The Ötztal Cycle Marathon 2024 in Austria, taking place on the 1st of September, is the most challenging cycling marathon in the Alps, offering a captivating mix of valley and high alpine terrain. The course spans 227 kilometers and over 4,000 participants.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: The rugged landscapes of Almería, Spain, hosts one of the most challenging mountain bike races in the world - the Škoda Titan Desert Series. Over rocky trails and under the scorching Spanish sun, elite riders push their limits in this multi-stage endurance race.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: In today´s episode the Titan Desert 2024 in NEOM, Saudi Arabia, challenges mountain bikers with intense desert terrains, combining endurance, competition, and stunning landscapes in a unique event showcasing one of the world’s most innovative regions.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.desc: Ibiraquera is the venue for the GWA Wingfoil World Cup 2024, where the world's best wingfoilers will meet. With its constant winds and breathtaking coastline, this Brazilian hotspot provides the perfect backdrop for exciting races.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: ‘Slay The Bay’ is a urban mountain bike adventure in the San Francisco Bay area. . Hans Rey, an icon in the bike scene, on this trip accompanied by fellow Freeride pioneer Brett Tippie.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: In today´s episode we have the ultimate journey into the heart of Greenland´s rich culture and untamed backcountry. Join us as we explore the breathtaking landcapes of this Artic wonderland. It´s the paradise for every passionate freeskier. Let´s check out!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: Sarka and Cheryl, who haven't seen each other in years, have decided to reunite and embark on a tour of their own. Having once traveled together on the contest scene for over 15 years, life led them to different corners of the West Coast of America.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: Today we continue our North American Odyssey with Sarka Pancochova and Cheryl Maas in Reconnect Two. From Mt Baker and the legendary Bank Slalom to backcountry kickers in Bend get ready for the full Pacific Northwest snowboard experience.

programme.desc: The second stop of the GKA Big Air 2025 season is about to kick-off at Lords of Tram in the legendary spot of Barcarès, France, powered by the epic Tramontana winds that sweep down off the snow-capped Pyrenees.

programme.desc: ENGADINSNOW is one of the longest-running freeride competitions in the Alps. This parallel freeride event in Silvaplana is unique worldwide and combines 20 years of innovation and freeriding.

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2025 Autumn: Full Highlights

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025

programme.title: LINE OF SIGHT | A Look into Wingsuit BASE Jumping
programme.desc: The golden age of wingsuiting is upon us. Through evolving suit technology the initial inflation time has gone down, which has lead to quicker starts and more exits. Wingsuit athletes Marshal Miller, Jesse Hall, and Sean Chuma take you through the iconic jumps.

programme.title: THE RIO CAQUETA
programme.desc: Jules Domine and Tyler Bradt, obsessed and addicted to whitewater adventure, make a plan to journey the long way, from the source of Rio Caqueta 1,000 Kilometers downstream to an unreal big water canyon deep in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: Sarka and Cheryl, who haven't seen each other in years, have decided to reunite and embark on a tour of their own. Having once traveled together on the contest scene for over 15 years, life led them to different corners of the West Coast of America.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.desc: Today we continue our North American Odyssey with Sarka Pancochova and Cheryl Maas in Reconnect Two. From Mt Baker and the legendary Bank Slalom to backcountry kickers in Bend get ready for the full Pacific Northwest snowboard experience.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024

programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: BACK TO NORMAL
programme.desc: For Ian Mitchard jumping out of airplanes and soaring above the earth with a nylon canopy is as normal as walking through the grocery store. But when a dramatic accident put the lifestyle he loves in jeopardy, Ian is forced to grapple with his body.

programme.title: Cerro Torre Fly & Climb
programme.desc: The West Face route with its long glacier approach through the Circo de los Altares certainly feels ‘out there’. That the whole team were able to take off from the summit with their paragliders is a testament to their skill, both as climbers and as pilots.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.desc: In “Maneuver Vancouver”, mountain bike icons Hans Rey, Steve Peat and Wade Simmons embark on an exciting five-day journey through Vancouver. Join these three legends as they explore this iconic city.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup Dakhla 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Reigning world champions, Capucine Delannoy and Gabriel Benetton, top the Kite-Surf rankings as they head to the season’s penultimate stop in Morocco, on the Sahara desert’s coastline. Delannoy is in the driving seat in the race for the women’s world title

programme.title: GKA Hydrofoil Big Air World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Abu Dhabi will host the GKA Kite World Tour for the first time, bringing back-to-back World Cups in Hydrofoil Big Air and Freestyle to Fahid Island, Abu Dhabi’s newest coastal wellness destination and the world’s first Fitwel-certified island, offering 11kms of coastline. From 25 to 30 October, the world’s top kiteboarders will take to Fahid Island’s pristine waters in a six-day spectacle of high-flying action, part of the Fahid Island Watersports Festival – a nine-day celebration that will also feature the season finale of the GWA Wingfoil World Tour and the championship deciders of the SFT Surf Foil World Tour. In Hydrofoil Big Air, the battle for the world title is a close-run thing. New Zealand’s Hugo Wigglesworth, 18, heads the rankings after he burst on to the scene and dominated the opening stop of the season in Sylt, Germany, in August. But Finn Flügel, of Germany, who sits second overall, vowed that he would be back in Abu Dhabi, gunning for the title in what are likely to be similar, lighter breezes of the Gulf.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.desc: The GKA Kite & GWA Wingfoil World Cup brings the world’s best kiteboarding and wingfoiling athletes to Fahid Island, UAE. Set against a stunning coastal backdrop, the event features high-performance racing and freestyle action in ideal wind and water conditions

programme.title: Cycling For Autism Eng
programme.desc: Whether it was a need for adventure or to stop a life thats going too fast or to reconnect with the essentials, Adrien did a 6-month cycling tour of Europe in 2022. To make the adventure even more beautiful and intense to experience, it was natural for him to associate it with an important cause, and one that is close to his heart : Autism. Xavier is his 15 year old autistic nephew, and as he loves cycling as much as him, Adrien wanted to help the association “Des Rêves pour Xavier” (Dreams for Xavier) to finance an electric tandem. Adrien’s other goal was to raise autism awareness among as many people as possible.

programme.title: The First Second - Jerome Clementz
programme.desc: Seeing Jérôme Clementzs eyes fixed on the track, we have already understood what dose of concentration, determination and pure strength he will unleash on the descent. Leaving, throughout his 20-year competitive career, little luck to his competitors, how does he oush the boundaries?

programme.title: Mediterranean Epic 2026 Eng
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Epic offers an UCI 4 stage race where mountain bikers enjoy mountain biking to the fullest during the route around Oropesa del Mar, in the Castellón province in Spain. From 05th to 08th of February 2026 the race leads through spectacular Mediterranean mild weather and routes with a perfect combination of sea and mountain!
