In Agony Ab, we hear from a woman who has suffered the ultimate betrayal from her former best friend and we also hear from someone who got A LOT more than they bargained for when they went for their monthly mop chop.
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Happy Halloween
programme.desc:
Keeping in the spirit of the spookiest day of the year, Abbey and Peter have donned their best outfits and are talking all things fright night.
Before delving into everything that gives them the heebie jeebies though, we have a recap on what could have potentially been the best week of Abbey’s life……so far.
There is some big name dropping in this week’s podcast, with Madonna, Frankie Dettori, Mick Hucknall of Simply Rouge and Mr Micky Mouse himself all getting honourable mentions.
It’s a laugh a minute on today’s Therapy Crouch, with Dad jokes galore, Pete’s biggest fears exposed and Abbey’s sharp scouse wit is in full swing to keep everyone in check.
In our Agony Ab section, Abbey and Pete are on hand to give advice on toenail health and maintenance as well as what to do when your hubby starts to neglect his hair and waistlines!
Happy Halloween from all the team at The Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: “I Want to Enrich my Own Life, No Disrespect” Abbey’s New Venture Announced!
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey has a VERY special announcement regarding an exciting new career move.
After admitting that she needs a little more enrichment in her life than the what she is getting from the lighthearted drivel we chat on the crouch couch, Abbey has launched a new podcast venture - Exhibit A.
The first episode with Mo Gawdat and Alice Law is OUT NOW watch it here:

programme.title: Therapy Crouchfest
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter take a while to take stock after the roaring success that was Crouchfest.
Never ones to take themselves too seriously, the gang talk all things fancy dress, gameshow parodies, music and everything in between.
Abbey also gives insight into their ‘Sunday Monday’ experience - a rare treat when the house is normally jam packed with four kids.
In the Agony Abs, we hear from a listener who is feeling pressured into going on a rather expensive family group holiday as well as a young couple who are struggling to decide if they want to have another baby, secure their nest or blow it all on the big day!
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Youth is Wasted on the Young
programme.desc:
It’s your favourite part of the week again! Therapy Crouch is back with a bang and this week Abbey and Peter lift the lid on some of their misspent youth activities.
Expect tales of underage discos enough to whip you up into a FRENZY and lessons how not to pull a sicky when you are battling your first hangover.
Agony Ab is on hand to provide some much needed guidance and comic relief for what to do when your husband has some interesting locations he likes to spend a penny or, even worse, thinks they’re the next Whitney Houston.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: When Partying With Celebs Goes WRONG! Therapy Crouch #AMA
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch #AMA, Abbey and Peter give a glimpse behind the curtain of what it’s really like partying with global superstars, and have some top tips on what to do when the party goes on a little too long….
By popular demand, Abbey is also revealing some of her tip top cleaning tips on how to get your house smelling just like the Crouch’s!
We hear from a listener who has concerns that her kids are knocking seven bells of sh*t out of each other on a regular basis and what best to do when your partner is going through the hormonal rollercoaster that is pregnancy
And stick around until the end when Abbey and Peter finally answer a MILLION DOLLAR QUESTION!
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch #AMA
If you want your question read out on the pod, hit the link below

programme.title: When good intentions backfire SPECTACULARLY
programme.desc:
After their recent break away from the kids to ‘disconnect and reconnect’ Abbey and Pete are back with tales of when even the best of intentions can backfire with hilarious results.
Thailand in the depths of monsoon season? Sounds like the perfect opportunity for Abbey to tear through three books and avoid talking to Pete at all costs…
In our weekly whine (or shine) club, we hear from a couple who have had the picture perfect proposal in nowhere else than the big apple itself as well as a woman who is convinced her husband has taken up whistling as a full time hobby just to drive her round the bend.
And we also hear some outrageous chat which will hopefully stand as a warning to all you guys on why you shouldn’t drunk and dial.
On this week’s Therapy Crouch we’ve got 99 problems but a b*tch aint one.
Enjoy!

programme.title: Wedding Planning
programme.desc:
On today’s episode, we get an exclusive invite to the planning behind the wedding of the decade. From pre-match nerves to Elton John’s florist - learn more about the planning of the most important day of Abbey’s life (and probably Pete’s as well).
We also hear how Abbey feels how she has made a load of new friends since starting the podcast and why Peter is still struggling to show his face in the bakery after THAT famous incident.
And your favourite Agony Ab is back, helping to navigate the tricky waters of what to do when your girlfriend plans, and pays for, your wedding without your knowledge but on your credit card and how to get out of your sister’s OTT wedding prep.

programme.title: To Dream The Impossible Dream
programme.desc:
In this week’s Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter take a while to sit down and discuss some of their dreams and aspirations both as a pair of youngsters and now as one of the UK’s most prominent power couples.
We hear about Abbey’s early days in Genie Queen - Liverpool’s answer to the Sugababes - and a young football protege with dreams of scoring 100 premier league goals and becoming the nation’s Podfather in the process.
We also hear from our lovely listeners with their Weekly Whines and Agony Abs. We hear about one of listeners whose girlfriend has being using their toothbrush for bit of DIY and a fellow NETTO alumni has been in touch with a playground anthem that has been sung for generations across Merseyside.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: They Call Me The Godfather
programme.desc:
Welcome back to The Therapy Crouch! On this week’s episode Abbey and Peter are on hand to share some pearls of wisdom on what makes a good godparent, and some top tips on how to expertly navigate a thanks but no thanks conversation with your nearest and dearest.
In Agony Ab, Abbey and Peter are on hand to help when your better half suddenly decides to take up the gym 10 years too late and we hear from Louis, one of our international listeners who needs some advice on how to make the first move!
We hope you enjoy this very special episode from the OG Podfather and your fairy Podmother!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch’s Christmas Party!!!
programme.desc:
It is a double celebration in the Crouch household after Scott pulled his finger out and asked the big Q - which has prompted some discussions on Abbey trading hers in for an upgrade (ring not fella)
Although it isn’t all festive cheer as the pair have been up to their usual antics and have come locked and loaded with multiple weekly whines - a lot of of them regarding the other’s fashion faux pas.
And fear not, we are not abandoning you guys with your own relationship woes, Agony Ab is still on the couch to help with your long distance heart ache and those of you who are struggling with husbands who have little to no interest in putting the Christmas tree up!! Bah humbug!
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch - You May As Well Move In Then
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode, Pete provides a lesson on exactly how not to ask the love of your life to move in with you.
Learn more about Peter’s revolutionary invention, ‘The Squat Box’ and why you should never leave your home movie collection lying around when your future wife and mother-in-law are coming round for tea.
From Pet Detectives to interior design clashes, no stone is left unturned on The Therapy Crouch.

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch - Will You Marry Me?
programme.desc:
This week, Abbey and Peter provide a schooling session on how to nail the perfect proposal (spoiler: It does not involve chemtrails)
Weekly Whine club is also back, with Abbey and Peter going a bit more upmarket to celebrate the roaring success that is The Therapy Crouch! We learn why you can't trust Abbey to keep a clean car and how Peter is considering taking up a career modelling fake tan.
And, as always, Agony Ab is on hand to give you the listener some advice for your tricky relationship problems.
Enjoy!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch - I WANT BONO
programme.desc:
On today’s episode, Abbey and Peter shed light on all the things they have in common, from nights in watching boxsets to nights out on the tiles.... and even their taste in men.
The pair also bond over their shared appreciation for all things Bono and Barry from Eastenders.
In the Weekly Whine Club, we learn why having a Victoria Secret’s model as a wife may not be as glamorous as it sounds and, rather ironically, that poor punctuality is one of Abbey’s pet hates.
In Agony Ab, we go international and provide assistance to some of our Spanish listeners and Pete gives tips on how to keep to spice alive (spoiler: it does not involve dressing up as a viking)

programme.title: The Sidwell’s: Steve and Krysy Sidwell on Marriage, Teenage Tear-Ups and Book Club Blunders
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter are joined by some of their oldest and closest friends - Steve and Krysy Sidwell.
In a friendship spanning two decades which has seen the couples share career paths, holidays and some outrageous nights out, this podcast is full of laughs and a behind the curtain, sneak peak into what it’s like being best friends with your favourite pair of podcasters!
Steve and Krysy discuss what they think has made their 20 year marriage stay rock solid after all these years and how they are navigating having three teenage boys who have developed of penchant for knocking seven bells of sh*t out of each other on a regular basis.
In the Agony Ab section, we hear from a listener who has some concerns about his wife’s recent fashion choices as well what to do in the awkward situation when someone likes you more than you like them - so stay tuned for that!!
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: “Thanks Mark, You’ve Ruined the Pod!” Abbey and Pete’s #AMA
programme.desc:
Welcome back to The Therapy Crouch: Ask Us Anything series, the only place where you can get Abbey and Pete’s raw and unfiltered answers to YOUR burning questions!
On today’s episode it is almost over before it even begins after a cheeky question from listener Mark threatens to derail the whole thing!!
Another listener also gets in touch who has a great addition to one of our new favourite games which leads to some outrageous film titles reimagined!
And stick around until the end, where Abbey gives her verdict on her top podcast recommendations that will change your life!

programme.title: “I Want to Enrich my Own Life, No Disrespect” Abbey’s New Venture Announced!
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey has a VERY special announcement regarding an exciting new career move.
After admitting that she needs a little more enrichment in her life than the what she is getting from the lighthearted drivel we chat on the crouch couch, Abbey has launched a new podcast venture - Exhibit A.
The first episode with Mo Gawdat and Alice Law is OUT NOW watch it here:

programme.title: Happy Halloween
programme.desc:
Keeping in the spirit of the spookiest day of the year, Abbey and Peter have donned their best outfits and are talking all things fright night.
Before delving into everything that gives them the heebie jeebies though, we have a recap on what could have potentially been the best week of Abbey’s life……so far.
There is some big name dropping in this week’s podcast, with Madonna, Frankie Dettori, Mick Hucknall of Simply Rouge and Mr Micky Mouse himself all getting honourable mentions.
It’s a laugh a minute on today’s Therapy Crouch, with Dad jokes galore, Pete’s biggest fears exposed and Abbey’s sharp scouse wit is in full swing to keep everyone in check.
In our Agony Ab section, Abbey and Pete are on hand to give advice on toenail health and maintenance as well as what to do when your hubby starts to neglect his hair and waistlines!
Happy Halloween from all the team at The Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Half Term from Hell
programme.desc:
Happy Therapy Crouch release day! In this week’s episode Abbey and Peter talk about their rather eventful Easter break spent with their nearest and dearest….as well as their four kids.
With Pete pondering why the little ones get such a long time off for Easter when Jesus himself only took 3 days, Abbey lets loose on some of their less-than-wholesome strolls in the park and trips to the beach.
During Weekly Whine Club, Pete’s shortcomings on all things technology based are exposed and we hear from one of our listeners whose husband is left rather unimpressed by one of her morning rituals.
In Agony Ab, we hear how one of our dear listeners is planning on throwing the wedding of a lifetime with his boyhood passion taking front and centre stage, and what to do when your gut feeling is telling you there is something wrong in the relationship.
We hope you enjoy this weeks episode of The Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc:
After the ribena-gate of last week, tune in to see if Ralphie made it to a second week in the Crouch family household.
This week, the Abbey and Peter are chatting about all things guilty pleasures. After hearing about a recent TikTok trend, Abbey is desperate to stay down with the kids and expose all the things that men secretly love but hate to admit, what could go wrong…..?
From their mutual taste in TV and the fact they are both more than partial to a bit of Simply Red, it is safe to say they both have more than their fair share of guilty pleasures they can expose the other one for.
As always, you guys have been in touch in search of some advice from the nation’s number 1 Agony AB! Abbey takes the role of hype queen for a woman who has been stuck with a guy suffering from Botox Bias and is on hand to help a young gent who is suffering from a 3 ft 5 neighbour from hell.

programme.title: Glastonbury....Part 1
programme.desc:
Welcome back to The Therapy Crouch! This week, your favourite couple take a sit down to spill the beans on all their Glastonbury planning and preparations. We have got some interesting ideas on how we can help Pete go incognito in the crowd (wig suggestions welcome) and Abbey gives a breakdown on how she is going to give Sir Elton John himself a run for his money when it comes to outfit changes.
In Weekly Whine Club you guys have been in touch to berate Peter about his skinny wrists and we also hear how you have incorporated this into your own daily lives with varying degrees of success.
Agony Ab is also back…but this time with a twist! Rather than our usual pearls of wisdom and relationship saving advice, we hear some of your best (and worst) festival stories….from burst sh*t pipes and POONCHO nightmares - nothing is off the cards.
Enjoy this week’s, Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Glasto....Part 2
programme.desc:
It’s the one you have all been waiting for! After a rather hectic Glastonbury experience, a slightly worse for wear Therapy Crouch is here to dish the dirt on what went down at Worthy Farm.
The gang battle through some rather self-inflicted hangovers and lift the lid on their Glastonbury experience - expect a lot of Elton John chat, Abbey’s step count and the avoidance of the dreaded long drop….
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Freaky Friday
programme.desc:
In this week’s Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Peter embrace their inner Jamie Lee Curtis and Lindsey Lohan and ponder one of life’s great questions…..what would you do if you found yourself in a Freaky Friday situation?
They look at which one of their heroes they would most like to switch with, what would be the first thing they’d do if they found themselves in the other’s body (parental guidance advised) and Peter answers a very tricky question regarding his mum and Abbey’s own Freaky Friday experience.
In Agony Ab, we hear from the only woman on the planet who is offended her husband believes she resembles Margot Robbie and Pete tries to help a sister out who’s in desperate need of some funny one liners for her Tinder profile.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: Extraterrestrials, Memory Loss and Bedroom Antics: Therapy Crouch #AMA
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Ask Us Anything, Abbey and Peter are back answering some of the hot topics that you guys want to know the answer too!
As is quickly becoming a bit of a tradition of this new weekly edition, we hear some weird and wonderful ‘would you rather’ questions the majority of which leave Abbey and Pete stumped on how you guys even come up with them!
We also tackle some more hard hitting questions, such as sleep talking, how to keep yourself occupied in the bedroom on a cold rainy day, and Abbey finally puts to bed the age old question of is their Alien life out there?
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch, Ask Us Anything!

programme.title: Doggystyle
programme.desc:
In this week’s pod, Peter finally admits his love love for the young pup!! As expected, Abbey is less than magnanimous in success but there is no love lost between the pair.
In the weekly whine club, one of our golf widow listeners has been in touch, much to the detriment of the big man, and we also hear from a young scaffolder who’s struggling to enjoy a day evening off even on a cold wet Tuesday underneath the spotlights.
In one of our most F’d up Agony Abs of the series, a long time suffering housewife details her husbands perverted tea making skills and Abbey is on hand to give some advice to an unlucky in love recently singleton.
Enjoy this week’s Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: David Walliams Talks Swimming the Channel, Austin Powers, Matt Lucas and Astrochimp!
programme.desc:
On today’s episode of The Therapy Crouch, Abbey and Pete are joined by actor, comedian and children’s author David Walliams who heard us shouting him out on a previous pod and decided to pop onto the couch for a chat!
David talks about his massive success in the world of children’s literature, his literary inspirations and why writing two books is never the same process.
He also weighs in on Abbey’s debut novel ‘Remember my name’ and gives a very special reading of the prologue which now has Abbey pondering if we should get this re released as an audio book!
In the Agony Ab section, we have a Shallow Hal-esqu scenario featuring a boyfriend who is getting worried about his girlfriend waistline woes and we have some very direct advice for a listener whose girls trip is in jeopardy due to the addition of some unwanted plus ones!

programme.title: “Thanks Mark, You’ve Ruined the Pod!” Abbey and Pete’s #AMA
programme.desc:
Welcome back to The Therapy Crouch: Ask Us Anything series, the only place where you can get Abbey and Pete’s raw and unfiltered answers to YOUR burning questions!

Another listener also gets in touch who has a great addition to one of our new favourite games which leads to some outrageous film titles reimagined!
And stick around until the end, where Abbey gives her verdict on her top podcast recommendations that will change your life!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch - I WANT BONO
programme.desc:

The pair also bond over their shared appreciation for all things Bono and Barry from Eastenders.
In the Weekly Whine Club, we learn why having a Victoria Secret’s model as a wife may not be as glamorous as it sounds and, rather ironically, that poor punctuality is one of Abbey’s pet hates.
In Agony Ab, we go international and provide assistance to some of our Spanish listeners and Pete gives tips on how to keep to spice alive (spoiler: it does not involve dressing up as a viking)

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch
programme.desc:
In this week’s episode, Abbey and Peter give us a glimpse into what life in the public eye is really like. From the glitz and the glam to the sh*t and the sham, sit back and relax whilst we lift the lid on life as a celeb in 2023.
This week also sees the return of the hotly anticipated ‘Weekly Whine Club’, so get your glasses and other half at the ready and find out what’s been grinding our gears recently.
With laughs, tears and a few insults along the way we hope you enjoy this episode of The Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch
programme.desc:
In today’s episode, Abbey and Pete discuss what to expect when you’re expecting. Abbey opens up on some of the issues they experienced when getting pregnant for the first time and offers advice to any listeners who find themselves in a similar situation.
Pete is also on hand to provide guidance to the partners who are trying to navigate their way through hormones, weird cravings and strange demands.
Sit yourself down, grab a prawn sandwich and enjoy this week’s episode of The Therapy Crouch!

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch - You May As Well Move In Then
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode, Pete provides a lesson on exactly how not to ask the love of your life to move in with you.
Learn more about Peter’s revolutionary invention, ‘The Squat Box’ and why you should never leave your home movie collection lying around when your future wife and mother-in-law are coming round for tea.
From Pet Detectives to interior design clashes, no stone is left unturned on The Therapy Crouch.

programme.title: The Therapy Crouch made some new friends....and they do not disappoint
programme.desc:
The moment you’ve all been waiting for has finally arrived! The Therapy Crouch has waited almost a year for this very special moment and boy was it worth it…
This week, we are joined by fellow podcasters and new best friends, James Buckley and Clair Buckley!
It’s fair to say that this is a bit of a milestone for the podcast and nothing was off the table in this no holds barred chat, from how to pity a girl into bed to James’ truly teeth woes.
They are also a welcome addition to Agony Ab couch, where we hear from a woman who is being constantly undermined in the workplace which Clair has some FANTASTIC advice for.
Do not miss this one!

programme.desc: When Matt almost gets run down by a posse of graffiti-packing gangsters, he sets into motion a plan of revenge

programme.title: Smut Campaign
programme.desc: After Ronnie suffers a near-fatal wound during an attack on the lot, he reconsiders his role.

programme.title: Warzone at the Worksite
programme.desc: Ronnie's gotten a raise and a promotion, and Carlos's jealousy sends him looking for more appreciation.

programme.title: A Vengeful Streak
programme.desc: Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac; Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo.

programme.title: Roll the Dice
programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo, Carlos tries to make amends.

programme.title: Lou's Big Gamble
programme.desc: It's a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity .

programme.title: All In
programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed?

programme.title: Viva Las Vegas!
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude.

programme.title: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client.

programme.title: Bouquets and Blowtorches
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks.

programme.title: Doomsday Prep
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover.

programme.title: Sugardaddy Shakedown
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret.

programme.title: The New Boss
programme.desc: Lou has retired, making Sonia the new boss, but will she be able to keep the company going?

programme.title: Hayseed Inferno
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash threatens to end her time.

programme.title: Bullseye!
programme.desc: Sonia is still struggling to keep the team in line.

programme.title: Phi Alpha Fail
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in.

programme.title: Boys with Toys
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Mile High Mayhem
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime!

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane
programme.desc: In this Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars.

programme.title: First Rule of Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia encounter a city employee who tries to give them the boot.

programme.title: Natural Liar
programme.desc: First, Froy and Ronnie dodge tomatoes and pesticides when an organic farmer won't give up his tractor.

programme.title: The Froylan Job
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Tricks and Treats
programme.desc: A mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car.

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold.

programme.title: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase.

programme.title: It Ain't No Joke!
programme.desc: The cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series.

programme.title: We Are Operation Repo
programme.desc: The Operation Repo team faces a bike-riding gangster and a persistent young debtor.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them.

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: Lou, Lyndah, Matt grab speedboat, truck, trailer, repo rare motorcycle, Froy, Sonia, Lou take forklift.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: Lou, Froy, Matt face assault charges, repo BMW during film shoot, find debtor's car with assistance.

programme.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
programme.desc: Matt and Froy disrupt a couple's tryst, repo a car from a pizzeria, then face challenges at a car graveyard.

programme.title: Exterminate or Retaliate
programme.desc: Lou orchestrates a truck ambush. Then, they repo a tractor and confront punk kids for four wheelers.

programme.title: Unwanted Seizures
programme.desc: Lou orders a Toyota repo post-divorce, has Froy and Matt tail another, and aids a seizing debtor.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia.

programme.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?
programme.desc: First, Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity.

programme.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
programme.desc: Lou sends Sonia & Froy to repo. Matt & Froy face citizen & cop. Sonia, Lyndah, & Matt confront repo agent.

programme.title: Hairy Situations
programme.desc: Sonia&Lyndah repo near wig shop. Pepper spray chaos with Lou & Froy. Froy, Sonia, & Lou face thugs for repo.

programme.title: Legal Repossession
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, & Lou repo attorney's car. Froy, Lyndah, & Sonia interrupt scene. Lou & Sonia handle ATVs.

programme.title: Business Issues
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: A wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber.

programme.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers
programme.desc: Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard.

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill.

programme.title: Matt's Back
programme.desc: Froy & Mike repo at paintball range. Matt intervenes. Sonia & Froy repo sedan. Matt & Lou take risky job.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou & Sonia repo from gangsta gals. Matt & Froy dispute with burger-slinger. Sonia & Froy face hustler & crew.

programme.title: Strapped On the Court
programme.desc: Matt and Froy have to choose between the job and their lives when they're confronted by a dozen gun-toting basketball players. Then, Lou and Sonia have to crash a night-time family reunion to get their car. And finally, Lou and Lyndah think they are going to repo a Chevy van from wounded veterans, but the veterans aren't what they seem.

programme.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers
programme.desc: Lou, Matt, & Froy face owner with blade. Matt & Froy reclaim Prius from role-players.

programme.title: Caught with Their Pants Down
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy's repo turns bizarre with strangers. Lou, Lyndah face indecent ranchers; chaos at pool hall.

programme.title: Honor Rolling Away
programme.desc: Sonia & Lyndah confront student. Matt & Sonia face armed thugs. Lou & Sonia repo Escalade from couple.

programme.title: Tazed and Amazed
programme.desc: Matt & Froy call cops for old-timer. Lou & Froy clash with bowler. Froy & Lyndah deal with Altima owner.

programme.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots
programme.desc: Lou & Sonia pursue Porsche & Audi. Matt & Froy recover truck. Matt & Lou seize BMW from rich couple.

programme.title: Playing the Role
programme.desc: Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers.

programme.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones
programme.desc: Froy, Lou & Matt face bodybuilders for Jeep. Lou & Lyndah startle broker. Froy learns text lesson from Sonia.

programme.title: The Hearse Isn't Empty?
programme.desc: Matt & Lou handle accountant & son. Sonia & Froy manage pool party. They chase a hearse.

programme.title: Froy Gets Beat Up
programme.desc: Sonia & Lou encounter economy impact. Matt & Sonia deal with spoiled princess and unpaid bill on Jetta.

programme.title: This Is No Fantasy
programme.desc: Froy & Lyndah handle bride. Matt intervenes with players. Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, & Lou tackle flaming car.

programme.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
programme.desc: Lou, Sonia, and Froy find an RV missing for 30 years, now used by young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: Pyramid Scams and Princesses
programme.desc: Lou, Sonia, and Matt face tough truckers; Lyndah and Lou expose a scam; the team confronts a club princess.

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: The team repos jet skis at the beach, confronts a skilled masseuse, and unknowingly pulls a costly prank.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: Lou, Sonia, and Froy repo a taxicab with a drunk client, while Matt and Froy repo a stuck-in-the-80s DeLorean.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: Lou, Froy, and Matt tackle two hot air balloons, repo a sports car, and handle graffiti girls with Frankie.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring agent, to repo a limousine in an elaborate sting operation.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: Repo tension escalates; kegger chaos ensues; explosive surprise shocks.

programme.title: Going Green and Falling Down
programme.desc: Sonia, Froy repo biodiesel car, owner resembles Sonia.

programme.title: Look What You Did!
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy face angry debtors; Lou and Matt tangle with a taser-wielding P.I.; Frankie jeopardizes Matt.

programme.title: That's Disrespectful
programme.desc: Sonia, Lyndah weigh options: reclaim burnt car or give up?

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: Matt, Froy face peril in dangerous hood as debtor defends ride.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: Lyndah handles sobbing debtor; Matt, Froy face car and flirty ex; team confronts cultists.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: Matt repos Vespa & Yaris, confronts insolvent dealership, unsure about Lou.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: Froy, Lyndah deal with dentist; Frankie's repo mishap jeopardizes; Lou faces wrecked Camry with Froy trapped.

programme.title: Segway This Way
programme.desc: Matt, Sonia vs. surfer; Froy, Matt handle Segway renter; Lou, Lyndah, Froy confront gangster at party.

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: Sonia, Froy get canoe; Lyndah, Sonia aid widow; Lou, Matt clash with soccer players for Camaro.

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: Lyndah, Matt dispute Jeep; Froy, Sonia manage debtor; Lou, Sonia, Froy face captain, Coast Guard.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: Matt, Lou repo BMW at club; Sonia, Matt deal with biker; Matt, Froy face debtor, tribal police on reservation.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: Lou, Sonia, Froy sting taxi repo, deal with drunk passenger.

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: Froy, Sonia clash with wife; Matt, Sonia repo at vampire party; Matt, Froy confront drunken relatives.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: Matt, Froy grab ATV; Matt, Lou handle frat prank; Lou, Lyndah, Sonia repo Corolla from mom-to-be.

programme.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful
programme.desc: Matt, Froy vs. guards; Lou, Sonia confront team; Froy, Sonia in love triangle.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: Matt, Froy confront polygamist cult over Prius.

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: Sonia, Froy repo bike; Froy, Sonia vs. receptionist; Froy, Matt deal with exterminator.

programme.title: There Was an Accident
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy.

programme.title: Yoga-to Be Kidding Me
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie.

programme.title: Go Kart Them Away
programme.desc: Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel.

programme.title: Repo, the Final Frontier
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Sonia
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy respond to a tip from an informant and wind up in the middle of an epic story of intrigue.

programme.title: It's Not Funny
programme.desc: Matt and Froy interrupt a comedian's preparations for a show to repossess his Dodge.

programme.title: A Zamboni?
programme.desc: Matt and Froy interrupt a debtor's tattooing session to reclaim his vehicle.

programme.title: Instruction and Destruction
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie.

programme.title: Angry Swarms
programme.desc: Matt, Lou, and Lyndah try to repo a car from a man who is not afraid to throw some punches.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it.

programme.title: Four Wheel Surprise
programme.desc: Lou and Matt confront a big-time player and his bodyguards at a Brazilian restaurant.

programme.title: Breakdowns and Beatdowns
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face gang bangers, a teacher's brawl, and a tow truck breakdown.

programme.title: You Again?
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou face an angry doctor, a furious athlete, and a minister's van repo with unexpected trouble.

programme.title: Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: Lou and Froy prank bikers, Sonia and Matt repo a tanning bed, and a sting on a shady tow driver takes a twist.

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: Lou and Froy face snobby diners, Lyndah and Froy repo a van from thieves, and Matt nabs a rare dune buggy.

programme.title: High and Low Spirits
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia face a wild love triangle, Sonia repos a designer's van.

programme.title: Repo Outside the Box
programme.desc: Matt and Sonia face violent cooks, Froy repos a model's van, and a street gang outmatches the team.

programme.title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: Froy, Sonia repossess truck; handle flower dispute; reclaim Rolls Royce golf cart.

programme.title: Involuntary Voluntary
programme.desc: Lou and Matt expose a cheating husband's scheme, repossess a drunk debtor's car, and confront an armed driver.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou & Froy bait a debtor, face pepper spray, crash a wedding for a DJ's car, & confront bikers.

programme.title: Blow-Up and Cool Down
programme.desc: Lou & Lyndah repo a mower, Sonia & Matt face heat & elderly debtors, & a shocking secret is found in a car.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou & Lyndah face drunk outdoorsmen, Froy & Lyndah repo a bad guitarist, and Froy & Sonia confront an ex-NFL.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia & Lyndah repo a hot tub, Lou & Matt face angry paraders, and Lou & Lyndah take a car from old men.

programme.title: Hooligans and Explosions
programme.desc: A pan-wielding housewife fights Lou & Sonia, while Matt & Froy's repo of a contraband-filled truck goes wrong.

programme.title: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson - Teaching the Teachers - Day 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of Teaching the Teachers explores the core teaching that only love is real and fear is illusion. Not a religion, the Course offers a non-dogmatic spiritual path that can complement other teachings and invites surrender to a higher power for true healing.

programme.title: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson - Teaching the Teachers - Day 3
programme.desc: Day Three of Teaching the Teachers reveals that the ego conceals our perfect, God-created Self. We are not our bodies, and life continues beyond birth and death. Thoughts create effects, yet through atonement we can be freed from guilt, fear, and suffering when we choose healing.

programme.title: Compassionate Resilience with Sharon Salzberg - Day 1 - Centering
programme.desc: Day 1 introduces the practice of centering through the breath. When the mind drifts to regret or worry, we gently return—again and again. This meditation teaches concentration, presence, and compassion, reminding us that healing isn’t in never wandering, but in beginning again.

programme.title: Compassionate Resilience with Sharon Salzberg - Day 2 - Beginning Again
programme.desc: Day 2 invites us to examine the stories we tell about our worth, limits, and lives. By recognizing conditioned habits and outdated coping tools, we reconnect with our power of choice. This lesson reminds us that change is always possible—and that we can meet life with renewed care and curiosity.

programme.title: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson - Teaching the Teachers- Day 1
programme.desc: Day one explores core teachings from A Course in Miracles: releasing ambition, ego, and grandiosity to become a compassionate presence. Rather than fixing or leading, we learn to hold space, trust divine guidance, and allow true healing and spiritual transmission to unfold.

programme.title: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson - Teaching the Teachers - Day 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of Teaching the Teachers explores the core teaching that only love is real and fear is illusion. Not a religion, the Course offers a non-dogmatic spiritual path that can complement other teachings and invites surrender to a higher power for true healing.

programme.title: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson - Teaching the Teachers - Day 3
programme.desc: Day Three of Teaching the Teachers reveals that the ego conceals our perfect, God-created Self. We are not our bodies, and life continues beyond birth and death. Thoughts create effects, yet through atonement we can be freed from guilt, fear, and suffering when we choose healing.

programme.title: Compassionate Resilience with Sharon Salzberg - Day 1 - Centering
programme.desc: Day 1 introduces the practice of centering through the breath. When the mind drifts to regret or worry, we gently return—again and again. This meditation teaches concentration, presence, and compassion, reminding us that healing isn’t in never wandering, but in beginning again.

programme.title: Compassionate Resilience with Sharon Salzberg - Day 2 - Beginning Again
programme.desc: Day 2 invites us to examine the stories we tell about our worth, limits, and lives. By recognizing conditioned habits and outdated coping tools, we reconnect with our power of choice. This lesson reminds us that change is always possible—and that we can meet life with renewed care and curiosity.

programme.title: Sex Talk - Sex Talk - The Science of Falling in Love
programme.desc: The science of falling in love, plus putting the spark back into your sex life. Also, there are some health benefits to “going commando” but there are some things you always must keep in mind.

programme.title: Sex Talk - Sex Talk - Marijuana & Sex
programme.desc: Does Marijuana increase or decrease your libido? And is pregnancy brain a real thing? Plus is it possible to overdose on ED medications and a look at just what happens during vaginal rejuvenation procedures?

programme.title: Sex Talk - Sex Talk - Anger & Sex Don’t Mix
programme.desc: Did you know anger can negatively affect your performance in the bedroom? And despite what you may have heard oral sex isn’t always safe sex? Plus, don’t think you can’t get pregnant just because you’re still breastfeeding.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. James Greenblatt, a pioneer in the field of integrative medicine who has been treating patients with eating disorders for many decades. His nutritional approach to psychiatry is revolutionary and has helped patients worldwide. He is the author of seven books, including Answers to Anorexia and Finally Focused: The Breakthrough Natural Treatment Plan for ADHD.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show: Dr. Cari Schaefer - Feel Better with Optimal Hormone Health
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Cari Schaefer, DACM, an expert in hormones who specializes in fertility and menopause. She is the best-selling author of the book, The Food Solution. As a healthcare expert and provider, educator, and lecturer, she is also the founder of Wise Woman Emerging, a platform designed to midwife women through the menopausal change. She is a Doctor of Traditional Chinese Medicine with more than 21 years of experience.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show: Rena Greenberg - Lose Weight Through Hypnosis
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Rena Greenberg, a trained biofeedback therapist and renowned hypnotherapist, who developed Gastric Bypass Hypnosis, a method to transform the way patients think about food, by tapping into the power of the subconscious mind. She is the author of several books, including The Right Weigh and The Easy Sugar Break Up. Rena is passionate about helping others learn how to eat to live, not live to eat and she’s helped hundreds of people reach a healthier weight.

programme.title: HealthDay - Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It
programme.desc: We speak with experts about how to protect yourself from medical gaslighting, and other things you should know before you visit a doctor or dentist.

programme.title: HealthDay - The Truth About Vitamins
programme.desc: Nutrition expert Dr. Thunder Jalili joins us to discuss why Americans spend more than $30 billion a year on dietary supplements, despite decades of research disputing their ability to improve health outcomes.

programme.title: HealthDay - Diabetes: The Path to a Cure
programme.desc: Dr. Robert Gabbay, chief scientific and medical officer of the American Diabetes Association, speaks with us about new preventative drugs and devices for diabetes patients, and how much progress has been made in the path towards a cure.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Day 5: Healing Padangusthasana
programme.desc: Today's practice is an exploration of healing, the deep inner work that yoga opens you up to.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Day 6: Breath Utkatasana
programme.desc: Tune into the truth of who you are underneath the thoughts, using the breath and practice as a means of transformation into true self.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series - Day 7: Awareness Virabhadrasana B
programme.desc: Today we explore awareness through breath, movement and the posture Virabhadrasana B.

programme.title: Road To Dharma - True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
programme.desc: Before Riding to the Hidden Valley of the Flowers, we get a rare view of the hidden life of the riders in this real world of yogis opening scene. This lightness contrasts a big incedent at the the following morning, setting the riders and Ryan up for some harsh truths about Power and passivity. True Power is yours to embrace. This is not a journey to feel better.

programme.title: Road To Dharma - Unity at Hemkund Sahib
programme.desc: A rare in off the cuff dialogue with Anand at breakfast about his father and the true meaning of abundance, wealth, sex, power, fame… Then an epic hike up to 15,000 feet and a temple dedicated to service and unity at Hemkund Sahib and its glacial lake. Here, Tiffany and Elle are served great reminders of the teacher within.

programme.title: Road To Dharma - A Treacherous Ride Home
programme.desc: The longest moto ride of the trip awaits, after a grueling 20 day journey and coming down from Hemkund Sahib, we ride to Rishikesh, where the journey began. But nightfall might set in and cause troubles and challenges. As we know, challenges reveal who we are and the Ganga River serves up a challenge for our narrator Adam, as he learns a deep lesson foretold in episode one. Is the Ganga a mother?

programme.title: Road To Dharma - We are Greater than we know.
programme.desc: We finish at the Sacred Ganga River, where we began. The riders reflect on their journey and the idea of freedom has set in fully. It is our responsibility for choosing how we see the world. To embrace this power, It takes courage, discipline and strength. Something as Sacred as Freedom demands our totality. Thankfully, we are greater than we can imagine.

programme.title: Play To Win - Play To Win- Episode 1
programme.desc: "Play To Win" pits a group of contestants from around the world against one another for a chance to compete for a life-changing job or a six-figure coaching opportunity with the HIGDON GROUP.

programme.title: Play To Win - Play To Win- Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode contestants not only travel from the other side of the world to compete - but they overcome some of the most horrific stories you will ever hear in your life.

programme.title: Play To Win - Play To Win- Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode is all about HOW to demonstrate your worth and we've never seen so many people pour themselves out and completely rebuild like we saw in this episode.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World's Greatest Motivators - John Assaraf
programme.desc: John Assaraf, with cameo appearances by with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, Blaine Bartlett, and emcee, Paisley Demby.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Day 1 Distro
programme.desc: In the premiere episode of Fund Tank, viewers are introduced to Charlie Cimitile, an enterprising entrepreneur with a passion for the burgeoning cannabis industry. With a background in medical device sales, Charlie shares his journey of starting Day 1 Distro, an ancillary cannabis distribution company on the East Coast. Facing financial challenges and a desire for rapid growth, Charlie pitches his business to a panel of investors, laying out his vision for expanding his product offerings and capturing a larger market share.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Aptivio
programme.desc: Guy Mounier, the CEO of Aptivio, seeks a $500,000 investment to expand his AI-driven lead generation business. Aptivio's AI engine, similar to ChatGPT, analyzes online behavior to identify potential clients. However, the investors express concerns about market saturation and the clarity of Aptivio's value proposition.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Evidence Based Classroom Solutions
programme.desc: Chad Honeycutt, owner and CEO of Evidence-Based Classroom Solutions, pitches his business. Chad discusses how his company addresses the deficit in evidence-based services for students with disabilities, particularly autism and emotional disabilities, in public schools. Despite significant revenue growth, Chad seeks investment due to cash flow challenges, primarily caused by delays in insurance reimbursements. The panel expresses concerns about profitability and the need for clearer communication about the company's mission.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - PSA Security
programme.desc: Phil Fogarty, owner of PSA Security, discusses his business struggles and funding needs with Joe Camberato, CEO of National Business Capital. Phil's security company faced challenges during the COVID-19 pandemic but pivoted successfully to provide social distance monitoring services, leading to significant revenue growth. Despite increasing demand, cash flow constraints hinder further expansion. Phil emphasizes his motivation to succeed for his family and seeks guidance on refining his pitch and understanding financial metrics.

programme.title: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte - Part 1, Day 1 - Welcome
programme.desc: Day 1 welcomes you to Desire Mapping—an approach to living guided by how you want to feel, not just what you want to do. By shifting from goal lists to heart-centered intention, this introduction invites you to honor presence, intuition, and the feelings that shape a fulfilling life.

programme.title: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte - Part 1, Day 2-7
programme.desc: Desire Mapping guides you to live from the heart, focusing on how you want to feel rather than just what you want to do. Through practices like Soul Limber, appreciation, attention management, Core Desired Feelings, and exploring your inner selves, you gain clarity, agency, joy, and purpose in creating a fulfilling life.

programme.title: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte - Part 1, Day 8-10
programme.desc: Set down your Core Desired Feelings and explore the words that shape your inner world. This practice reveals patterns, clarifies your choices, and turns intention into living energy. Your feelings and words become a beacon, guiding you to live from the heart with focus and purpose.

programme.title: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte - The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3
programme.desc: Step into Intentional Creation using your Core Desired Feelings as your guide. Align actions with heart-centered intentions, release what no longer serves you, and transform your goals into sacred desires. Cultivate agency, joy, and flow as your inner world shapes your outer reality.

programme.title: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte - The Desire Map Part 4
programme.desc: Integrate your Core Desired Feelings through daily practice, reflection, and heart-centered rituals. Using mindfulness, breath, and prayer, cultivate sacred connection, peace, and purpose. Return to your heart each day, and let your love and clarity ripple into the world.

programme.title: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte - Part 1, Day 1 - Welcome
programme.desc: Day 1 welcomes you to Desire Mapping—an approach to living guided by how you want to feel, not just what you want to do. programme.desc: Integrate your Core Desired Feelings through daily practice, reflection, and heart-centered rituals. Using mindfulness, breath, and prayer, cultivate sacred connection, peace, and purpose. Return to your heart each day, and let your love and clarity ripple into the world.

programme.title: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier - Pull Up The Curtain - Eric Braeden
programme.desc: An In-Depth interview with Eric Braeden. Talks Young and The Restless, His Career, and Legacy

programme.title: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier - Pull Up The Curtain - Christopher Play Martin
programme.desc: An In-Depth interview with Christopher Play Martin. Talks House Party Movies, Career, and Kid ’N Play

programme.title: Pull Up The Curtain with G Souldier - Pull Up The Curtain - Cherie Johnson
programme.desc: An In-Depth interview with Cherie Johnson. Talks Punky Brewster, Family Matters, and Career

programme.title: Hope Is Here - Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1
programme.desc: HOPE IS HERE features inspiring and uplifting, relevant and refreshing, personal stories told by cancer survivors, their families, and the loved ones of those who lost the fight against this “emperor of all maladies” and sparked a movement that gives added meaning to their lives. Their moving stories show how the light of hope is salvaged from depths of despair.

programme.title: Hope Is Here - Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2
programme.desc: Lung cancer diagnoses for young, non-smoking individuals are a growing trend. But that didn't intimidate the athletic and courageous lung cancer patient, 21-year-old Jill Costello. Jill's fighting spirit and her desire to help find a cure and eradicate the stigma that only smokers contracted the disease would eventually define her legacy.

programme.title: Hope Is Here - Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3
programme.desc: Hank Baskett was given the grim diagnosis of stage 4 lung cancer almost ten years ago. At the time his thoughts were not of himself but of how he was going to tell his family. In episode 3 of Hope is Here we meet Hank and his family and learn how he was able to push forward towards health with a hopeful attitude and mission that his cancer journey would be, in his words, a joyful one.

programme.title: Hope Is Here - Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4
programme.desc: Gina Hollenbeck is positive about life. Every day she lives with an optimistic desire to overcome and thrive despite a stage 4 lung cancer diagnosis. As a young mother of two boys, she forges ahead towards a vibrant and meaningful journey with a mission to help find a cure for not only herself but for others who suffer from this deadly disease.

programme.title: Hope Is Here - Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5
programme.desc: Emily Bennett Taylor and her husband Miles were newlyweds with a bright future planned. Just as they were house hunting and talking about raising a family Emily received the news that she had stage 4 lung cancer. She and her husband recall their cancer journey and recount their determination to live life to its fullest while fighting for the chance to have children despite a grave cancer diagnosis.

programme.title: Hope Is Here - Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E6
programme.desc: Life can be full of hope and dreams. Lisa Briggs was enjoying a successful business, and a close-knit family while celebrating the arrival of her second child. Yet within months of giving birth Lisa was told the devastating news; she had stage 4 lung cancer. For an athletic, young woman who never smoked, the diagnosis seemed unreal. After the shock wore off, Lisa went into full action ahead as her will to live proved stronger than her devastating cancer.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
programme.desc: As humans, we need interconnection: We rely on others to survive, especially as children. Yet, we also strive for authenticity. This creates an inherent tension. In this lesson, Dr. Maté discusses what is true human nature — and how the modern world has warped our understanding of our needs.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
programme.desc: Trauma is a wound that you sustain; it's not what happened to you. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains why traumatic wounds get triggered and how to understand triggers in your process of transformation and healing.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
programme.desc: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
programme.desc: Suffering has deep social causes. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains how your physiology is impacted by stress and social determinants.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - Understanding Addiction
programme.desc: Addiction is neither a choice you make or an unavoidable disease. It’s an attempt to solve a problem. The conundrum is… it almost works.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
programme.desc: Expressions of healthy anger are different from unhealthy anger. Dr. Maté articulates the difference and discusses the increased health risks when healthy anger is repressed.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - What Does Health Look Like?
programme.desc: What is the meaning of health? In this lesson, you’ll learn what health looks like and how to approach healing with compassionate inquiry and healthy disillusionment.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Kids of Valor Academy
programme.desc: Mona Jackson, owner of Kids of Valor Academy, seeks funding of $600,000 to support her childcare business, which currently operates four locations. Mona shares her inspiring journey, highlighting her commitment to providing affordable childcare in urban areas, driven by her own experiences as a teen mother. She plans to expand her academy to seven locations and aims to create a safe haven for women leaving domestic violence situations. Mona discusses her revenue, profitability, and organizational structure, emphasizing her all-female management team and the positive impact she aims to make in her community.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Invisishield
programme.desc: Steve Perez pitches his business, Invisishield, which specializes in automotive accessories for OEMs and dealerships. Facing cash flow challenges exacerbated by multiple merchant cash advances, Perez seeks funding to consolidate debt, purchase materials, and acquire equipment.

programme.title: SHARING THE HARVEST
programme.desc: SHARING THE HARVEST follows farmers who reject conventional agriculture's growth pressures. Filmmaker Philipp Petruch explores three solidarity farming initiatives aiming to build sustainable, community-supported food systems. Through community, courage, and a new consumer-producer relationship, they show how we can transform agriculture - and the world.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Teach Your Heart Out
programme.desc: Mother-daughter duo Tosha Wright and Lisa Dunnigan from Teach Your Heart Out seek $600,000 in funding to propel their educational conference business to new heights. With a mission to rejuvenate and empower educators nationwide, they share their inspiring journey and ambitious plans with the panel of experts. Despite facing challenges such as the impact of COVID-19 on educational conferences and the need for strategic expansion, Tosha and Lisa impress with their passion and dedication to their cause.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Inspired Performance Institute
programme.desc: Dr. Don Wood, CEO and founder of the Inspired Performance Institute, seeks funding to scale his groundbreaking trauma resolution program. With a mission to revolutionize mental health treatment, Dr. Wood's program, TIPP, boasts a remarkable 90% success rate in alleviating post-traumatic stress, anxiety, and depression. Rooted in his personal journey to save his daughter from chronic illness, Dr. Wood's method resets the mind's response to trauma, yielding rapid and lasting results in just four hours. Despite financial challenges, Dr. Wood's vision to reach millions drives his pursuit of strategic partnerships and media exposure, highlighting the transformative potential of his innovative approach to healing.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - The Delta
programme.desc: Restaurant owner Eldridge Williams takes center stage, seeking $750,000 to propel his beloved establishment, The Delta, to new heights. With a vibrant personality and a deep passion for hospitality, Eldridge shares his journey from Memphis to Chicago, where he crafted The Delta's unique ambiance inspired by the Mississippi Delta's culture. Despite facing challenges, including the impact of COVID-19 on revenue, Eldridge's vision for scalability shines through, anchored by his signature dish, tamales.

programme.title: Fund Tank - Fund Tank - Energized Health
programme.desc: John and Chelsea Jubilee from Energized Health seek $1 million to grow their thriving health business. With their unique scientific protocol targeting intracellular hydration, they aim to address the root cause of illness and disease. As the panel examines the intricacies of their business, including financials and expansion plans, concerns emerge regarding the practicality of rapid scaling, leading to a concentrated discussion on optimizing cash flow and enhancing profitability within the existing framework through marketing refinement and potential subscription models.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
programme.desc: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
programme.desc: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
programme.desc: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Science and Spirit (Arielle Ford)
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with Mark Anthony, who is known as the “Psychic Lawyer,” about the intersection of science & spirit. His latest book is “The Afterlife Frequency: The Scientific Proof of Spiritual Contact & How That Awareness Will Change Your Life.”

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Thriving in Later Years
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with retired therapist Connie Zweig, who says it’s possible to thrive as we age. She is an expert in the shadow self" & teaches aging as a spiritual practice. Her latest book is “The Inner Work of Age: Shifting from Role to Soul.”"

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Thriving in Later Years (Arielle Ford)
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with retired therapist Connie Zweig, who says it’s possible to thrive as we age. She is an expert in the shadow self" & teaches aging as a spiritual practice. Her latest book is “The Inner Work of Age: Shifting from Role to Soul.”

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - Healing Trauma
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with psychiatrist Dr. Paul Conti on the invisible epidemic which impacts us all on some level. He believes it’s trauma. A graduate of Stanford University & former chief resident at Harvard, he is a leading trauma treatment expert.

programme.title: HealthDay - Which Diet Trends are Most Effective?
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll be breaking down several popular diets and eating routines and looking at the different effects they can have on your body.

programme.title: HealthDay - Supporting Kids and Teens
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll be looking at some of the top health and wellness issues affecting children and adolescents in 2022, including diabetes, long COVID, and mental health.

programme.title: HealthDay - Secrets to Good Sleep
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll talk with health experts about the importance of sleep, sharing different techniques and tips that can improve your sleep schedule and help you to wake up each morning feeling rested and refreshed.

programme.title: HealthDay - Mental Health and Depression
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll talk with a group of nurses about their experiences dealing with increased workplace violence and harassment during the COVID-19 pandemic. We’ll also go over the effects of COVID-19 and irregular sleep patterns on depression in children and adults.

programme.title: HealthDay - Improving Heart Health
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll talk with the chair of last year’s American Heart Association Scientific Sessions on new diet guidelines and programs to combat health inequity. We’ll also share tips on improving your heart health and identifying potential symptoms of heart damage and disease.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - WeNatal: Reversing Infertility and PCOS + How Men Play a Role in Fertility
programme.desc: Why has infertility become so normal? Better yet – why are women the only one’s taking on the burden of infertility? The statistics on the amount of women struggling with PCOS (making them infertile) are only rising and with men being responsible for 50% of infertility, the conversation needs to change.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Dr. Darshan Shah: The Most Important Habits to Prevent an Early Death from a Longevity Expert
programme.desc: What if the key to a vibrant, healthy life lies in returning to our ancestral roots? In this episode of Rooted in Wellness, I’m joined by Dr. Darshan Shah who works to merge ancient healing practices with modern-day science to help his patients extend both their lifespan and more importantly, their healthspan.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Rooted In Wellness - FC Lisa Odenweller EP 10
programme.desc: Between work, family, and wellness, many women feel like they're running on empty. Mona shares empowering tools and mindset shifts to help women balance it all—without burning out. Fulfillment is possible when you root into what matters.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More
programme.desc: Did you know a large part of your immune system resides in your gut? Our gut microbiome plays a huge role in our overall health but oftentimes have been overlooked as nothing but a digestive workhorse.

programme.title: Get Your Yoga On - Practice Downward Facing Dog
programme.desc: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.

programme.title: Get Your Yoga On Series - Practice Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for a short, gentle practice that is centered around core engagement and the plank pose

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation - Meditations for Manifestation - Emotions
programme.desc: Cultivate a judgment free attitude as you explore the inner world of your thoughts and feelings.

programme.title: Global Yogi - Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World's Greatest Motivators - Bob Proctor
programme.desc: Bob Proctor, with cameo appearances by Les Brown, David Meltzer, Mary Morrissey and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators - World's Greatest Motivators - Les Brown
programme.desc: Les Brown, with cameo appearances by Bob Proctor, David Meltzer, Mary Morrissey and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard

programme.title: Smart Life - Smart Life S1E24
programme.desc: Ask the Experts with Dr. Harlan Selesnick, Cavities with Dr. Jose Blanco

programme.title: Sounds of Coherence - The Coherence of Sound Healing - With Kathleen Riley and Jonathan Goldman
programme.desc: The driving purpose of the show is to bring to the world an understanding of the power of conscious music, sounds of coherence, and the intention behind it.

programme.title: Zoom Meditation - Zoom Meditation with Dr. Sister Jenna
programme.desc: During this time in 2020 of staying at home, Sister Jenna interviews people from across the nation as they share their personal stories about meditation.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
programme.desc: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
programme.desc: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
programme.desc: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.

programme.title: The Wright Turn - The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Practical Spirituality with Dr. Joe Vitale
programme.desc: Shari chats with Dr. Joe Vitale, bestselling author and spiritual teacher, about practical spirituality, conquering inner saboteurs, and his book Zero Limits Living. Plus, a joyful face-off challenge!

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - How to Be Brave with Laura Di Franco
programme.desc: Laura di Franco, founder of Brave Healer Productions, shares her vision for Brave Healer and the power of authentic messages. Plus, authors Angel Rohrer and Carolyne McGee discuss bravery, spirituality, and their books.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Secret to Success with Comedian Eric Schwartz
programme.desc: Comedian Eric Schwartz brings laughs and success tips to Good Morning Joy! Plus, Gary Vee surprises us with an interview on discovering true joy, and Friendly City Florals spreads happiness on The Joy Report!

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Glimmer of Hope with Hollywood Stuntwoman Kimberly Shannon Murphy
programme.desc: Shari sits down with stuntwoman and author Kimberly Shannon Murphy to discuss resilience, overcoming trauma, and her book Glimmer: A Story of Survival, Hope, and Healing. Plus, they face off in an action-packed game you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: Fantastic Fungi: Remastered
programme.desc: Fantastic Fungi Remastered is a breathtaking journey into the hidden world of mycelium. Through stunning imagery and expert insights, the film reveals fungi’s beauty, intelligence, and power to heal, inspire, and offer solutions for our planet’s future.

programme.title: HEAL
programme.desc: Director Kelly Noonan Gores’ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.

programme.title: (LIVE) Luminescence: A Woman's Health and Longevity Summit
programme.desc: Luminescence is a women's health and longevity summit for women to receive the wisdom and encouragement they deserve to thrive. Watch LIVE on Feb. 1!

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life - Vinyasa for Life: Shoulder & Wrist Mobility
programme.desc: Did you know you can floss your shoulder blades? You’ll earn the fundamentals of good shoulder health—including what's your scapula and what it does—in this arm-focused class. You’ll begin by warming the shoulders and opening the front of the chest, followed by exercises to strengthen and align the wrists.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life - Vinyasa for Life: Front Shoulders Feelin' Fine
programme.desc: Explore your newfound spaciousness in this shoulder lovin' class. Waste no time waking up the wrists, then move through variations of Low Lunge (Anjaneyasana) with Cactus Arms before building to Side Plank (Vasisthasana). Counter those actions with Eagle Arms for a deep stretch across the upper back and some seated twisting.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life - Vinyasa for Life: Gliding Into the Overhead Plane
programme.desc: Get the arms up and those shoulder blades sliding! Start with a shoulder warmup as Schuyler teaches proper alignment when lifting the arms overhead. Then get into side body strengthening and visit Downward Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana). Finish with some handstand playtime at the wall and a savory chest opener.

programme.title: Breath, Body, Beats with Schuyler Grant - Breath, Body, Beats with Schuyler Grant - Day 1: Breathing with the Beats
programme.desc: Welcome to Day 1! Congratulations on making this powerful commitment to yourself and giving yourself the gift of flow state. Research shows that if you cultivate the flow state in your daily life, the benefits touch every part of your life—job performance, peace of mind, creativity, and your own sense of purpose. Connecting to the breath is that powerful. Remember that it’s important to have your blocks and yoga blanket or thick towel. If you find yourself empty-handed, you can always DIY your own. In this first class, you will learn key postures and proper shoulder alignment to establish a foundation for this challenge. (Upcoming classes include less talking and more flowing, but this one is important for everything that follows, so stick with it!)

programme.title: Breath, Body, Beats with Schuyler Grant - Breath, Body, Beats with Schuyler Grant - Day 2: Setting Up the Side Body
programme.desc: We walk around having a palpable experience of both our brain and our body. But we rarely attend to the breath. Yet the breath is the link between your mind and your body—the seen and the unseen. It’s the great constant of your life. Today, we work with the breath while paying attention to the side body. These crucial stretches help lengthen the abdominals, hips, and thighs, all while improving spinal flexibility and expanding the rib cage—great for facilitating deeper breathing. Ease through various standing poses and side stretches in Chair (Utkatasana) and Warrior 2 (Virabhadrasana II), finding ample opportunity to elongate the side body and invite in the breath. Savor this beginning.

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class - The Wellness Master Class: Setting Intentions with Clarity
programme.desc: Today we learn how to ask those better questions and use the answers to achieve more for ourselves and our community.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life - Vinyasa for Life: Shoulder & Wrist Mobility
programme.desc: Did you know you can floss your shoulder blades? You’ll earn the fundamentals of good shoulder health—including what's your scapula and what it does—in this arm-focused class. programme.title: The Wellness Master Class - The Wellness Master Class: Setting Intentions with Clarity
programme.desc: Today we learn how to ask those better questions and use the answers to achieve more for ourselves and our community.

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class - The Wellness Master Class: Cultivating Joy
programme.desc: We experience two types of joy. One is momentary, when something funny happens or a nice word is said in passing and we laugh or smile - for a bit, we’re filled with joy. The other is long term and lasting, sustained by gratitude and a life of meaning and purpose. If we’re waiting on joy to enter our life, we’re not living as connected or congruent as we could be.

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class - The Wellness Master Class: Overcoming Overwhelm
programme.desc: Today we learn the first step to dealing with overwhelm - settling firm boundaries.

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - What Are Expressions of Healthy Anger?
programme.desc: Expressions of healthy anger are different from unhealthy anger. Dr. Maté articulates the difference and discusses the increased health risks when healthy anger is repressed.
