programme.title: Road To Dharma - Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
programme.desc: Emptiness and Power in the Gap. The stunning Tungnath Peak at 13,000 ft, the Feminine Temple above the Masculine. Ken goes from rational doubter to having an experience beyond understanding that relates to his deceased sister. Unfortunately, the experience is tainted by ignorance and the seemingly inspiring day is further marred when Anna has an accident…

programme.title: A Return To Wholeness - A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
programme.desc: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.

programme.title: Boobs: The War On Women's Breast
programme.desc: The films investigates the controversy swirling around the breast cancer screening test mammography.

programme.title: GasHole
programme.desc: From claims of buried technology which drastically improves gas mileage, to bureaucratic governmental roadblocks, to consumers’ reluctance to embrace alternatives, GAS HOLE provides a detailed examination of America’s continued dependence on foreign oil and sheds light on the economic and sociological forces that have contributed to that dependence.

programme.title: HEAL
programme.desc: Director Kelly Noonan Gores’ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.

programme.title: The Highest Pass
programme.desc: Part heart-pounding adventure, part spiritual quest, THE HIGHEST PASS, a feature length documentary, premiered in Los Angeles to sold out audiences. The award-winning film shares the journey of seven seekers, including one who has never ridden a motorcycle, who follow a guru with a Vedic death prophecy on a moto journey up to the highest pass of the Indian Himalayas. Over 21 days and up to an elevation of 18,000 feet along a winding road, they never let low oxygen, altitude sickness, river-flooded roads, icy edges, snow and loaded trucks dampen their spirits or, ultimately, their deeper selves.

programme.title: Boobs: The War On Women's Breast
programme.desc: The films investigates the controversy swirling around the breast cancer screening test mammography.

programme.title: Adventures in Plymptoons
programme.desc: Adventures in Plymptoons! goes deep inside the method and madness of America’s most independent animator, Bill Plympton.

programme.title: Yoga For All - Day 4: Ease
programme.desc: Your Day 4 practice provides you the opportunity to lean in when you feel discomfort to embrace the process of finding ease. Discover layers of your home practice as we look at our patterns and continue to build a dynamic vocabulary that serves.

programme.title: Qigong: The Eight Brocades - Qigong: The Eight Brocades - Day 3
programme.desc: This practice begins by tending to both the Yin and Yang meridians in your body. You’ll start with a soothing self-massage, which is beneficial to the health of your vagus nerve, especially if you experience overwhelm or often feel depleted. Allow yourself to feel calm and bright as you practice the fifth and sixth Silk Brocades.

programme.title: Yoga For All - Day 7: Prana
programme.desc: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare - Day 9: Detoxification
programme.desc: Today we’ll address the ways different metabolic and environmental toxins make their way into your system and how your body eliminates them. We’ll learn to look for excess buildup of these toxins and how to boost your own ability to process them.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare - COMMUNE-Dr Hyman, Hacking Healthcare-Day 4: Hormones
programme.desc: What could a hormone imbalance look like for you?

programme.title: Yoga For All - Day 4: Ease
programme.desc: Your Day 4 practice provides you the opportunity to lean in when you feel discomfort to embrace the process of finding ease. Discover layers of your home practice as we look at our patterns and continue to build a dynamic vocabulary that serves.

programme.title: Qigong: The Eight Brocades - Qigong: The Eight Brocades - Day 3
programme.desc: This practice begins by tending to both the Yin and Yang meridians in your body. You’ll start with a soothing self-massage, which is beneficial to the health of your vagus nerve, especially if you experience overwhelm or often feel depleted. Allow yourself to feel calm and bright as you practice the fifth and sixth Silk Brocades.

programme.title: Yoga For All - Day 7: Prana
programme.desc: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare - Day 9: Detoxification
programme.desc: Today we’ll address the ways different metabolic and environmental toxins make their way into your system and how your body eliminates them. We’ll learn to look for excess buildup of these toxins and how to boost your own ability to process them.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare - COMMUNE-Dr Hyman, Hacking Healthcare-Day 4: Hormones
programme.desc: What could a hormone imbalance look like for you?

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity - The Emerging Science of Longevity: Secrets to Healthy Aging
programme.desc: The body has inherent systems to slow and even reverse aging. When you activate these systems you increase stem cell production, reduce inflammation, increase antioxidant enzymes, build muscle, lose fat, and increase cognitive capacity.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - Practical Spirituality with Dr. Joe Vitale
programme.desc: Shari chats with Dr. Joe Vitale, bestselling author and spiritual teacher, about practical spirituality, conquering inner saboteurs, and his book Zero Limits Living. Plus, a joyful face-off challenge!

programme.title: Good Morning Joy - Good Morning Joy - How to Be Brave with Laura Di Franco
programme.desc: Laura di Franco, founder of Brave Healer Productions, shares her vision for Brave Healer and the power of authentic messages. Plus, authors Angel Rohrer and Carolyne McGee discuss bravery, spirituality, and their books.

programme.title: The Aware Show - The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed
programme.desc: Lisa Garr talks with Fast Company Senior writer Nicole LaPorte. She researched the divide between the haves & have-nots including examining the vicious competitiveness of college admissions, bribes & lack of ethics within certain departments.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - WeNatal: Reversing Infertility and PCOS + How Men Play a Role in Fertility
programme.desc: Why has infertility become so normal? Better yet – why are women the only one’s taking on the burden of infertility? The statistics on the amount of women struggling with PCOS (making them infertile) are only rising and with men being responsible for 50% of infertility, the conversation needs to change.

programme.title: Sex Talk - Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex
programme.desc: Why young Americans are having less sex than ever before. Plus, how having a good time in the bedroom can help you in the boardroom.

programme.title: HealthDay - Maternity Risks
programme.desc: We’re joined by the president and CEO of March of Dimes to discuss the risks that pregnant women — particularly women of color — still face in the United States.

programme.title: GasHole
programme.desc: From claims of buried technology which drastically improves gas mileage, to bureaucratic governmental roadblocks, to consumers’ reluctance to embrace alternatives, GAS HOLE provides a detailed examination of America’s continued dependence on foreign oil and sheds light on the economic and sociological forces that have contributed to that dependence.

programme.title: Land of Little Rivers
programme.desc: The Land of Little Rivers, a network of tributaries in the Catskill Mountains of New York, is the birthplace of fly fishing in America and home to anglers obsessed by the sport.

programme.title: Cancer: The Integrative Perspective
programme.desc: Cancer: The Integrative Perspective takes a deep dive into the fast-expanding paradigm of holistic and integrative wellness approaches for preventing and reversing cancer that treats the disease with conventional tools, while also supporting patients’ strength, stamina and quality of life with evidence-based natural therapies.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency - Section 1: The Addiction Frequency & The Power of Breath
programme.desc: Breathing is the single most important thing we do. Addiction is characterized by a sense of lack, of missing something. And when you breathe poorly, like when anxious or angry, you’re caught up in your head and aren’t breathing well and that sends a signal to your body that perpetuates the addiction frequency. Deep, long breathing is how we interrupt this pattern.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency - Break Out of the Addiction Frequency: Q&A
programme.desc: Questios and Answers for the series, Break Out of the Addiction Frequency.

programme.title: GURU - BHAGWAN HIS SECRETARY AND HIS BODYGUARD
programme.desc: The rise of guru Bhagwan and his model commune in Poona and oregon in the 1970s & 1980s told by his former close disciples, his personal secretary and bodyguard. A spiritual journey to the depths and shallows of the human soul.

programme.title: ALCOHOL - THE MAGIC POTION
programme.desc: Alcohol is the world’s most powerful drug. Four billion people drink it regularly and the number is rising. Of the world’s 30 countries with the highest per capita alcohol consumption, no fewer than 26 are in Europe. Big business with 3 million victims each year. But who profits from all this?

programme.title: Navigating Perimenopause and Menopause - Navigating Perimenopause and Menopause: Part 1 - Healthy Hormones, Happy Life
programme.desc: Welcome to a new and empowering way of thinking about perimenopause and menopause. Whether you’re coming to this course for help with a particular concern, such as weight gain or chronic fatigue, or you’re looking for a holistic approach to living your best life well past 40, Dr. Sara Gottfried has helped thousands of women heal their hormones and reclaim their right to thrive. Welcome to the course!

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life - Vinyasa for Life: From Cobra to Camel
programme.desc: This vinyasa class applies what you learned in Day 1 so you can play with classic backbends and steady transitions. Schuyler guides you through Cobra (Bhujangasana), Locust (Salabhasana), and Camel (Ustrasana), finishing off with Bridge (Setu Bandhasana) and spine-clearing twists. Take it slow and build strength!

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life - Vinyasa for Life: Easing into Back Bending
programme.desc: Establish long term success for your practice by learning about one of the most crucial body parts in yoga—your spine. In this class Schuyler teaches you how to backbend safely, followed by three practical applications. Class ends with a soothing restorative posture. Body awareness never felt so good.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life - Vinyasa for Life: Forward Bending for Forward Thinking
programme.desc: Use what you learned in Day 4 to stretch the hamstrings and your backbody safely and effectively. Bring attention to your spine in Downward Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana) and Intense Side Stretch (Parsvottanasana), before working on Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose (Padangusthasana) with a strap. Finish in a supported backbend to counter your diligent forward folding.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life - Vinyasa for Life: Foundations of Forward Bending
programme.desc: In this class, you begin with a brief anatomy of forward folds, followed by a dive into Standing Forward Fold (Uttanasana) and Wide-Legged Forward Fold (Prasarita Padottanasana). Regardless of your flexibility, this lab is designed to help you to safely find length through the entire back chain of your body.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 1
programme.desc: Human biology is a symphony played between the body and the greater nature around us. The great conductor of that symphony, in many ways, is the gut and microbiome. This course will take a multifaceted look at this organ system � which is our primary interface with the chemistry of the world � so you can get an understanding of how to co-create health and well-being.

programme.title: The Superpowers of Your Gut - The Superpowers of Your Gut - Day 2
programme.desc: You have an intimate relationship with everything you put in your mouth. The tongue is a magical instrument for you to start to remember the power of flavor and nutrients, to slow it down and experience food again.

programme.title: Rooted In Wellness - Hannah Kleinfeld: Gut Health and the Microbiome: Improving and Maintaining the Microbiome with Probiotics + More
programme.desc: Did you know a large part of your immune system resides in your gut? Our gut microbiome plays a huge role in our overall health but oftentimes have been overlooked as nothing but a digestive workhorse.

programme.title: Road To Dharma - Freedom in the Gap at Tungnath
programme.desc: Emptiness and Power in the Gap. The stunning Tungnath Peak at 13,000 ft, the Feminine Temple above the Masculine. Ken goes from rational doubter to having an experience beyond understanding that relates to his deceased sister. Unfortunately, the experience is tainted by ignorance and the seemingly inspiring day is further marred when Anna has an accident…

programme.title: Sports Woman
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, we deal with athletes who have never given up.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Tiger Woods took control of golf between 1999 and April 2001, by winning five of the six major tournaments and adjudicating the Tiger Slam.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: After a brief absence of trophies, Spain returned to the summit of European football in 2024.

programme.title: Heroines
programme.desc: Women rarely have the chance to compete with men in achievement, but they have done so occasionally with spectacular results.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Rory Mcllroy, Lorena Ochoa, Michelle Wie, Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson are all icons in the world of golf.

programme.title: Star Rated
programme.desc: Your favourite sports stars observed away from the ground in 'Star Rated'!

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: The Spaniard Mac Marquez shook MotoGP up from 2013 onwards, winning six of the seven world titles in the Premier Class category.

programme.title: Top 20
programme.desc: The TOP 20 is an exclusive collation of the news and the champions causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Top 20
programme.desc: The TOP 20 is the ranking of the news and champions causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: Football Stars
programme.desc: The stars of Hollywood are buying football clubs.

programme.title: Chill
programme.desc: Chill takes on the difficult task of being a judge of the Freeride World Tour. The Crashed Ice Series brings the Ice Cross descent right in the middle of St Paul in Minnesota.

programme.title: Sports Woman

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 172
programme.desc: Discover the stunning Pershing GTX116, the iconic Donzi XLV at PIBS, the rugged Tidewater 3100 Carolina Bay, and the luxurious Nordhavn N 51 Awanui in this episode, showcasing performance, adventure, and unparalleled craftsmanship.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 179
programme.desc: Experience the elegance of the Riva 82 Diva and the innovative design of the MJM 4 in this episode, showcasing luxury and performance in modern yachting.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 181
programme.desc: This episode showcases two Italian icons: the exhilarating Pershing GTX70 Sport Yacht, a 35-knot performance cruiser with a stunning fold-out beach club, and the ultimate luxury sailing escape aboard a Sailuxe Spartivento crewed catamaran, featuring five-star service and gourmet cuisine.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 188
programme.desc: The segment showcased four key boats: the Prestige M7 luxury power catamaran, the long-range, efficient Grand Banks 62 motor yacht, the versatile Regal 43 SAV sport vessel with fold-down terraces, and the rugged offshore fishing center console Boston Whaler 280 Outrage.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 192
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to performance and versatility, highlighting the 50-knot Italian maxi-RIB Mar.co E44 with its luxury cabin. It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 200
programme.desc: We dive into the raw power and timeless lines of the Baia Atlantica 84 before shifting gears to the stylish versatility of the Ranieri International 255 SL

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 199
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the sheer elegance of the new Swan 128 flagship and take a high-speed look at the versatile Ranieri Sauvage 24

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 204
programme.desc: Admire the sleek lines and performance-driven design of the Solaris 55, then celebrate four decades of nautical history with the special edition Ranieri Azzurra 40th

programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to performance and versatility, highlighting the 50-knot Italian maxi-RIB Mar.co E44 with its luxury cabin. It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 200
programme.desc: We dive into the raw power and timeless lines of the Baia Atlantica 84 before shifting gears to the stylish versatility of the Ranieri International 255 SL

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 199
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the sheer elegance of the new Swan 128 flagship and take a high-speed look at the versatile Ranieri Sauvage 24

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 204
programme.desc: Admire the sleek lines and performance-driven design of the Solaris 55, then celebrate four decades of nautical history with the special edition Ranieri Azzurra 40th

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 172
programme.desc: Discover the stunning Pershing GTX116, the iconic Donzi XLV at PIBS, the rugged Tidewater 3100 Carolina Bay, and the luxurious Nordhavn N 51 Awanui in this episode, showcasing performance, adventure, and unparalleled craftsmanship.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 179
programme.desc: Experience the elegance of the Riva 82 Diva and the innovative design of the MJM 4 in this episode, showcasing luxury and performance in modern yachting.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 181
programme.desc: This episode showcases two Italian icons: the exhilarating Pershing GTX70 Sport Yacht, a 35-knot performance cruiser with a stunning fold-out beach club, and the ultimate luxury sailing escape aboard a Sailuxe Spartivento crewed catamaran, featuring five-star service and gourmet cuisine.

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 188
programme.desc: The segment showcased four key boats: the Prestige M7 luxury power catamaran, the long-range, efficient Grand Banks 62 motor yacht, the versatile Regal 43 SAV sport vessel with fold-down terraces, and the rugged offshore fishing center console Boston Whaler 280 Outrage.

It also covers three premier US fishing boats: the wide-beamed Southport 38 FE (PBIBS 2025), the serious offshore Bertram 39 CC (PBIBS 2025), and the versatile hybrid bay boat Blackfin 262 HB (MIBS 2025).

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 1
programme.desc: Explore with us the beautiful Cala del Forte Marina, right beside Monaco, the let's discover together the shipyard of Silent Yachts, and the Elan i43

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 2
programme.desc: Maurizio Bulleri takes us on board the Invictus TT420. Then let's sail together on the Swan 55 Alegher

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 3
programme.desc: Performance, speed, power and style with OTAM 58 GTS and Sunseeker Predator 65

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 4
programme.desc: Bill Hackett shows us the Extra Yachts X96, while Bacci Del Buono enjoys a ride with the MarCo R-Evolution 26. Pardo E60 closes this episode of The Boat Show

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 5
programme.desc: Are you ready for speed, choppy waters and sportiness? Jump on board the Ribco Venom 44. A nice marine touch on the Riviera 78 Motoryacht, innovation on the Arksen 30

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 6
programme.desc: Some tech talk with Simrad before discovering together how an MJM boat is made! Then let's jump on board Sunseeker Superhawk 55

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 7
programme.desc: From the amazing speed of the Phenom 37 to the calm luxury of the Prestige M8. Then let's take a look at the Jupiter 40

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 8
programme.desc: How about visiting Venice with a little wooden boat powered by Yanmar? Then we fly to Miami for an overview of the Brunswick brands and a quick look at the Cranchi A46

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 9
programme.desc: Let’s sail together on the beautiful sea of Sardinia. 500 Offshore: is that a boat or a car?

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 10
programme.desc: A traditional boat with a new touch: Apreamare Gozzo 35 Speedster. Maria Elisa Altese introduces us to the world of Denison Yachting. Amazing regattas at the Ice Cup

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 11
programme.desc: With Bill Hackett on board Phenom 34, on the water of Naples with the Salpa Soleil 24.5 and then in Dusseldorf for the Sunbeam 32.1

programme.title: The Boat Show – Episode 12
programme.desc: On the rollercoaster with The Boat Show! Let’s start slowly in Venice with Venmar Lido 32, at full speed with Valhalla 55 and slowly again with Jeanneau

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
With the end of the season looming, Crouchy, Chris and Statman take a minute to look back at some of their biggest hits and misses throughout the past 9 months.
We look at some of the runaway successes of the season and some of the more sh*thousery moments (Sam Allardyce comparing himself to Pep springs to mind)
We also have a very special voice note from the one and only Jose Enrique who finally puts to bed the one question on everyone’s minds…..if he’s guilty of THAT Gucci slippers purchase
And with the season almost at its end, the boys decide its time to put some planning into the coveted That Peter Crouch Podcast Awards night so watch this space.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchfest 2 is here! Access all areas with Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave at Wembley Arena to experience a night that was scarcely believable! You'll see what happens backstage at Crouchfest and the amazing lineup and crowd who have all signed up to take part without really knowing what to expect! Come inside the dressing room as well as experience the best parts of the show on stage!
When an evening! Including performances from Kasabian, Paul Potts, Olly Murs and the finest UK Garage MCs, Joel Stewart's Mike Dean Song, plus David James as a landlord and frequent visits to the Samrat, you never quite know which direction it's going to turn next...
Peter, Chris, Dave and the pod team would like to thank everyone who played a role in the event and for everyone who bought tickets to see the show. An unforgettable night like Crouchfest 2 is only possible because of the loyalty and fun that all of you bring. Cheers!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch reveals all the things that footballers, managers and coaches discuss at a team meeting... You'll learn about which managers dominate the room, the softer tactics employed by others and what happens when the gaffer loses the dressing room?! Chris Stark and Statman Dave discuss more ideas for Crouchfest and Crouchy reveals why David Beckham holds a special place in his bedroom...

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Ahead of last weeks clash of the titans at the Premier League Darts Final, Crouchy, Chris and Statman sit down with some of the legends of the sport to pick their brains on what qualities it takes to become a pro darter in 2023
The lads are joined by Jonny Clayton, Gerwyn Price, Michael van Gerwen and Michael Smith who give insights into their glittering careers and what they are hoping to accomplish over the coming season.
They are also on hand to give some top tips to the lads on how to improve their own form, culminating in a nine dart, winner takes all, tournament at the end of the podcast - so watch this space.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: What footballers really think about each other! It's time to take a look at B*tchy Players! It's just a few days until Crouchfest and we've decided to hand this podcast over to you, the listener. It's Peter Crouch's favourite episode of the series as you - the viewers and listeners take control and get to ask a member of the Premier League 100 club anything you like! The main theme is how b*tchy strikers can be about the rest of the squad(!) especially those pesky goalkeepers Rambo! AND Peter Crouch answers questions about making body parts disappear, playing Monopoly and there's a final update on Crouchfest! Crouchy issues a warning for event organisers as well as a serious discussion about when players get 'too comfy' at an elite football club.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
After a whirlwind couple of weeks which has seen the lads brushing shoulders with movie stars and legends of the game, Crouchy, Chris and Statman are back in their safe space doing what they do best….chatting sh*t over a couple of cold ones.
With a brief cameo from San Marino to check in on Chris’ ball health, Pete also takes a bit of a grilling for his recent #BBQc antics.
In Swap Shop, we finally procure a swap worthy of the boots worn by Charlie Adams during last years midges dick challenge - who knew Jose Enrique would be the hero we didn’t think we would all need?
The lads also take a look at some of their personal icons of the game with legends like George Best, Maradona and Kerry Dixon all getting honourable shout outs.
Enjoy this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Ahead of recording in the pub, Aaron agreed to take the podcast team on a tour of the Emirates and surrounding areas. You'll learn which Arsenal legend has set a challenge for one of the current squad, the agenda for the podcast recording and all the best bits of club history around Highbury and Arsenal.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s Friday review podcast, we find out the results of Chris following his heart over his head last week for the Manchester derby (spoiler alert it didn’t pan out)
We also hear from the Minister of Mischief who has personally sent us a letter to give us some tantalising hints on how we can supersize this mofo when it comes the lads forfeits - so keep your ideas coming in.
Looking ahead to this weekend’s games, the lads throw down their predictions for the Newcastle v Arsenal, Spurs v Chelsea and Burnley v Palace.
There are also some honourable shoutouts to the one and only Kanye West and we hear about the time Stoke City signed a fish finger
Enjoy!

programme.title: Harry Redknapp Will Love This!
programme.desc: Peter Crouch & Jermain Defoe! Harry Redknapp's going to love this episode! The podcast reunites one of the Premier League's most iconic duos. Jermain Defoe heads to the pub with Crouchy, Chris Stark and Statman Dave to discuss his relationship with Peter Crouch, when strikers become 'too selfish' and where his obsession with scoring goals came from! There's initial scepticism about the role of stats plus a complaint from friend of the pod Aaron Ramsdale! It's a Jermain Defoe Podcast!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouch and Chris are joined by the man, the myth, the legend that is Lee Hendrie.
The lads discuss some of the changing room antics that went down during their time at the Villa as well as some of their BIG night outs on the town.
The lads are also privileged enough to to be given an insight in to some of the more difficult periods in Lee’s life and just how he was able to overcome them.
With a career in football that spanned nearly 25 years, it is safe to say Lee has seen more than his fair share both on and off the field with a lot of those antics involving the big man himself.
This could be one of our most entertaining guests of the season so far….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouch and Chris are joined by the man, the myth, the legend that is Lee Hendrie.
The lads discuss some of the changing room antics that went down during their time at the Villa as well as some of their BIG night outs on the town.
The lads are also privileged enough to to be given an insight in to some of the more difficult periods in Lee’s life and just how he was able to overcome them.
With a career in football that spanned nearly 25 years, it is safe to say Lee has seen more than his fair share both on and off the field with a lot of those antics involving the big man himself.
This could be one of our most entertaining guests of the season so far….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Joining Chris, Crouchy and Notorious this week, is Tottenham legend and one of Pete’s OG friends in football…..Ledley King!
One of the few giants of the game that dedicated their whole professional career to one team, Ledley has seen more than most down the White Hart Lane - having been present for both of the big man’s stints for the North London stalwarts.
Ledley also lifts the lid on some of the antics that the lads went through, from England training camps to big nights out with the boys, it’s fair to say Ledley doesn’t pull any punches when it comes to exposing some of Crouchy’s most memorable moments.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouch and Chris sit down with West Ham legend Julian Dicks to discuss his iconic role in shaping the hammer’s team during his 11 year reign at the club between 88-99.
‘The Terminator’ sheds light on his absolute power penalties, all or nothing winning mentality and aversion to all things flight simulator related (sorry Starky)
Outside of football, we also hear what Dicksy would have been if it wasn’t for the beautiful game and how a knee injury almost turned him into the UK’s answer to Tiger Woods.
We also FINALLY hear back from our pal Lukas Enrique who goes into detail on that night behind the velvet rope….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In today’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, the lads sit down with the Liverpool, and all round legend that is Jamie Carragher.
In this no holds barred chat, the lads talk about their glory days on the red side of merseyside. With insights into some of Pete’s questionable Spanish chat up lines as well Jamie’s peculiar reading habits, it’s safe to say this pod has it all.
So, if you have ever found yourself wondering - Is Jamie Carragher parched? What fun could I have with 8 nuns at a wedding? Or where Crouch thinks Carra can stick his champions league medal? Then look no further than That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In the first full episode of their new football review podcast, the lads sit down and discuss England’s performance during the international break and get the ball rolling on their new predictions league table.
This week, the games that the boys are shining a spotlight on are Wolves v Liverpool, Newcastle v Brentford and West Ham v City. If any of you want to get involved in our weekly tournament then leave your predictions in the comments below and see how you fare against the boys!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Notorious sit down to discuss some of the big money and big name moves to the Middle East and the impact that this may have on the beautiful game.
Pete reminisces on a misspent youth spent watching the Serie A highlights on football Italia and reveals some surprising news about his own potential venture into the foreign leagues during his time as a player.
The gang also receives one of their favourite ever listener messages relating to a certain Mr Brie and in celebration of Brewdog’s Elvis Juice, our new beer of the month, Pete treats the lads to very special rendition of Suspicious minds……oh yes you read that correctly.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In today’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete opens the door on his footballing allegiances which, it is fair to say, have changed slightly throughout the years.
Starting off as a staunch ‘Chelsea of old’ fan, the more his glittering career progressed the more bitter his reception at Stamford Bridge became.
Join us as we chart Crouchy’s journey through different clubs and gain a better idea on where his allegiances lie now.
Chris also sheds light on some slight football sh*thousery he inflicted on his best mate Dougsie during the 2019 FA Cup final which he eloquently tries too pin on the missus.
The hunt for a decent swap for Charlie Adams’ coveted boot is also back on, with some hair raising offers been put on the table.
That Peter Crouch Podcast - Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Is Anthony Joshua a Watford fan? What do you reckon is the best seat at Leyton Orient's stadium? In this special bonus episode brought you in partnership with Acast and DAZN, the global sports broadcaster, we sit down with Eddie Hearn and Anthony Joshua to talk about the relationship with Boxing and Football and AJ's upcoming fight against Jermaine Franklin on April 1st exclusively on DAZN

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In this weeks episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, the lads sit down and delve into some of the most iconic derbies from across the world as well as those the big man himself has featured in.
Chris discusses why he feels his 5-a-side days may be coming to a close as well as his recent interaction with global megastar Orlando Bloom and wife Katy Perry.
The hunt for a suitable swap shop on Charlie Adam’s boots continues and we also hear from you, the listener on what you think provides the best level of protection when it comes to…..shin pads.
All this only available on, That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: In the first episode of the new series, Crouchy, Chris and Statman find themselves in unfamiliar surroundings, a far cry from their usual pub setting. In a fitting tribute to their first episode in almost 3 months, the lads are discussing comebacks because boy, it feels good to be back. Chumbawamba.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchy and Chris sit down with Burnley and Brentford BNOC Ben Mee to discuss some of the highlights from a career that has seen him rack up over 300 appearances for the clarets and his recent move to the cherries.
Ben and Crouchy reminisce on some of their playing days together down at Turf Moor and Ben lifts the lid on some of the big man’s dressing room antics.
You guys have also been taking part in our Elvis Juice challenge and we have some big hitters this week - expect Chris Eubank-esque Ed Sheeran impressions as well as some away day talismans.
You do not want to miss it!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Notorious are back in action and discussing all things Assistant Managers.
Often the unsung heroes of the backroom staff - with the exception of Newcastle - the lads feel it’s only right to highlight some of the best duos in football history, as well as UK Pop culture.
The lads take a deep dive into how assistant managers are often the go-between between senior players and the managers and the dynamics between them and the managers.
Sid’s is also on hand for a mini game that caught the lads slightly off guard and turned out to be one of the highlights of the pod - after Chris’ attire.
And finally, no one on this podcast is free from the firing line, including not Sir David Beckham himself who has drawn Crouchy’s ire for his BBQ set up in his recent documentary.
Its a goodun!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
From bringing handball instincts into the Premier League to transforming goalkeeping with his iconic throws and psychological tactics, Schmeichel gives fans unmatched behind-the-scenes insight into Man United’s dominance, Sir Alex Ferguson’s trust in the Class of ’92, and the unbelievable run that led to the famous 1999 treble.
He even talks about his love-hate relationship with baked beans, his time on Strictly Come Dancing, and how he may have nearly joined Liverpool on a night out with Ian Rush!
This one is for the diehard football romantics. Bacon sandwiches at the ready—this is the Schmeichel episode you didn’t know you needed.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Robson-Kanu on the pod!
From youth football rejection to that unforgettable Cruyff turn goal at Euro 2016, Hal opens up about his rollercoaster of a career—one that includes two ACL ruptures, founding a multi-million pound wellness brand, and becoming Wales’ unlikely hero on the global stage.
The lads dig deep into Hal’s journey, how his homemade turmeric shots went from his dad’s blender to supermarket shelves, and why inflammation might be the root of most modern-day health issues.
There’s talk of brutal Premier League realities, the dressing room dynamics no one sees, and how football still fails players when it comes to mental health.
Plus, what it’s really like being a boot boy for the one and only Steve Sidwell, why David Ginola was tight at Christmas, and the story behind how a promised £50-a-goal bonus proved surprisingly lucrative for a young Robson-Kanu.It's a brutally honest, hilarious, and inspiring insight into a career that's anything but ordinary.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchfest 2 is here! Access all areas with Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave at Wembley Arena to experience a night that was scarcely believable! You'll see what happens backstage at Crouchfest and the amazing lineup and crowd who have all signed up to take part without really knowing what to expect! Come inside the dressing room as well as experience the best parts of the show on stage!
When an evening! Including performances from Kasabian, Paul Potts, Olly Murs and the finest UK Garage MCs, Joel Stewart's Mike Dean Song, plus David James as a landlord and frequent visits to the Samrat, you never quite know which direction it's going to turn next...
Peter, Chris, Dave and the pod team would like to thank everyone who played a role in the event and for everyone who bought tickets to see the show. An unforgettable night like Crouchfest 2 is only possible because of the loyalty and fun that all of you bring. Cheers!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Sids are joined by Youtube and boxing extraordinaire - KSI!!
He sits down with the lads to discuss how his preparations have been going in the lead up to his big fight against pro boxer Tommy Fury - brother of World heavyweight boxing champion Tyson.
KSI gives the lads a masterclass in how to make it on YouTube and the mindset needed to handle being one of the most recognisable faces of a generation.
KSI and the boys also speak candidly about the dark side of fame and the toll that being in the limelight 24/7 can have upon your mental health.
Predictions for the big fight night? KSI reckons it will all be over in 4 - leave your predictions in the comments!
Chumbawamba!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: In this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete, Chris and the Notorious S.I.D sit down with Hollywood Superstar Idris Elba to discuss all things Arsenal, rap battles, flight simulators and his new and upcoming Apple TV+ series Hijack.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete, Sids, and Chris are joined by James Tarkowski, the no-nonsense centre-back for Everton Football Club. Known for his leadership, resilience, and heart-on-sleeve playing style, Tarkowski opens up about life at Goodison Park, Sean Dyche’s influence, and what it’s really like to play in Merseyside derbies.
He shares stories from Burnley’s golden years, the chaos of Everton’s survival seasons, and his thoughts on football’s return to big number 9’s, directness, and long balls.
The lads also dive into dressing room psychology, VAR frustrations, and post-football plans — from coaching to business ventures. Expect honest football chat, great banter, and a few unexpected laughs (including Tarky’s Frozen piano moment).
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouch and Chris are joined by the man, the myth, the legend that is Lee Hendrie.
The lads discuss some of the changing room antics that went down during their time at the Villa as well as some of their BIG night outs on the town.
The lads are also privileged enough to to be given an insight in to some of the more difficult periods in Lee’s life and just how he was able to overcome them.
With a career in football that spanned nearly 25 years, it is safe to say Lee has seen more than his fair share both on and off the field with a lot of those antics involving the big man himself.
This could be one of our most entertaining guests of the season so far….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Joining Chris, Crouchy and Notorious this week, is Tottenham legend and one of Pete’s OG friends in football…..Ledley King!
One of the few giants of the game that dedicated their whole professional career to one team, Ledley has seen more than most down the White Hart Lane - having been present for both of the big man’s stints for the North London stalwarts.
Ledley also lifts the lid on some of the antics that the lads went through, from England training camps to big nights out with the boys, it’s fair to say Ledley doesn’t pull any punches when it comes to exposing some of Crouchy’s most memorable moments.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouch and Chris sit down with West Ham legend Julian Dicks to discuss his iconic role in shaping the hammer’s team during his 11 year reign at the club between 88-99.
‘The Terminator’ sheds light on his absolute power penalties, all or nothing winning mentality and aversion to all things flight simulator related (sorry Starky)
Outside of football, we also hear what Dicksy would have been if it wasn’t for the beautiful game and how a knee injury almost turned him into the UK’s answer to Tiger Woods.
We also FINALLY hear back from our pal Lukas Enrique who goes into detail on that night behind the velvet rope….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch reveals all the things that footballers, managers and coaches discuss at a team meeting... You'll learn about which managers dominate the room, the softer tactics employed by others and what happens when the gaffer loses the dressing room?! Chris Stark and Statman Dave discuss more ideas for Crouchfest and Crouchy reveals why David Beckham holds a special place in his bedroom...

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In the second episode of the new series of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouchy, Chris and Dave take a dive into some of the most famous quotes to come out of the beautiful game.
We hear some big shouts from the Peterborough legend that is Barry Fry, and hear just what the ‘Special One’ said to Peter when trying to coax him out of retirement.
The gang also analyse why it is Airline pilots are allowed to get away with some top class sh*thousery and why Peter will likely never make a career out of performing accents.
So, strap into your shin pads, get your pancakes at the ready and enjoy this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Ahead of last weeks clash of the titans at the Premier League Darts Final, Crouchy, Chris and Statman sit down with some of the legends of the sport to pick their brains on what qualities it takes to become a pro darter in 2023
The lads are joined by Jonny Clayton, Gerwyn Price, Michael van Gerwen and Michael Smith who give insights into their glittering careers and what they are hoping to accomplish over the coming season.
They are also on hand to give some top tips to the lads on how to improve their own form, culminating in a nine dart, winner takes all, tournament at the end of the podcast - so watch this space.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, we’re coming to you straight from the Liverpool team hotel on the morning of the Liverpool Legends Match at Anfield.
Crouchy is joined by an all-star lineup of former Reds, including Steven Gerrard, John Barnes, Djibril Cissé, Yossi Benayoun, Ryan Babel, and Jay Spearing, for an exclusive behind-the-scenes chat about what it really means to pull on the famous red shirt.
The lads reminisce about unforgettable Champions League nights, legendary team talks, and share hilarious behind-the-scenes stories.
From Gerrard’s best Liverpool memories to Cissé’s injury recovery, and Barnes on the evolution of the modern game, this episode is packed with iconic moments.
Let us know in the comments – who’s the greatest Liverpool legend of all time?
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In today’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, the lads sit down with the Liverpool, and all round legend that is Jamie Carragher.
In this no holds barred chat, the lads talk about their glory days on the red side of merseyside. With insights into some of Pete’s questionable Spanish chat up lines as well Jamie’s peculiar reading habits, it’s safe to say this pod has it all.
So, if you have ever found yourself wondering - Is Jamie Carragher parched? What fun could I have with 8 nuns at a wedding? Or where Crouch thinks Carra can stick his champions league medal? Then look no further than That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Joe Cole joins Peter Crouch and the boys at the pub to tell us how to win an argument with Jose Mourinho, what the worst role in football is and discusses which managers he'd like to take on a lads holiday to Malia.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In today’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete opens the door on his footballing allegiances which, it is fair to say, have changed slightly throughout the years.
Starting off as a staunch ‘Chelsea of old’ fan, the more his glittering career progressed the more bitter his reception at Stamford Bridge became.
Join us as we chart Crouchy’s journey through different clubs and gain a better idea on where his allegiances lie now.
Chris also sheds light on some slight football sh*thousery he inflicted on his best mate Dougsie during the 2019 FA Cup final which he eloquently tries too pin on the missus.
The hunt for a decent swap for Charlie Adams’ coveted boot is also back on, with some hair raising offers been put on the table.
That Peter Crouch Podcast - Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Robson-Kanu on the pod!
From youth football rejection to that unforgettable Cruyff turn goal at Euro 2016, Hal opens up about his rollercoaster of a career—one that includes two ACL ruptures, founding a multi-million pound wellness brand, and becoming Wales’ unlikely hero on the global stage.
The lads dig deep into Hal’s journey, how his homemade turmeric shots went from his dad’s blender to supermarket shelves, and why inflammation might be the root of most modern-day health issues.
There’s talk of brutal Premier League realities, the dressing room dynamics no one sees, and how football still fails players when it comes to mental health.
Plus, what it’s really like being a boot boy for the one and only Steve Sidwell, why David Ginola was tight at Christmas, and the story behind how a promised £50-a-goal bonus proved surprisingly lucrative for a young Robson-Kanu.It's a brutally honest, hilarious, and inspiring insight into a career that's anything but ordinary.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week on That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouchy, Chris and Statman Dave sit down with global superstar Jason Sudeikis, star of Apple TV's Ted Lasso, as they discuss all things football (NOT soccer) related.
Jason talks about why he thinks the show has been such such a runaway success on both sides of the pond and also displays some surprisingly impressive footy knowledge.
Starky finally finds an ally in the BBQ game and Mike Dean's biggest fan also reveals why he thinks the former ref/chicken slaughterer was born to be in showbusiness.
And in a very surprising turn of events, AFC Richmond make a mockery of the transfer windows and make a swoop on one of their biggest players yet....quite literally.
Enjoy this and much more only on That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
It’s the Rodcast baby.
On this very special episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete, Chris, and Sids make a pilgrimage to the stately home of none other than Sir Rod Stewart—rock legend, model train aficionado, and die-hard Celtic fan.
Recorded inside Rod’s private gym and overlooking his personal football pitch, this episode is a goldmine of outrageous stories and charming confessions. From Elton John gifting him a Rembrandt painting, to the infamous drunken Scottish Cup draw, Rod holds nothing back.
He opens up about his lifelong love affair with football, his competitive friendship with Elton, and how his model railway obsession helps him stay grounded (and vocally fit!) while touring the world.
Whether he’s reminiscing about pitch invasions at Wembley, revealing the secrets behind his Vegas shows, or naughty 70's antics, this is Rod Stewart at his most raw and relatable.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Ahead of recording in the pub, Aaron agreed to take the podcast team on a tour of the Emirates and surrounding areas. You'll learn which Arsenal legend has set a challenge for one of the current squad, the agenda for the podcast recording and all the best bits of club history around Highbury and Arsenal.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Is Anthony Joshua a Watford fan? What do you reckon is the best seat at Leyton Orient's stadium? In this special bonus episode brought you in partnership with Acast and DAZN, the global sports broadcaster, we sit down with Eddie Hearn and Anthony Joshua to talk about the relationship with Boxing and Football and AJ's upcoming fight against Jermaine Franklin on April 1st exclusively on DAZN

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch & Ed Sheeran Discuss Crouchfest, Jay Z AND England’s World Cup 2022 Chances! There's just a month until Crouchfest! Ed Sheeran passes on valuable advice to Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave about how to handle a big crowd as well as discussing England's chances at the World Cup 2022 in Qatar, his best [and worst] ever gigs, being friends with Beyonce and Jay-Z and what he'd put his time into after his music career?! Crouchy gets asked about former team mates and has to pick his favourite England football song. Plus you'll also hear Ed Sheeran discuss the challenges of being a parent and pass judgement on Chris wearing shinpads to 5 a-side!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: In 'That Contracts Episode' Peter Crouch brings an old contract from his days at Stoke City in the Premier League. You'll learn what clubs do to motivate players, the clauses that are important for footballers and some random stipulations that don't make much sense.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Joe Cole joins Peter Crouch and the boys at the pub to tell us how to win an argument with Jose Mourinho, what the worst role in football is and discusses which managers he'd like to take on a lads holiday to Malia.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Sids are joined by Youtube and boxing extraordinaire - KSI!!
He sits down with the lads to discuss how his preparations have been going in the lead up to his big fight against pro boxer Tommy Fury - brother of World heavyweight boxing champion Tyson.
KSI gives the lads a masterclass in how to make it on YouTube and the mindset needed to handle being one of the most recognisable faces of a generation.
KSI and the boys also speak candidly about the dark side of fame and the toll that being in the limelight 24/7 can have upon your mental health.
Predictions for the big fight night? KSI reckons it will all be over in 4 - leave your predictions in the comments!
Chumbawamba!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week on That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouchy, Chris and Statman Dave sit down with global superstar Jason Sudeikis, star of Apple TV's Ted Lasso, as they discuss all things football (NOT soccer) related.
Jason talks about why he thinks the show has been such such a runaway success on both sides of the pond and also displays some surprisingly impressive footy knowledge.
Starky finally finds an ally in the BBQ game and Mike Dean's biggest fan also reveals why he thinks the former ref/chicken slaughterer was born to be in showbusiness.
And in a very surprising turn of events, AFC Richmond make a mockery of the transfer windows and make a swoop on one of their biggest players yet....quite literally.
Enjoy this and much more only on That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: After experiencing three loan moves during his career, Crouchy tells us what it's like to be at a club on a temporary basis. You'll learn about conversations between managers and players, how the moves are sold and what happens when your move involves moving to a new country with one friend aged just 18.

programme.title: Harry Redknapp Will Love This!
programme.desc: Peter Crouch & Jermain Defoe! Harry Redknapp's going to love this episode! The podcast reunites one of the Premier League's most iconic duos. Jermain Defoe heads to the pub with Crouchy, Chris Stark and Statman Dave to discuss his relationship with Peter Crouch, when strikers become 'too selfish' and where his obsession with scoring goals came from! There's initial scepticism about the role of stats plus a complaint from friend of the pod Aaron Ramsdale! It's a Jermain Defoe Podcast!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s Friday review podcast, we find out the results of Chris following his heart over his head last week for the Manchester derby (spoiler alert it didn’t pan out)
We also hear from the Minister of Mischief who has personally sent us a letter to give us some tantalising hints on how we can supersize this mofo when it comes the lads forfeits - so keep your ideas coming in.
Looking ahead to this weekend’s games, the lads throw down their predictions for the Newcastle v Arsenal, Spurs v Chelsea and Burnley v Palace.
There are also some honourable shoutouts to the one and only Kanye West and we hear about the time Stoke City signed a fish finger
Enjoy!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Ahead of recording in the pub, Aaron agreed to take the podcast team on a tour of the Emirates and surrounding areas. You'll learn which Arsenal legend has set a challenge for one of the current squad, the agenda for the podcast recording and all the best bits of club history around Highbury and Arsenal.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
After a whirlwind couple of weeks which has seen the lads brushing shoulders with movie stars and legends of the game, Crouchy, Chris and Statman are back in their safe space doing what they do best….chatting sh*t over a couple of cold ones.
With a brief cameo from San Marino to check in on Chris’ ball health, Pete also takes a bit of a grilling for his recent #BBQc antics.
In Swap Shop, we finally procure a swap worthy of the boots worn by Charlie Adams during last years midges dick challenge - who knew Jose Enrique would be the hero we didn’t think we would all need?
The lads also take a look at some of their personal icons of the game with legends like George Best, Maradona and Kerry Dixon all getting honourable shout outs.
Enjoy this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: At the launch party for the new podcast drink, Peter's wife does his robot dance for the first time ever in front of an audience. They're also treated to a Jennifer Lopez tribute act, a chat with a funeral director and an emotional song paying tribute to Mike Dean.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: What footballers really think about each other! It's time to take a look at B*tchy Players! It's just a few days until Crouchfest and we've decided to hand this podcast over to you, the listener. It's Peter Crouch's favourite episode of the series as you - the viewers and listeners take control and get to ask a member of the Premier League 100 club anything you like! The main theme is how b*tchy strikers can be about the rest of the squad(!) especially those pesky goalkeepers Rambo! AND Peter Crouch answers questions about making body parts disappear, playing Monopoly and there's a final update on Crouchfest! Crouchy issues a warning for event organisers as well as a serious discussion about when players get 'too comfy' at an elite football club.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
After a bruising international break for some of the team, Crouchy, Chris and Notorious SID are back to their bread and butter - the Premier League.
The lads talk about how they were able to keep themselves entertained over a gruelling two weeks, even going the extremes of becoming rugby fans (as shown by Chris’ attire) and a boxing match featuring one of our new mates.
Looking ahead, the games the lads are putting their necks on the line this week are the merseyside derby, Sheffield United vs Manchester United and Chelsea vs Arsenal.
With Pete being closer to Chris than he would like in the leaderboards, it is all to play for as we edge closer to that Christmas forfeit deadline.
Speaking of - please continue to send in your forfeit ideas and names for the pod and you could be the next Mr Holiday!!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch reveals all the things that footballers, managers and coaches discuss at a team meeting... You'll learn about which managers dominate the room, the softer tactics employed by others and what happens when the gaffer loses the dressing room?! Chris Stark and Statman Dave discuss more ideas for Crouchfest and Crouchy reveals why David Beckham holds a special place in his bedroom...

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchy, Chris and Notorious are back in action brightening up your Fridays with their Friday review pod.
In light of two of Sid’s former clubs, Brighton and Fulham playing each other this weekend, it felt only right for us to give this weekend the moniker ‘El Puddingo’
In what is becoming almost routine, Chris has suffered another weekend he would rather forget and edges ever closer to that dreaded Christmas forfeit. Crouchy managed to secure himself a cheeky three pointer which has granted him a bit of breathing space and Steve ‘Mystic’ Sidwell continues to look back at the lads in his rear view mirror.
Apart from ‘El Puddingo’ the other matches the lads are taking a look at are; the Manchester Derby and Wolves v Newcastle - will Chris follow his head or his heart? Stay tuned to find out.
We still want your forfeit suggestions - we’ve had a few so far but no deal breakers - keep em coming in!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: That Training Session Episode! Who knew that netball, table tennis, water polo and red ar$e would all play an integral part in a Premier League training session?! Peter Crouch details what motivates players, the sessions that footballers hate and how a manager like Rafael Benitez coached teams to play his tactics. Playing true to his selfish-striker mindset, Crouchy raises the issues he has with Erling Haaland and the impact the Norwegian is having on the Premier League and its historic football statistics....

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Ahead of last weeks clash of the titans at the Premier League Darts Final, Crouchy, Chris and Statman sit down with some of the legends of the sport to pick their brains on what qualities it takes to become a pro darter in 2023
The lads are joined by Jonny Clayton, Gerwyn Price, Michael van Gerwen and Michael Smith who give insights into their glittering careers and what they are hoping to accomplish over the coming season.
They are also on hand to give some top tips to the lads on how to improve their own form, culminating in a nine dart, winner takes all, tournament at the end of the podcast - so watch this space.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouchy, Chris Stark, and Steve Sidwell reunite to discuss the state of modern football—and it’s safe to say, the game has well and truly gone. From nostalgic takes on goal celebrations to fuming over financial fair play, the lads aren’t holding back.
Chris discusses his injury from a rogue five-year-old’s high five, Steve shares his story about proposing again on his 20th wedding anniversary, and Crouchy flexes his new golf trophy win, sparking a movement to secure him VIP parking across the UK.
But it’s the main debate that steals the show—“has football officially lost the plot?” The team deep dive into everything that grinds their gears about the modern game: players filming with phones on the pitch, soulless shirt sponsors, managers refusing to adapt tactics, and the death of spontaneity in football moments thanks to VAR.
Plus, we use AI to generate Sids a FAKE girlfriend in the Chumbawumbar… trust us, this one's a belter.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
The pod with no name is back this week with a very special guest….Joleon Lescott!
We review how the lads did with their previous score predictions and Joleon is on hand to help Chris avoid making any outrageous shouts such as his triple 3-0 predictions last week.
The lads also put down their predictions for some of the big games this weekend, including; Liverpool v Spurs, Everton v Luton and Newcastle v Burnley. The boys have also joined forces with Paddy Power who have given us the odds on some of lads latest predictions and some inspiration for the lads on how they can supercharge the Christmas forfeits.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Crouchfest 2 is here! Access all areas with Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave at Wembley Arena to experience a night that was scarcely believable! You'll see what happens backstage at Crouchfest and the amazing lineup and crowd who have all signed up to take part without really knowing what to expect! Come inside the dressing room as well as experience the best parts of the show on stage!
When an evening! Including performances from Kasabian, Paul Potts, Olly Murs and the finest UK Garage MCs, Joel Stewart's Mike Dean Song, plus David James as a landlord and frequent visits to the Samrat, you never quite know which direction it's going to turn next...
Peter, Chris, Dave and the pod team would like to thank everyone who played a role in the event and for everyone who bought tickets to see the show. An unforgettable night like Crouchfest 2 is only possible because of the loyalty and fun that all of you bring. Cheers!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
With the end of the season looming, Crouchy, Chris and Statman take a minute to look back at some of their biggest hits and misses throughout the past 9 months.
We look at some of the runaway successes of the season and some of the more sh*thousery moments (Sam Allardyce comparing himself to Pep springs to mind)
We also have a very special voice note from the one and only Jose Enrique who finally puts to bed the one question on everyone’s minds…..if he’s guilty of THAT Gucci slippers purchase
And with the season almost at its end, the boys decide its time to put some planning into the coveted That Peter Crouch Podcast Awards night so watch this space.
Chumbawamba

Playing true to his selfish-striker mindset, Crouchy raises the issues he has with Erling Haaland and the impact the Norwegian is having on the Premier League and its historic football statistics....

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In the first full episode of their new football review podcast, the lads sit down and discuss England’s performance during the international break and get the ball rolling on their new predictions league table.
This week, the games that the boys are shining a spotlight on are Wolves v Liverpool, Newcastle v Brentford and West Ham v City. If any of you want to get involved in our weekly tournament then leave your predictions in the comments below and see how you fare against the boys!
Chumbawamba

Ahead of last weeks clash of the titans at the Premier League Darts Final, Crouchy, Chris and Statman sit down with some of the legends of the sport to pick their brains on what qualities it takes to become a pro darter in 2023
The lads are joined by Jonny Clayton, Gerwyn Price, Michael van Gerwen and Michael Smith who give insights into their glittering careers and what they are hoping to accomplish over the coming season.
They are also on hand to give some top tips to the lads on how to improve their own form, culminating in a nine dart, winner takes all, tournament at the end of the podcast - so watch this space.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouchy, Chris and Sids are joined by Youtube and boxing extraordinaire - KSI!!
He sits down with the lads to discuss how his preparations have been going in the lead up to his big fight against pro boxer Tommy Fury - brother of World heavyweight boxing champion Tyson.
KSI gives the lads a masterclass in how to make it on YouTube and the mindset needed to handle being one of the most recognisable faces of a generation.
KSI and the boys also speak candidly about the dark side of fame and the toll that being in the limelight 24/7 can have upon your mental health.
Predictions for the big fight night? KSI reckons it will all be over in 4 - leave your predictions in the comments!
Chumbawamba!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: In this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Pete, Chris and the Notorious S.I.D sit down with Hollywood Superstar Idris Elba to discuss all things Arsenal, rap battles, flight simulators and his new and upcoming Apple TV+ series Hijack.

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc: Peter Crouch & Ed Sheeran Discuss Crouchfest, Jay Z AND England’s World Cup 2022 Chances! There's just a month until Crouchfest! Ed Sheeran passes on valuable advice to Peter Crouch, Chris Stark and Statman Dave about how to handle a big crowd as well as discussing England's chances at the World Cup 2022 in Qatar, his best [and worst] ever gigs, being friends with Beyonce and Jay-Z and what he'd put his time into after his music career?! Crouchy gets asked about former team mates and has to pick his favourite England football song. Plus you'll also hear Ed Sheeran discuss the challenges of being a parent and pass judgement on Chris wearing shinpads to 5 a-side!

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
This week, Crouch and Chris are joined by the man, the myth, the legend that is Lee Hendrie.
The lads discuss some of the changing room antics that went down during their time at the Villa as well as some of their BIG night outs on the town.
The lads are also privileged enough to to be given an insight in to some of the more difficult periods in Lee’s life and just how he was able to overcome them.
With a career in football that spanned nearly 25 years, it is safe to say Lee has seen more than his fair share both on and off the field with a lot of those antics involving the big man himself.
This could be one of our most entertaining guests of the season so far….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
Joining Chris, Crouchy and Notorious this week, is Tottenham legend and one of Pete’s OG friends in football…..Ledley King!
One of the few giants of the game that dedicated their whole professional career to one team, Ledley has seen more than most down the White Hart Lane - having been present for both of the big man’s stints for the North London stalwarts.
Ledley also lifts the lid on some of the antics that the lads went through, from England training camps to big nights out with the boys, it’s fair to say Ledley doesn’t pull any punches when it comes to exposing some of Crouchy’s most memorable moments.
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
On this week’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, Crouch and Chris sit down with West Ham legend Julian Dicks to discuss his iconic role in shaping the hammer’s team during his 11 year reign at the club between 88-99.
‘The Terminator’ sheds light on his absolute power penalties, all or nothing winning mentality and aversion to all things flight simulator related (sorry Starky)
Outside of football, we also hear what Dicksy would have been if it wasn’t for the beautiful game and how a knee injury almost turned him into the UK’s answer to Tiger Woods.
We also FINALLY hear back from our pal Lukas Enrique who goes into detail on that night behind the velvet rope….
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In today’s episode of That Peter Crouch Podcast, the lads sit down with the Liverpool, and all round legend that is Jamie Carragher.
In this no holds barred chat, the lads talk about their glory days on the red side of merseyside. With insights into some of Pete’s questionable Spanish chat up lines as well Jamie’s peculiar reading habits, it’s safe to say this pod has it all.
So, if you have ever found yourself wondering - Is Jamie Carragher parched? What fun could I have with 8 nuns at a wedding? Or where Crouch thinks Carra can stick his champions league medal? Then look no further than That Peter Crouch Podcast!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: That Peter Crouch Podcast
programme.desc:
In the first full episode of their new football review podcast, the lads sit down and discuss England’s performance during the international break and get the ball rolling on their new predictions league table.
This week, the games that the boys are shining a spotlight on are Wolves v Liverpool, Newcastle v Brentford and West Ham v City. If any of you want to get involved in our weekly tournament then leave your predictions in the comments below and see how you fare against the boys!
Chumbawamba

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The path to mission readiness takes a sharp turn as contestants are introduced to the Cupolster—an innovative holster system that changes the game when seconds matter. Don delivers a critical safety lesson before the team puts the gear to the test, running a demanding course of fire from inside a truck. From standard draws to Cupolster drills, every move is about speed, precision, and survival under pressure. The action escalates with a SAR9 passenger-seat course of fire that leaves contestants breathless —proving that combat can come from anywhere, at any time. But the real trial begins when Ken Shamrock unleashes his legendary Iron Man challenge. In three-minute elimination rounds, contestants go toe-to-toe against each other, testing not only strength but everything they’ve absorbed under Shamrock’s punishing guidance. It’s survival of the fittest—where only the toughest, sharpest, and most disciplined will walk away victorious.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: With the mission imminent, Chris and Cindy sit down with Danny and Kyle for some last words on how the competition has been going so far. With Kyle still nursing a brutal hamstring pull, he gives us some insight on his unique running method. Cindy also chats with Autumn from Stream2Sea about her revolutionary product the team used today to beat the Florida sun.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The episode opens with contestant Geoff Rempel sharing his powerful backstory and the unique challenges of competing without a military or firearms background—proving that heart, not just experience, earns a place on this team. As the mission begins, the team links up with Pete from Red Cat Drones to run light recon and test critical communication between ground and aerial support. Red Cat brings the best of the best to the skies while the team takes to the ground on bikes, learning to operate under pressure with real-time air-to-ground coordination. But it’s not all strategy and tech—emotions run high as contestant Hayley Taylor opens up about her late father and the personal mission driving her to push harder every day. From aerial coverage to cover stories, it’s not just about who’s strongest... it’s about who’s ready when it counts.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day kicks off with a one-of-a-kind “hatting ceremony” as Don Mann is crowned—then quite literally set on fire. But there’s no time to admire the flames; Ken Shamrock is waiting with another round of punishing Lion’s Den training. With Iron Man training just one day away, the pressure is at an all-time high. Contestant Landon reflects on his past Surviving Mann experience, paying tribute to the mentors who guided him—and now stepping into that role himself. The countdown to mission time begins as gear is packed, coordinates plotted, and details roll in via Red Cat Drones. With the ISR team deployed, the first phase of the mission is underway. Every contestant must be ready to deliver their cover for status in an instant—because in this game, hesitation can be the difference between success and failure.
