programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Laura Zaspel (Farm Hero) takes you inside the cockpit for a high-flying look at the future of farming. From cutting-edge aerial applications to next-gen science and sustainability, Air Tractor’s technology is redefining how we grow from the ground up.

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: Ziplining in Colorado’s Gorges, free falls and donuts. The Real Man show is back in full swing in Colorado. Kyle is joined by special guests and American Patriots as he explores what thrills and adventures this amazing country has to offer. And he’s just getting started.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Season 3 of Surviving Mann starts with no time wasted... straight to PT. The contestants are thrown straight into physical training, to determine where everyone lies and how to properly group them into the iconic Black and Blue Surviving Mann teams. From Olympic athletes to cast favorites, these eight competitors are ready to prove what they’ve got.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 2 is star-studded and action-packed! Get ready for amazing celebrity guests; and you know Don and Sheriff Lamb won't be giving the contestants a break. The challenges keep coming as SAR USA brings in a former FBI agent & trainer to put our contestants through an adrenaline-pumping exercise. Will all the contestants make it through the day? Watch now to find out!

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: It’s a new day, which means Don takes the contestants' training to new heights..literally. But first, the All-Stars are split into teams for a searching mission, using Offgrid’s Faraday bags. Later, they’re introduced to the new ropes course, “The Odyssey”, to test their mental and physical fortitude, as well as their endurance, using a climbing wall. See who rises to the occasion and who suffers from "paralysis by over analysis” in this episode.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The day starts off with some unique courses of fire that get the All Stars’ blood pumping. With the help of Rogue Ops, New Frontier Armory and Griffin Armament, the teams are outfitted with the most premiere artillery in the industry. Then, the All Stars get out of the heat and head indoors to do some CQC training with Surviving Mann alum, Randy Couture. If anyone thought it would be a break.. they were surely mistaken.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With physical training underway, Don hands the All Stars to master weaponry specialists for intense combat preparation. The contestants face a grueling course of fire with a high-powered rifle, alongside fire-making and blade training challenges. Pushed to their limits, they race to earn points for the upcoming mission, where every skill counts. Can their new tactics withstand Don Mann’s ultimate test of resilience? Watch to find out in Surviving Mann: All Stars.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The day kicks off with “The 1000-Yard Shot,” and the All-Stars are put to the test bright and early. Who will “make impact” and who will fall flat? Following the competition, Don receives a call from the CIA: the mission is officially greenlit, and it’s time for the All-Stars to kick things into high gear. This moment marks a pivotal shift in their training, with lives now hanging in the balance. After a crash course in the classroom, the All-Stars head to the field for what they think is a land navigation exercise… but things quickly spiral when a group of aggressive hostiles ambushes and captures the competitors for an intense hostage training scenario. Will any of them make it out—and live to tell the tale?

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With a night of torture behind them and a morning packed with PT, the All-Stars set their sights on the mission ahead. When Don introduces a 200-meter shooting evolution using Ace Precision Firearms, the group is eager—though they didn’t expect an air mattress to be part of the equation. Later, Nemo Arms ups the ante with a challenge featuring three of their firearms and a rugged desert terrain course of fire. Just as the contestants begin to wind down for the day, Olight steps in to illuminate the path to the next round of challenges.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: This morning, the All-Stars are pulled up by their bootstraps to compete for a chance to win The Golden Boy. Who will rise to the occasion in this Western-themed challenge and take home a piece of true American craftsmanship? Next, the training turns cerebral with the help of BlazePod. With mental fortitude playing a critical role in mission success, Don goes above and beyond to ensure the contestants are mentally—and physically—ready for battle. Later, the team is introduced to a groundbreaking product designed to reduce draw time while under enemy fire.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: T-minus one day to the mission, and the All-Stars are feeling the pressure. With a warm-up course of fire under their belts, the team levels up to some serious firepower—thanks to the experts at Capitol Armory. Just when they think the day can’t get any more intense, Don sends them sky-high for a one-of-a-kind shooting challenge aboard the Capitol Armory chopper. Once back on solid ground, the All-Stars dive into critical training scenarios designed to make or break their mission success. With time ticking down and expectations mounting, the team must dig deep, trust their instincts, and come together like never before.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann) and UFC Hall of Famer Ken Shamrock (Surviving Mann) uncover a breakthrough changing how we live in a world full of invisible forces. Join them as Aires Tech reveals the science behind a revolutionary technology built to protect the human body from electromagnetic stress—empowering performance in a wired world.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: From the ocean to the lab, The Big Reveal dives deeper into the hidden impact of electromagnetic pollution. Discover how Aires Tech is helping people, animals, and even bees thrive—unlocking the secrets to balance, vitality, and true wellness in our connected age.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to break down what the A-Team has learned from our latest group of companies—and how we can best support them in reaching their goals. Today, the spotlight is on A-Team member Larry Ward of Market Rithm. This seasoned CEO has seen it all when it comes to marketing strategy—and he’s got the accolades to prove it. Now, he’s setting his sights on helping businesses gain a competitive edge in their marketing efforts. Next, we’re introduced to another powerhouse on Kevin’s team: Nate Bailey, founder of Unleash the Leader Within. Nate brings a dynamic, personalized approach to scaling businesses that have often been overlooked. Rounding out this insightful roundtable discussion are A-Team members Chandler Kline from PICMII Crowdfunding and podcaster Dr. Jason Dean, each contributing their own unique areas of expertise.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: We’re back with Valor Clinic to take a deeper look at the inner workings of their foundation, which supports financially struggling veterans. Watch how these dedicated Americans are giving back to their fellow patriots in a big way. Fair warning—Mark’s work at Valor Clinic is a true tearjerker. Next, we take a quick trip to the tropics to catch Aggressor Adventures in action. Kyle Reyes checks in with owner Wayne for an update on how he’s been implementing the A-Team’s sage advice. After saying goodbye to Wayne, the team visits another incredible destination to reconnect with the founders of STAYCA VACAY. To wrap things up, Kyle Reyes stops by Compliant Technologies to experience their innovative product firsthand. And of course, we wouldn’t leave without a live demo of their shockingly advanced invention—The G.L.O.V.E.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: This episode of Wildshots kicks off in South Carolina, where Tim Harmsen goes behind the scenes at Jacob Grey Firearms for an inside look at precision craftsmanship in action. Known for their stunning 2011 pistols—true works of art—Jacob Grey takes perfection to the micron. From raw metal to “The Hex,” Tim witnesses how engineering meets artistry to create one of America’s most elite handguns.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim heads to the Smoky Mountains for an action-packed adventure that’s as sharp as it gets. The journey kicks off at the world-famous Smoky Mountain Knife Works, the largest knife store on the planet, where Tim explores the artistry and precision behind the blades of We Knife. There, he reconnects with shooting legend Kyle Lamb, who shares his thoughts on the craftsmanship that keeps professionals equipped for anything. The action continues at Buds Gun Shop, where Tim joins Kyle once again to complete two of Lamb’s signature courses—the intense “Chaos Drill” and the dynamic “Triple Threat.” Together, they test speed, accuracy, and the mental discipline needed to master the range. But the day wouldn’t be complete without a little backwoods ingenuity. IraqVeteran8888 joins Tim for a bit of unconventional fun—combining creativity, curiosity, and some good old Redneck Science to wrap up an unforgettable episode.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: Overconfidence can doom a season and the Knights meet their biggest obstacle of the year. Were they ready or not? Why was Coach Jesse so upset on Halloween night?

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: 10 of the country’s top realtors gather to begin a career-defining competition. Guided by a team of all-star business experts, these super-agents will be put to the ultimate test, to prove they have what it takes to rise to the very top and be number one. Follow them Beyond The Close.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: In the season finale of All Stars 3, the contestants’ hard work throughout the competition is put to the ultimate test. With tensions in the Middle East reaching a boiling point, the CIA assigns the All-Stars an executive protection mission for a key negotiator. However, before the team can deploy, escalating terrorist activity dramatically raises the threat level. Facing a surge of hostile forces, the All-Stars must come together to secure their principal and ensure their safety at all costs. When they're caught on the X with no clear way out, there's only one option left—eliminate the threat. Who will survive the mission? And who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The stakes continue to climb as Green Light Sights rewards one top shooter with their very own custom weapon—proof that precision pays off. But there's no time to celebrate. Bear Arms ups the ante by issuing defense vests to every contestant, with one hard rule: once it’s on, it stays on. From grueling mission briefings to body armor plank challenges that push endurance to the brink, the weight—literally and mentally—never lets up. Still armored, the team reports to Ken Shamrock for another brutal dose of Lion’s Den physical punishment. Just when they think they’ve caught a break, Compliant Technologies’ infamous glove makes a shocking return to torment a fresh round of contestants. And as the day winds down, Don introduces the team to his personal “Flights” challenge—an unforgiving test no one is excited to take on. It all ends with a sobering CIA reminder: in the field, your backstory might just save your life—or end it.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: This episode of Wildshots kicks off in South Carolina, where Tim Harmsen goes behind the scenes at Jacob Grey Firearms for an inside look at precision craftsmanship in action. Known for their stunning 2011 pistols—true works of art—Jacob Grey takes perfection to the micron. From raw metal to “The Hex,” Tim witnesses how engineering meets artistry to create one of America’s most elite handguns.

As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: This episode of Wildshots kicks off in South Carolina, where Tim Harmsen goes behind the scenes at Jacob Grey Firearms for an inside look at precision craftsmanship in action. Known for their stunning 2011 pistols—true works of art—Jacob Grey takes perfection to the micron. From raw metal to “The Hex,” Tim witnesses how engineering meets artistry to create one of America’s most elite handguns.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The stakes continue to climb as Green Light Sights rewards one top shooter with their very own custom weapon—proof that precision pays off. But there's no time to celebrate. Bear Arms ups the ante by issuing defense vests to every contestant, with one hard rule: once it’s on, it stays on. From grueling mission briefings to body armor plank challenges that push endurance to the brink, the weight—literally and mentally—never lets up. Still armored, the team reports to Ken Shamrock for another brutal dose of Lion’s Den physical punishment. Just when they think they’ve caught a break, Compliant Technologies’ infamous glove makes a shocking return to torment a fresh round of contestants. And as the day winds down, Don introduces the team to his personal “Flights” challenge—an unforgiving test no one is excited to take on. It all ends with a sobering CIA reminder: in the field, your backstory might just save your life—or end it.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: This episode of The Big Reveal showcases high-performance tools and innovations built for critical moments—from Jersey T…

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: In the last episode, Kyle took to the skies; now it’s the seas. Co-host Josh Peterson joins Kyle on a deep sea fishing excursion that ends in one of them losing their lunch.. but who will it be? Later (after everyone’s cleaned up) the gang reconvenes for a legendary course of fire with some serious artillery.. and Bob.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The contestants of “Surviving Mann” are handpicked for their exceptional skills and determination. Under the guidance of survival expert Don Mann, they face a series of challenges designed to push them beyond their limits. Each contestant must adapt, innovate, and collaborate to survive in an unforgiving environment. As the grueling challenges unfold, they discover new strengths and forge deeper bonds. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with intense tests of endurance, strategy, and resilience, with Don Mann inspiring and pushing them every step of the way.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Missing
programme.desc: Missing

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Mike Glover, Green Beret and retired CIA operative, joins Don to kick it up a notch for our contestants. What would Surviving Mann be without some log PT? If it’s good enough for the Seals - it’s good enough for our contestants. If that wasn’t hard enough, Don and Mike have the contestants do some tire pulling, a run, tug of war, land nav and a Tyrolean traverse over alligator infested water. Oh, and did we mention the 40mph wind and rain storm?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Climbing to the top, literally! In this episode, you better put your fear of heights away. The contestants have the option to earn extra points, but not everyone is happy about it. Mental strength is tested through rappelling from high above the sky. Who will come out on top?

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Planks, Don! Don gave the contestants an option to earn extra points for planking. How does this shake up the top points earners? And of course, there’s shooting challenges. First, Don puts the contestants through realistic military training for a car ambush scenario. Then, three-time state champion, Renee Enchautegui, takes the 32 on a night-time shooting challenge.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: As the mission gets closer, the 32 must prepare for various scenarios, including CQB - Close Quarters Battle - which can be essential in hostage rescue. Watch the live-fire CQB drill teams and see how they stack up. Plus Don & Randy give the top competitors one last chance to rack up BIG points with another 700 yard Roll-The-Dice Pinnacle Shot. Find out who won... and who lost, in this episode of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: It's mission time! The clock is ticking and our hostage's demise is imminent, unless the team can get him out in time. Watch the mission unfold and whether the team succeeds fully in this, the season finale of Surviving Mann. As the mission concludes, see who of the 32 Survived Mann, who came out on top and reminisce with the cast as they say goodbye to the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to building their own shelters with only a small ax, it’s a battle for scoring points and survival that’ll test these elite competitors like never before.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: Surviving Mann Season 1 thrilled with action, adventure, and good old-fashioned American determination. But, before Season 2 arrives, Don has a new challenge for the best of the best. In All-Stars the top 3 Surviving Mann contestants face off against 3 elite special ops veterans in a 50-hour no-sleep marathon battle of endurance, skill, and willpower. Do the All-Stars have what it takes to take on these spec ops legends? Find in Surviving Mann: All-Stars.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The challenges have only gotten started. In episode two, the teams must go beyond their limits to come out on top. From the brutal Blah line to building their own shelters with only a small ax, it’s a battle for scoring points and survival that’ll test these elite competitors like never before.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: After a grueling night braving the elements, the second half of the challenge continues. The All-Stars and Space Cowboys are pushed to the limit when they are tasked with fabricating their own survival structures. Then, catastrophe strikes on the rope climbs, a timber hitch tests the group’s endurance and the day finishes off with Uncle Sam’s Misguided Children’s stress course. Will the All-Stars make it through? Only time will tell.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: 10 of the country’s top realtors gather to begin a career-defining competition. Guided by a team of all-star business experts, these super-agents will be put to the ultimate test, to prove they have what it takes to rise to the very top and be number one. Follow them Beyond The Close.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Kyle Reyes checks in with Advanced Vitality to see how the team’s recommendations have already begun transforming their impact on clients. At Scout & Zoe’s, Cindy unveils a bold new commercial that captures her brand’s quirky spirit while driving sales in a competitive pet market. Over at Zenith Trek, a polished new promo video helps position their innovative product in front of the right audience. And down on the floor at Hammer Haag Steel, it’s lights, camera, action—dirty jobs style—as the crew captures raw, behind-the-scenes footage that showcases their powerful manufacturing capabilities.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The A-Team kicks things off with Bonnie Lucas of Law Enforcement Specialists, who’s on a mission to scale her police coordination service nationwide—with a game-changing app in the works. Then it’s all about beauty and impact as gallery owner David Beavis shares how his immersive landscape photography is inspiring audiences and fueling plans for expansion. Next, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage breaks down how his firm is helping Americans retire with confidence—no market risk, just guaranteed income for life. Finally, John Feldman introduces Connected & Protected, a tech-forward company keeping seniors and first responders safe across the country.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: In Like a Train, the award-winning documentary that began as a student film project, you will follow the Clearwater Knights, a high school football team determined to have a perfect, undefeated season and to have fun doing it. Wit

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: Boom America is kicking off with a bang, led by the legendary shark himself, Kevin Harrington. Backed by his team of successful entrepreneurs, Kevin meets with businesses to jumpstart their success and take them to a whole new level. From Nuethix, a supplement line struggling with client acquisition and education, to Stream2Sea, a eco-friendly sunscreen wanting to become a household name—Kevin and the A-team are ready to jump in and get their hands dirty.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to go to work. Now that we’ve met our companies, Kevin and the A-team are ready to hit the ground running. NuEhtix, Dr Price Vitamins, Stream2Sea and Clear Water get a deep dive round table session from Kevin and His A-team. We also get to meet the A-Team players and what make them titans in their trades. Tune in to see the insights the team come up with and how the companies apply it to build their brands.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to break down what the A-Team has learned from our latest group of companies—and how we can best support them in reaching their goals. Today, the spotlight is on A-Team member Larry Ward of Market Rithm. This seasoned CEO has seen it all when it comes to marketing strategy—and he’s got the accolades to prove it. Now, he’s setting his sights on helping businesses gain a competitive edge in their marketing efforts. Next, we’re introduced to another powerhouse on Kevin’s team: Nate Bailey, founder of Unleash the Leader Within. Nate brings a dynamic, personalized approach to scaling businesses that have often been overlooked. Rounding out this insightful roundtable discussion are A-Team members Chandler Kline from PICMII Crowdfunding and podcaster Dr. Jason Dean, each contributing their own unique areas of expertise.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: We’re back with Valor Clinic to take a deeper look at the inner workings of their foundation, which supports financially struggling veterans. Watch how these dedicated Americans are giving back to their fellow patriots in a big way. Fair warning—Mark’s work at Valor Clinic is a true tearjerker. Next, we take a quick trip to the tropics to catch Aggressor Adventures in action. Kyle Reyes checks in with owner Wayne for an update on how he’s been implementing the A-Team’s sage advice. After saying goodbye to Wayne, the team visits another incredible destination to reconnect with the founders of STAYCA VACAY. To wrap things up, Kyle Reyes stops by Compliant Technologies to experience their innovative product firsthand. And of course, we wouldn’t leave without a live demo of their shockingly advanced invention—The G.L.O.V.E.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Our realtors were already superstars, but now it’s time to move them even higher. In this episode, you’ll learn what it takes to win at the highest levels from the 30-billion-dollar-man Jay Abraham, SEO wizard AJ Aluthwala, leadership powerhouse Nate Bailey, and mindset genius Michael Bernoff. They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (any anyone watching) into the stratosphere.

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s overhaul day on Boom America, and the A-Team gets to work. Kevin Harrington and Toli Cefail kick things off with Switch It Up, laying out strategies around “The Volume” while Kyle Reyes pushes for a powerful pivot—refocusing the company squarely on the booming trades community. Next, the team digs into Raida Tech, where Laura highlights how the company is operating 25 years ahead of the curve but desperately needs clearer marketing to match its groundbreaking innovation. American Stories creator Bob Cefail stops by to share the inspiration behind Boom America and the future of independent production in the U.S. From there, the A-Team turns to Tangible Assets, helping refine how Dale can monetize his coin collection business, boost credibility, and reach the right investors. Finally, New Home National Title gets a full diagnostic from the experts as they map out how the company can scale, gain visibility, and earn the recognition it deserves nationwide.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode of Boom America dives headfirst into the businesses modernizing America’s energy and infrastructure landscape. The A-Team kicks things off with Switch It Up, breaking down how smart energy upgrades - like high-efficiency lighting, EV charging, and electrical modernization - are helping companies cut costs and stay competitive. Next, the focus shifts to Raida Tech, where the team highlights a company operating years ahead of the market but in need of sharper messaging to fully unlock its potential. From there, Tangible Assets, LLC takes center stage as the experts help refine its positioning, credibility, and growth strategy in a crowded investment space. Finally, New Home National Title gets a no-nonsense diagnostic as the team maps out a clear path to scale, increase visibility, and claim its place as a national contender. From practical innovation to bold business strategy, this episode proves that the future of American enterprise is powered by smart decisions and even smarter execution.

Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.desc: A Finnish defense course tests the contestants' marksmanship and combat medical training. Later, Don serves dinner with a twist. To cap off the competition, the two teams face off in a sniper hide “cat and mouse” challenge. Find out who wins this legendary All Star competition.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: A group of 5 All Star contestants were chosen to embark on an adventure overseas, but what they didn’t know is that it would become a maritime mission. Radio Host Kerri Kasem and rockstar Ashba join Don as he breaks the news to the contestants that there’s more to this yacht than a pleasure cruise. If they thought that this trip was going to be smooth sailing, they soon realized how mistaken they were when Don hit them with the hardest physical evolution in Surviving Mann’s history.

Watch now to find out!

programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Coach Jesse heads to Little Rock Arkansas, home of the famous Pulaski Academy and super-star high school football coach, Coach Kelly. The player? Joe Himon. With NFL speed and skills already, a heart of gold and courage to match, Joe has yet to commit and be recognized as the top rated recruit he should be. Find out what advice and help Coach Jesse has for Joe in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Ryan Nolan, a hardworking, talented play-maker with integrity and intelligence to match. Unfortunately, at only 5’ 9”, his size has kept him off of many coaches' radar. Find out what strategies Coach Jesse has for Ryan to help him get scholarship offers and follow them on their shooting adventure as they compete to see who’s the fastest shot in this episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: The Knights continue down the path to victory. Their journey must include team growth and bonding. Friendships and trust develop as the team goes through hardships such as injuries and new players. Along the way, we learn more about them, why they work so well together, whom they’ve lost, and how they’ve charged forth in spite of it all. Oh, and there’s rain, lots of rain. Meet the team and hear their stories. They will excite you, move you and make you think about things you didn’t expect out of a sports documentary. Its original score, also composed and performed by the students, will have you tapping your feet as you root for the Knights.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Richard Myers is a versatile offensive lineman with an exceptional work ethic, already college football material. The challenge? He’s from a small Indiana town and struggles to get noticed by recruiters. Join Coach Jesse and Richard as they bond over fishing and an old-fashioned Indiana demolition derby, discussing strategies to build Richard’s football future with Country Ball.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: With over 30 scholarship offers and a place in his high school’s Hall of Fame, Mario Eugenio embodies the rewards of hard work and dedication. But what happens when plans go awry? Find out as Country Ball follows his story.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Meet Kayleb Wagner, Florida’s all-time record-breaking running back from a football recruitment powerhouse state. On September 17, 2021, Kayleb shattered the state rushing record previously held by Derrick Henry—Alabama alum, now a Tennessee Titan and one of the NFL’s most dominant running backs. As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? Despite his athletic and academic excellence, Kayleb has one arm. Join Country Ball to hear Kayleb’s journey through his own words and those of his inspiring mom, Sam, exploring where he’s been, what he’s doing now, and where he’s headed.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: The first part of the season finale starts now. Jesse’s back on his home turf of Clearwater, Florida, at Clearwater Academy International with not one, but TWO of his top players: Luca Stanzani and Dylan Djeté – who’ve both been playing football since they were little. Dylan’s a family-oriented player who got five touchdowns across his first two games in America. Luca’s been CAI’s starting quarterback since eighth grade and has both the brains and the dedication to go far. See just what these players can do in this episode of Country Ball!

programme.title: Like a Train
programme.desc: In Like a Train, the award-winning documentary that began as a student film project, you will follow the Clearwater Knights, a high school football team determined to have a perfect, undefeated season and to have fun doing it. Wit

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - Shot Show 2026 Secrets - S4E54
programme.desc: Ryan Gresham, KJ, & Chris Cerino share Shot Show 2026 highlights, new suppressors, Glock Gen6, Beretta & Staccato range days, and why Vegas is grueling fun.

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - Ricochet Range Injury Nightmare - S5E1
programme.desc: Jared Gamez shares his shocking ricochet neck injury at the range despite safety protocols. Lessons on preparedness, eye pro, and getting back out shooting.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Store Robbery Intervention - S14E10
programme.desc: Shopper aids robbery victims vs. two armed robbers; trains positioning, options.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Workplace Shooter Defense - S14E11
programme.desc: Employee faces active shooter in lobby; trains cover tactics, vigilance vs. second threat.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Office Active Shooter - S1E1
programme.desc: Michael faces an active shooter in his office workplace. In this intense force-on-force training, he learns critical tactics: using cover properly, minimizing exposure, changing elevation, and engaging aggressively.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Knife Attack on theTrail - S1E2
programme.desc: Jared faces a sudden knife attack on a rural trail. In this intense force-on-force training, he learns the deadly 21-foot rule, edge weapon dangers, and the power of verbal commands.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Restaurant Robbery - S1E3
programme.desc: Gordon faces armed robbers bursting into a restaurant full of patrons. In this force-on-force training, he learns proper use of concealment and the vertical track “kill corridor” drill.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Home Invasion Rescue - S1E4
programme.desc: Chris, a veteran law enforcement officer and trainer, returns home to find his front door kicked in. He must clear his house alone to rescue his wife from an armed intruder.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Intervene or Avoid - S1E5
programme.desc: James walks into a man holding a woman at gunpoint near his vehicle. He intervenes and engages but learns vital cover use, exposure control, and when to get involved versus calling police.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Carjacking Stopped? - S1E6
programme.desc: Ryan gets boxed in at a stop sign in his truck during a carjacking. In this force-on-force training, he learns fast seatbelt escape techniques, proper draw from a vehicle, using the engine block as cover.

programme.title: First Person Defender - ATM Robbery - S1E7
programme.desc: Jeff gets cornered at an ATM during a strong-arm robbery. In this close-range force-on-force training, he learns critical retention shooting, combatives to protect his gun, and creating distance before firing.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Ground Fight Attack - S1E8
programme.desc: Chase, a new concealed carrier with no formal training, gets tackled and pinned by a violent attacker while walking to his car after work. He learns basic ground tactics and shooting from the supine position.

programme.title: Gun Talk TV - Drone-Guided Thermal Hog Hunt - S3E11
programme.desc: Drone + thermal team up for nighttime hog eradication — high-tech hunt drops pigs in the dark!

programme.title: Gun Talk TV - NFA Myths Busted: Own the Fun Stuff - S3E12
programme.desc: Suppressors, SBRs, machine guns & classics: yes, civilians can legally own them with the right paperwork!

programme.title: Gun Talk TV - Kansas Wing Shooting - S4E1
programme.desc: Ruger Red Label returns! Pheasant hunting, bird dogs & world-class sporting clays at Flint Oak.

programme.title: Gun Talk TV - Midnight Run Gun - S4E2
programme.desc: Nighttime 3-Gun Invitational! Lasers, lights, full-auto, night vision & grenade launcher chaos.

programme.title: Gun Talk TV - Ballistic Myths - S4E3
programme.desc: Can birdshot stop a threat? Does .223 through walls? Knockdown power? We test the myths.

programme.title: Build Box - Silent Hammer Part 1 - S1E1
programme.desc: Jeremy, Saul & Derrick race to build suppressed 300BLK ARs. A neon splatter and camo paint clash!

programme.title: Build Box - Silent Hammer Part 2 - S1E2
programme.desc: A precise lapped-receiver and zombie-green 300BLK races to beat neon splatter and tacky camo.

programme.title: Build Box - Homemade Upgrade Part 1 - S1E3
programme.desc: Gib, Zack & Bradley gut mil-spec ARs in a clash for softest, fastest and prettiest race rifle.

programme.title: Build Box - Homemade Upgrade Part 2 - S1E4
programme.desc: Will the tortoise-paced rifle lap the field? Are there upside-down brakes and single-shot crashes?

programme.title: First Person Defender - Car Burglary Trap - S1E9
programme.desc: Tyler walks up to find someone breaking into his car after work. He learns the danger of fixating on property crimes and practices close-quarters retention shooting.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Baby Kidnapping Threat - S1E10
programme.desc: Lori leaves a grocery store carrying her baby when a stranger tries to kidnap the child. She learns to create distance, use a protected one-handed draw, and shield her baby while issuing commands.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Convenience Store Robbery - S1E11
programme.desc: Michelle is caught in a convenience store robbery while shopping for snacks. She learns when not to draw immediately and purse-carry techniques.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Abduction Attempt - S1E12
programme.desc: Ryan faces her worst fear, abduction while walking to her car. She learns situational awareness, reactionary gap, and drawing from her purse.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Home Invasion Defense - S2E1
programme.desc: Jackie defends her family from a home intruder. She learns verbal commands, distance and family protection mindset.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Daughter on Fire - S2E2
programme.desc: Alan and his 13-year-old daughter Jenna face a terrifying attacker trying to set her on fire with gasoline. Alan must close the distance under stress and protect his family.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Mama Grizzly - S2E3
programme.desc: Lisa faces a real-life style carjacking at a gas station while her grandchildren are in the backseat. She must find her inner Grizzly to protect her family.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Jogging Trail Ambush - S2E4
programme.desc: Elise jogs on a wooded trail when an attacker approaches and makes physical contact.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Knockout Game Attack - S2E5
programme.desc: Will and Zuri walk in park when attackers execute the knockout game. Will is taken down first while Zuri draws and engages to protect her husband.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Home Intruder Confrontation - S2E6
programme.desc: Brett confronts an intruder in his home and must quickly assess the threat level using a light & laser and verbal commands.

programme.title: Gun Talk TV - Concealed Carry - S4E4
programme.desc: Concealed carry crash course: from .22 to 9mm, holsters, purse carry & husband-wife tactics.

programme.desc: Texas night hog hunt madness! Thermal, night vision, lasers & ARs drop herds of feral hogs!

programme.desc: From 1700s pocket pistols to M1 Garand & modern carry guns – epic history at Cody Firearms Museum!

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Timney Two Stage Trigger - S7E12

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Ruger LCR 9mm - S7E13
programme.desc: Ruger LCR 9mm revolver with moon clips and shrouded hammer. CrossBreed Super Tuck holster, Springfield XD Mod.2, Smith & Wesson Performance Center pistols, and Double Tap hunting ammo.

programme.title: Build Box - Homemade Upgrade Part 2 - S1E4

programme.title: Build Box - Modern Hunter Part 2 - S1E8

programme.title: GunVenture - Rise of the Robots - S1E2

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Ruger American Pistol Rocks! - S8E2

programme.desc: Barnes Vortex ammo optimized for cartridges like .308, .300 Win Mag. Ruger 10-22 Takedown Heavy Barrel with threaded muzzle. LaserLyte Master Module trainer; into real gun sights. DoubleTap Colt Defense .380 hollow points.

programme.desc: SIG Sauer expands ammo line with 33 loads. Colt Competition Pistol; 5" steel frame in 9mm & .45. Mossberg 930 Pro Series Sporting semi-auto shotgun with adjustable stock. Smith & Wesson M&P 15-22 Sport rimfire rifle.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - XDS Line Expands! - S8E6
programme.desc: Springfield Armory XDS now in tactical gray frame. Crimson Trace Link wireless grip-activated light-laser for ARs. CrossBreed Freedom holster offers minimalist IWB versatility. Liberty Safe withstands internal dynamite blast.

programme.desc: Alfredo’s pepper fade splatters Cody’s spring hunt and Lori’s puppet panic births a dream rifle.

programme.title: Build Box - Dream Build Part 2 - S1E10

programme.title: Build Box - Pistol Perfection Part 2 - S1E12

programme.title: Build Box - Season Recap - S1E13

programme.title: GunVenture - FPD Restaurant Robbery - S1E9
programme.desc: David confronts a robbery at a restaurant while traveling in this force-on-force training scenario.

programme.desc: Tom meets the Williams sisters, tours DoubleTap ammo and devastates artisan chocolate on the range.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Gun Store Robbery Chaos - S3E1
programme.desc: Jeremy defends a friend and himself during a gun store robbery. Draws on armed threats, uses cover & laser. He learns to prioritize threats, use verbal commands and avoid escalation.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Wheelchair Parking Lot Defense - S2E14
programme.desc: Tommy defends from his wheelchair in a parking lot attack. He creates distance while engaging the threat.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Return of the Cobra - S9E7

programme.desc: LMT suppressed 300 Blackout PDW, Ruger Mark IV .22 pistols and Rifle Rods safe storage.

programme.desc: ATN X-Sight 4K Pro electro-optic scope; Springfield Professional 1911s; Thompson Center TCR22 .22.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - M1A Oh A Oh - S10E4
programme.desc: SIG Sauer Academy training; Thompson Center TCR22 .22 and HSM Double Duty ammo; Ruger Security-9.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Restaurant Robbery Response - S3E2
programme.desc: David, a paramedic, faces an armed robber in restaurant. Does he know how to avoid a blind intervention, create distance and articulate good-guy status?

programme.title: First Person Defender - Hotel Room Push-In - S3E3
programme.desc: Mary defends herself against hotel room push-in intruder. Can she create distance, clear her garment, use verbal commands and one-handed close fire?

programme.title: First Person Defender - House Check-In Intruder - S3E4
programme.desc: Chad checks his friend's vacant house and encounters an armed intruder claiming to fix sheetrock. He commands compliance and engages when gun appears.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Backyard Party Dispute - S3E5

programme.title: First Person Defender - Hunting Stand Ambush - S3E6
programme.desc: Jacob defends his hunting spot from a man trying to steal his ATV. Will his shotgun be effective, or will he need to resort to a backup gun?

programme.title: First Person Defender - Armed Robbery Gunfight - S6E3
programme.desc: Christian and Amanda face an armed robber while shopping. Training covers medical response, low ready draw, and when not to escalate.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Backyard Cookout Intruder - S3E7
programme.desc: TJ defends friends and family at a cookout from a knife-wielding robber. Will a hostage deter him from using deadly force?

programme.title: First Person Defender - Assault at the Drug Clinic - S3E8
programme.desc: Christine, a nurse, is leaving work when an armed intruder demands drugs. Does she have the wherewithal to draw from her purse to intervene when the intruder attacks?

programme.title: First Person Defender - Parking Lot Stabbing - S3E9
programme.desc: Jessica witnesses a stabbing in parking lot and intervenes to help the victim. Will she use verbal commands and avoid closing gap too soon?

programme.title: First Person Defender - Gun Fight at the Party - S3E10

programme.desc: Kimber Micro 9 Raptor 9mm; .338 Win Mag cartridge and Barnes X Bullet 30th anniversary.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - The Long Ranger - S10E8

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Small but Fierce - S10E9
programme.desc: Aguila mini shells shotgun loads; Ruger SR1911 Lightweight Officer 9mm and Black Hills Honey Badger .45 test.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Let It Shine - S10E10
programme.desc: Gemtech suppressors & M&P 2.0 .45; 6.5 Creedmoor overview and Ruger PC Carbine takedown.

programme.title: Guns & Gear - Double the Space - S10E11

programme.desc: Ruger RPR Magnum in 300 PRC hits 2000 yards at FTW Ranch, and ATN BinoX 4K syncs with scopes.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Pool Table Gunfight - S3E12
programme.desc: Matte witnesses an argument escalating around a pool table at the bar. What is available for cover when the fight threatens to turn deadly? Will he close the gap too soon?

programme.title: First Person Defender - ATM Armed Robbery - S3E13
programme.desc: Matt intervenes in ATM robbery. Will his experience lead him to create distance, verbal commands and avoid closing gap too soon?

programme.title: First Person Defender - Workplace Shooting - S3E14

programme.title: First Person Defender - Home Burglary Safe Access - S4E1

programme.title: First Person Defender - Classroom Active Shooter Response - S4E2

programme.title: First Person Defender - Gas Station Armed Confrontation - S4E3

programme.title: First Person Defender - Property Inspection Robbery - S4E4
programme.desc: Lyle inspects a vacant house with realtor when armed robbers attack. He learns one-handed gun manipulation, punch-style one-handed shooting and chambering a round for readiness.

programme.title: First Person Defender - Store Domestic Dispute Shooting - S4E5
programme.desc: Nathan, an EMT, witnesses an agitated man escalate a domestic dispute in a store, attacking with bat. He learns to create distance early, verbal commands and to intervene on deadly force.

programme.desc: Remington 783 Varmint rifle & factory tour; SIG MPX Copperhead and Crimson Trace 3-24x scopes.

programme.desc: ATN Thor LT thermal hog hunt; Ruger Security-9 Compact and S&W M&P15 Sport II with Crimson Trace.

programme.title: Gun Talk Hunt - Saddle Hunting Tips - S5E26

programme.title: Gun Talk Hunt - Gear for Western Hunts - S5E2

programme.title: Gun Talk Hunt - Preparation Wins Hunts - S5E4

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - Gun Rights Battle Update - S5E2

programme.title: Gun Talk Nation - Revolver Myths and Real Fun - S5E3
programme.desc: Caleb Giddings defends revolvers; deep concealment, contact fights, big-game hunting & dry-fire training. Why wheelguns still rule for fun, carry & unique uses.

programme.desc: Iowa Game Warden Jeremy King on conservation funds; Josh Ward & Todd Bonura discuss custom guns & trends.
